1001406473.english: Then, how do you intend to handle the Hive problem in the UK?
1001406473.korean: 그렇다면, 영국의 연결체 문제는 어떻게 처리하실 생각이죠?

1001406475.english: - Whoever commands the troops to the UK must be able to respond organically to any unforeseen situation without my instructions.
1001406475.korean: - 그러니 영국에 갈 병력을 지휘할 사람은, 현장에서 그 어떤 돌발 사태가 벌어지더라도 내 지시 없이 유기적인 대응이 가능해야만 했다.

1001406476.english: - Even if forces are dispersed, they must anticipate allied movements and issue proper orders in advance.
1001406476.korean: - 병력을 분산시키는 경우에도 아군의 움직임을 전부 예측하고 미리 알맞은 지시를 내릴 수 있어야만 하고.

1001406477.english: - Only commanders like Leona, Mari, or Dragon-level leaders could manage that…
1001406477.korean: - 레오나나 마리, 용 정도의 지휘관들이라면 가능한 일이겠지만...

1001406478.english: - And among those with such command ability, only one is available to act immediately.
1001406478.korean: - 그 정도의 지휘 능력을 갖춘 사람 중, 지금 당장 움직일 수 있는 것은 단 하나.

1001406480.english: But Master, it's far too dangerous for you to go yourself.
1001406480.korean: 하지만 주인님께서 직접 움직이는 건 너무 위험해요.

1001406481.english: - Battle Maids, Companions, City Guards, Bermuda Team…

1001406482.english: - And all remaining combat-capable personnel on the Ark.
1001406482.korean: - 그 밖에도 방주에 남은 전투 가능 인원 전부.

1001406483.english: - Let's try landing in the UK.
1001406483.korean: - 어디 한 번 영국에 상륙해 보자고.

1001406484.english: I spoke grandly, but in reality, I had no intention of waging a massive battle.
1001406484.korean: - 말은 거창하게 했지만, 사실 대대적인 전투를 벌일 생각은 없었다.

1001406485.english: - Land in the UK as quickly as possible, rescue the isolated rescue team, and escape safely.
1001406485.korean: - 최대한 빨리 영국에 상륙해서, 고립된 구출팀을 데리고 안전하게 탈출하는 것.

1001406487.english: That's right. Even if we take everyone on the Ark...
1001406487.korean: 맞아요. 방주에 있는 인원을 전부 데려간다고 하더라도...

1001406488.english: The moment we engage in an all-out war with the forces of the Iron蟲, it is clear that we will be overwhelmed by numbers.
1001406488.korean: 철충의 세력과 전면전을 벌이게 되는 순간 숫자에서 압도당할 것이 분명해요.

1001406489.english: We would have to carefully select the landing point.

1001406490.english: Two streaks of green smoke that had suddenly been rising in London since yesterday.
1001406490.korean: - 어제부터 갑작스레 런던에서 피어오르던 초록색 연기 두 줄기.

1001406491.english: Judging by the fact that it did not go out or weaken even after quite some time had passed, it was undoubtedly a signal being sent to us.
1001406491.korean: - 시간이 꽤 지났음에도 꺼지거나 약해지지 않는 것으로 보아, 분명 우리에게 보내는 신호임이 틀림없었다.

1001406492.english: - Leanne and her group probably lit it to signal their location.
1001406492.korean: - 아마 리앤 일행이 위치를 알리기 위해 피운 것이겠지.

1001406493.english: London... Understood. I will get the sisters ready.

1001406494.english: Then, where is the landing point? Near Canterbury?
1001406494.korean: 그렇다면, 상륙 지점은 어디인가요? 캔터베리 근교?

1001406495.english: According to the records of the Ark, the British government built a massive canal on the Thames River in the past.
1001406495.korean: - 방주의 기록에 의하면, 영국 정부는 과거 템즈 강에 거대 운하를 건설했다고 한다.

1001406496.english: - ...a canal huge enough for the Orca to enter.
1001406496.korean: - ...오르카 호가 들어갈 수 있을 정도로 거대한 운하를.

1001406497.english: You're saying you're going directly to London on the Orca?
1001406497.korean: 오르카 호를 타고... 런던까지 직접 들어간다고요?

1001406498.english: ...It's dangerous, but... I think it's a good idea.

1001406499.english: Because we will definitely be able to take the initiative.
1001406499.korean: 저희 쪽에서 확실히 선제공격권을 가져갈 수 있을 테니까요.

1001406500.english: However, in that case... wouldn't they be hit by concentrated fire from nearby Iron Bugs when they surface?
1001406500.korean: 하지만, 그 경우... 수면 위로 부상했을 때 근처에 있는 철충들의 집중 포화를 맞을 수도 있지 않을까요?

1001406502.english: I heard that I have an enemy to deal with.
1001406502.korean: 제가 처리해야 할 적이 있다고 들었어요.

1001406503.english: We just arrived, Master. Are we perhaps too late?
1001406503.korean: 지금 도착했어요, 주인님. 혹시 저희가 너무 늦었나요?

1001406504.english: I signaled to Alexandra, who was reviewing the strategy in the corner, and...
1001406504.korean: - 나는 구석에서 전략을 다시 점검하던 알렉산드라에게 신호를 보냈고...

1001406505.english: Alexandra displayed a map on the screen and began the briefing.
1001406505.korean: - 알렉산드라는 화면에 지도를 띄우고 브리핑을 시작했다.

1001406506.english: Welcome, both of you. It’s been a while since we’ve had a conversation about work outside of training.
1001406506.korean: 어서 오세요, 두 사람 다. 오랜만에 교육 외 업무로 대화를 나누게 되는군요.

1001406507.english: Then, I will start the mission briefing right away.

1001406508.english: Please look at this map. This is the current situation in London as identified by Mr. Sleipnir through high-altitude reconnaissance.
1001406508.korean: 이 지도를 봐 주세요. 슬레이프니르 씨가 고고도 정찰을 통해 파악한 런던의 현황이에요.

1001406509.english: Since it was observed with the naked eye and written by hand, it isn't that precise, but...
1001406509.korean: 육안으로 관측하고 수기로 작성한 거라, 그렇게 정교하진 않지만...

1001406510.english: There shouldn't be any major problems with the mission briefing.
1001406510.korean: 임무 브리핑에 큰 문제는 없을 거에요.

1001406511.english: It's not hard to tell. The green marker must be the survivor group, and the red marker the enemies.
1001406511.korean: 알아보기 어렵진 않네요. 초록 마커는 생존자 집단, 붉은 마커는 적이겠군요.

1001406512.english: What are the areas marked in yellow?

1001406513.english: It is a place where movement is impossible because buildings have collapsed or barricades have been set up.
1001406513.korean: 건물이 무너지거나 바리케이드가 설치되어서 이동이 불가능한 곳이에요.

1001406514.english: Hmm... then the path I just drew is...

1001406515.english: You are right. Assuming you encounter the fewest Iron蟲s, it is the shortest route to reach the survivor group.
1001406515.korean: 생각하신 게 맞아요. 철충과 가장 적게 만난다는 가정 하에, 최단 경로로 생존자 집단에게 도착하는 경로죠.

1001406516.english: As you can see, the survivor group is completely surrounded by Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs).
1001406516.korean: 보시다시피, 생존자 집단은 철충에게 완전히 포위당한 상황이죠.

1001406517.english: The Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) aren't showing any active movements right now, but once the full-scale offensive begins, we don't know how long they will be able to hold out...
1001406517.korean: 지금은 철충이 적극적인 움직임을 보이지 않고 있지만, 본격적인 공세가 시작되면 저들이 얼마나 버틸지 알 수 없으니...

1001406518.english: After disembarking at the pier near the London Eye, you must reach your destination, the Nightingale Museum, as quickly as possible.
1001406518.korean: 런던 아이 근처의 부두를 통해 상륙한 다음, 최대한 신속하게 목적지인 나이팅게일 박물관에 도착해야 해요.

1001406519.english: The members classified as Team A will bring the survivors back to the Orca from here.
1001406519.korean: A팀으로 분류된 대원들은 여기서 생존자들을 데리고 오르카 호로 귀환할 거에요.

1001406520.english: The remaining members of Team B move north and deal with the Iron蟲 targeting Team A's rear.
1001406520.korean: 나머지 B팀의 대원들은 북쪽으로 이동하며, A팀의 뒤를 노리는 철충을 처리합니다.

1001406521.english: Since they cannot head north again with the survivors, the Orca moves south...
1001406521.korean: 생존자들을 데리고 다시 북쪽으로 향할 수 없으니, 오르카 호가 그대로 남쪽으로 이동...

1001406522.english: We will pick up the survivors at the docks, head north again to pick up Team B, and then leave London.
1001406522.korean: 부두에서 생존자들을 태우고 다시 북쪽으로 이동해서 B팀을 픽업한 뒤, 런던을 빠져나갈 거예요.

1001406523.english: Yes. When the Orca first surfaces, it is highly likely to be hit by concentrated fire from nearby Iron蟲s.
1001406523.korean: 네. 오르카 호가 처음 수면 위로 부상했을 때, 근처 철충들의 집중 포화를 맞을 가능성이 높아요.

1001406524.english: So, the moment the Orca rises to the surface, Alice must unleash an indiscriminate bombardment around it and wipe out all the Iron蟲.
1001406524.korean: 그러니, 오르카 호가 수면 위로 떠오르는 순간, 앨리스 씨가 주변에 무차별 폭격을 날려 철충들을 싹 쓸어버려야만 해요.

1001406525.english: After that, you must immediately bomb Westminster Bridge to cut off the Iron蟲's reinforcements.
1001406525.korean: 그 뒤, 즉시 웨스트민스터 교를 폭격해서 철충의 지원 병력을 끊어내야 하고요.

1001406526.english: It is Ms. Lilith's job to protect Ms. Alice in the meantime.
1001406526.korean: 그 동안 앨리스 씨를 보호하는 것이 리리스 씨의 일입니다.

1001406527.english: The success or failure of the operation essentially depends on the two of them.
1001406527.korean: 작전의 성패는 두 사람에게 달린 셈이죠.

1001406528.english: Hahaha... Well... That’s a mission that suits me perfectly.
1001406528.korean: 후후훗... 그것 참... 제게 딱 맞는 임무네요.

1001406529.english: I'll do my best, Master. Thank you for trusting me.
1001406529.korean: 최선을 다 할게요, 주인님. 믿어주셔서 감사해요.

1001406530.english: There can't be any problem with Master's plan, so I have no complaints either, but...
1001406530.korean: 주인님의 계획에 문제가 있을 리는 없으니, 저도 불만은 없지만...

1001406531.english: I have just one favor to ask of you, Master.

1001406532.english: Since a situation might arise where I cannot stay by my master's side like now...
1001406532.korean: 지금처럼 제가 주인님 곁에 붙어 있지 못하는 상황이 생길 수도 있으니...

1001406533.english: I think you need to find a way to protect yourself, Master.
1001406533.korean: 주인님도 몸을 지킬 방법을 찾으셔야 할 것 같아요.

1001406534.english: Here you go. It's an optical camouflage device. I got the device used by the Bermuda team.
1001406534.korean: 여기요. 광학미채 장치에요. 버뮤다 팀에서 쓰는 장치를 받아왔어요.

1001406535.english: My younger siblings will stay right by Master's side, but if Master were to be sniped while I was away...
1001406535.korean: 저희 동생들이 주인님 곁에 꼭 붙어 있겠지만, 제가 없는 사이 주인님께서 저격이라도 당하신다면...

1001406536.english: It will be very difficult to block.

1001406537.english: So, if a battle breaks out, I would like you to use the optical camouflage device to hide yourself, Master.
1001406537.korean: 그러니, 전투가 벌어진다면 주인님께서는 광학미채 장치를 쓰고 몸을 숨기셨으면 해요.

1001406538.english: - An optical camouflage device. I think the escort by the Companions alone will be sufficient, but...
1001406538.korean: - 광학미채 장치라. 컴패니언 대원들의 호위만으로 충분할 거라고 생각하지만...

1001406539.english: I can't exactly refuse when they say it out of concern for me.
1001406539.korean: - 나를 생각해서 하는 말을 거절할 수도 없는 노릇이지.

1001406540.english: I took the optical camouflage device from Lilith, took a deep breath, and composed myself.
1001406540.korean: - 나는 리리스에게 광학미채 장치를 받아들고, 심호흡을 하며 마음을 가다듬었다.

1001406541.english: At that moment, a few more signal fires rose from the building's rooftop.
1001406541.korean: - 그 순간, 건물 옥상에서 봉화가 몇 개 더 피어올랐다.

1001406542.english: - It was a signal that combat with the Iron蟲 had begun.
1001406542.korean: - 철충과 교전을 시작했다는 것을 의미하는 신호였다.

1001406543.english: Yes, Master. And, Lilith... don't worry so much.
1001406543.korean: 네, 주인님. 그리고, 리리스... 너무 그렇게 걱정하지 마렴.

1001406544.english: Because I won't even give the enemies time to turn their guns toward you, Master.
1001406544.korean: 적들이 주인님 쪽으로 총구를 돌릴 시간조차 주지 않을 테니까.

1001406546.english: Did we manage to stop them this time as well?

1001406548.english: No, I feel like I'm going to die from exhaustion.

1001406549.english: Ah, seriously… even if there are many, it's just too much. They couldn't have come from all over England, so how many factories did the Black River bastards build?
1001406549.korean: 아, 정말이지... 많아도 너무 많잖아. 영국 전체에서 몰려온 것도 아닐 텐데, 대체 블랙리버 놈들은 공장을 얼마나 지어 놓은 거야?

1001406552.english: Then… is there anything we can do to help?
1001406552.korean: 그럼... 저희가 뭔가 도와드릴 건 없을까요?

1001406553.english: Well, maybe survive a little longer by going inside?
1001406553.korean: 글쎄, 안으로 들어가서 조금이나마 더 오래 사는 거?

1001406554.english: It won't make much of a difference.

1001406555.english: It's not even an iron door, just a thin wooden door…
1001406555.korean: 철문도 아니고, 얇은 나무 문 하나인데요, 뭐...

1001406558.english: someone is attacking the barricade on the lower floor.

1001406559.english: It seems… this is as far as they can reach.

1001406560.english: Is it because of doing something that doesn't suit me. The results are bad.
1001406560.korean: 안 어울리는 짓을 해서 그런가, 영 결과가 나쁜데.

1001406562.english: It's better than blowing up after being betrayed, like in the movie script, right?
1001406562.korean: 영화 대본에서 나왔던 것처럼, 배신당해서 폭사하는 것보다는 더 나은 마무리겠지?

1001406563.english: Am I perhaps dead and seeing hallucinations?
1001406563.korean: 내가 혹시 죽어서 헛것을 보고 있나?

1001406564.english: No, it seems you're alive and well.

1001406566.english: We saw the signal fires and came.

1001406567.english: But we're… right in the middle of the horde of Metal Parasites?

1001406568.english: Yes. You're saying were in such a hurry that we didn't even change our clothes?
1001406568.korean: 맞아요. 서두르느라 옷도 못 갈아입고 왔다고요?

1001406569.english: We plan to rescue you and quickly get out.

1001406570.english: …Ha. Coming to save us at the perfect moment of crisis… it's absurdly convenient.
1001406570.korean: ...하. 위기에 처한 순간 딱 맞춰서 구하러 오는 아군이라니... 정말 어이없을 정도로 편의주의적인 전개네.

1001406571.english: I suppose this kind of plot isn't bad either?

1001406575.english: - All survivors were rescued without a single casualty, and none of our team were injured or killed.
1001406575.korean: - 생존자들은 단 한 명의 낙오자도 빠짐없이 전부 구조되었고, 우리 대원들 중 아무도 죽거나 다치지 않았으니까.

1001406576.english: However… we were only able to achieve half of our objectives this time as well.
1001406576.korean: - 하지만... 우리는 이번에도 절반의 목표만을 달성할 수 있었다.

1001406577.english: …Rian and the rescue team are nowhere to be seen.

1001406578.english: And the Blind Princess as well.

1001406579.english: Don't worry too much, Commander. I heard from the survivors…
1001406579.korean: 너무 걱정하지 마세요, 사령관님. 제가 생존자 분들께 들었는데...

1001406580.english: They went to send a signal to you and headed to Portsmouth.
1001406580.korean: 그 분들은 사령관님께 신호를 보내기 위해 포츠머스로 향하셨다고 해요.

1001406581.english: There's nothing we can do. Let's take comfort in having rescued the survivors.
1001406581.korean: 어쩔 수 없습니다. 생존자들을 구출한 것으로 위안을 삼도록 하죠.

1001406582.english: After retreating to the Ark and reorganizing, we can then head to Portsmouth.
1001406582.korean: 방주로 후퇴한 다음, 다시 재정비해서 포츠머스로 향하면 될 겁니다.

1001406584.english: Then it might be a bit dangerous.
1001406584.korean: 그러면 좀 위험할 수도 있을 것 같아요.

1001406585.english: Portsmouth is currently occupied by that nasty Merlin.
1001406585.korean: 포츠머스는 현재 멀린이라는 나쁜 녀석이 점령한 상태거든요.

1001406586.english: Yes. Originally, we were conducting resistance activities based in Portsmouth…
1001406586.korean: 네. 원래 저희는 포츠머스를 기점으로 저항군 활동을하고 있었는데...

1001406587.english: The resistance leader Merlin betrayed us and took control of the AGSs, driving us out of the stronghold.
1001406587.korean: 저항군의 부대장이었던 멀린이 저희를 배신하고, AGS들을 조종해서 저희를 거점 밖으로 내쫓았거든요.

1001406588.korean: - 그것 참... 좋지 않은 소식인데. 이거 골치 아프게 되었군.

1001406589.english: Ah, no. You risked yourself to come here for us, so…
1001406589.korean: 아, 아니에요. 인간님께서 저희를 위해 위험을 감수하고 직접 와 주셨는데...

1001406590.english: of course we'll do our best to help.

1001406591.english: We also received a lot of help from Brünhilde…

1001406592.english: You're not planning to retreat to the Ark?

1001406593.english: - If we retreat to the Ark and then support Rian's team, it might be too late.
1001406593.korean: - 방주로 후퇴했다가 리앤 일행을 지원하러 가면, 너무 늦을 가능성이 높다.

1001406594.english: - So we have no choice but to head straight to Portsmouth.
1001406594.korean: - 그러니 바로 포츠머스로 향할 수 밖에.

1001406595.english: I'll contact Sleipnir and have the high-altitude photos of Portsmouth prepared immediately.
1001406595.korean: 슬레이프니르  씨에게 연락해서, 바로 포츠머스의 고고도 사진을 준비할게요.

1001406596.english: While moving to Portsmouth, we'll make the next plan as quickly as possible.
1001406596.korean: 포츠머스까지 이동하는 동안, 최대한 빨리 다음 계획을 세우도록 하겠습니다.

1001406600.english: Right. I can't do anything too big, but…

1001406601.english: Then how about you host that Christmas party, Maria?
1001406601.korean: 그러면 그 크리스마스 파티의 주최를 마리아가 하는 건 어때?

1001406602.english: It was your idea, wasn't it? I can't just take the idea away.
1001406602.korean: 마리아가 낸 아이디어잖아? 내가 아이디어만 빼앗아 갈 수는 없지.

1001406603.english: Don't worry. I'll help you out.

1001406604.english: Well… first, shouldn't we decide what kind of party it's going to be?
1001406604.korean: 글쎄... 일단 어떤 파티가 될 것인지부터 결정해야 하지 않을까?

1001406605.english: Good idea. Then, rather than flashy decorations…

1001406607.english: Ah, Wraithy… it's nothing, just ran out of gift wrapping paper.
1001406607.korean: 아, 레이시... 별 건 아니고, 선물 포장지가 모자라서.

1001406608.english: …Has the rumor already spread that much?

1001406610.english: I'd appreciate it, but… don't overdo it.

1001406611.english: Frigg, Wraithy. Even the City Guard. Just in time.
1001406611.korean: 프리가, 레이시. 시티가드까지. 마침 잘 왔어.

1001406612.english: Right. It seems we have to go to England after all.
1001406612.korean: 맞아. 아무래도 우리 영국으로 가야 할 것 같아.

1001406615.english: Perrault, what's the Companion schedule for this week?
1001406615.korean: 페로, 이번 주 컴패니언 스케줄이 어떻게 되지?

1001406616.english: No, it's their day off, right? Unless it's urgent, let them rest.
1001406616.korean: 아니야, 비번이잖아? 정말 급한 일이 아니면 쉬게 둬야지.

1001406617.english: Good idea. Who else could be available?

1001406618.english: …Is it time for the Nurse of Nature to return?

1001406619.english: Ah, no, I thought of a better way.

1001406621.english: Can't be helped. Retreat for now.

1001406623.english: No way! Really glad you came.
1001406623.korean: 그럴 리가 있나! 정말 잘 와줬어.

1001406624.english: Mongoose team! After eliminating the Metal Parasites outside the tunnel, move in immediately.
1001406624.korean: 몽구스 팀! 현재 터널 밖의 철충들을 섬멸하는 즉시 터널로 돌입한다.

1001406628.english: We can't pull forces from the European front.
1001406628.korean: 유럽 전선에서 병력을 뺄 수는 없어.

1001406629.english: It can't be helped. England has no radio communication.
1001406629.korean: 어쩔 수 없어. 영국은 전파 통신이 불가능하잖아.

1001406630.english: Don't worry. That's why we'll bring everyone.
1001406630.korean: 걱정하지 마. 그래서 다 데려갈 거니까.

1001406633.english: Rather than that… let's use our advantage.

1001406634.english: Right. That's why we called for help.

1001406635.english: No, both came just in time.
1001406635.korean: 아니야, 둘 다 때 맞춰 잘 왔어.

1001406636.english: We'll split the team into two there.

1001406637.english: And in this process, Alice and Lilith have tasks to handle.
1001406637.korean: 그리고 이 과정에서 앨리스와 리리스가 해줘야 할 일이 있어.

1001406640.english: Let's go, Labiata! I'll leave the vanguard to you.

1001406641.english: No, it's not exactly a satisfying finish.
1001406641.korean: 아니, 별로 마음에 안 드는 마무리인데.

1001406642.english: Hello, Brünhilde. We've come to rescue you.

1001406643.english: So, you have to run quickly.

1001406644.korean: 설마, 무슨 일이 있던 건 아니겠지?

1001406645.english: Darn, does that mean we're a step late?
1001406645.korean: 이런, 우리가 한 발짝 늦은 셈인가?

1001406647.english: You must be tired, thanks for the information.

1001406648.english: Then... can you tell me more about Merlin now?
1001406648.korean: 그럼... 지금 멀린에 대해서 좀 더 이야기 해 줄 수 있어?

1001406649.english: Yes. We're going straight to Portsmouth.

1001406650.english: This time, unlike before, it's going to be a big fight.
1001406650.korean: 이번에는 이전과는 달리, 큰 싸움이 될 거야.

1001406651.english: We did a lot of overseas filming before humanity went extinct. We also did localization for local viewers. This outfit is also part of that localization... Hehe, do you like it?
1001406651.korean: 인류가 멸망하기 전에 해외 촬영도&n많이 했어요. 현지 시청자를 위한 현지화도&n했었죠. 이 옷도 현지화의 일환인데...&n후후, 마음에 드세요?

1001406652.english: What was the identity of the black figure that appeared before the Magical Girl Magic Peach at that moment? Ah... this is the script from when I ran it through a low-performance translator. Still, this is an improvement. I'm telling you, back in the day, there were things like red bean paste, strong candies, and discipline trees!
1001406652.korean: 그때 마법 소녀 마법의 복숭아 앞에&n나타난 검은 모양의 정체는?&n아... 성능 안 좋은 번역기를 돌렸을 때의&n대본이네요. 그래도 이건 나아진 거예요.&n옛날에는 팥고물, 진한개, 징계나무 같은 것도&n있었다니까요?

1001406653.english: Baekto changed clothes too. Did you see? Who do you like more? Momo? Or Baekto? Hehe, just kidding. You’re sure the Commander would like them all.
1001406653.korean: 백토도 같이 옷을 갈아입었는데 보셨나요?&n누가 더 마음에 드시나요?&n모모? 아니면 백토?&n헤헤, 농담이에요. 사령관님이시라면 전부&n좋아하실게 분명하잖아요.

1001406654.english: Commander, how about a walk together? I spotted a great spot while filming. I think you would enjoy it too if we took a leisurely stroll under parasols.
1001406654.korean: 사령관님, 같이 산책 어떠신가요?&n촬영하면서 멋진 곳을 봐뒀는데.&n함께 양산을 쓰면서 느긋하게 걸으면&n사령관님도 좋아하실 거예요.

1001406655.english: Momo likes this outfit. It feels fresh because it is different from her usual clothes, and the pattern and accessories are pretty. But above all... it is because the Commander likes it.
1001406655.korean: 모모는 이 옷이 좋아요.&n기존의 옷들과 달라서 신선하고,&n무늬나 장신구도 예뻐요.&n하지만 무엇보다도...&n사령관님이 좋아해 주시니까요.

1001406656.english: They say this outfit was made to commemorate the Year of the Rabbit back then. Wearing this, it feels like Momo can understand the rabbit's feelings a little bit, too? Please don't let Momo be lonely.
1001406656.korean: 당시 토끼의 해를 기념하기 위해서&n만든 옷이라고 해요.&n이 옷을 입으니 모모도 살짝 토끼의 기분을&n이해할 수 있는 그런 느낌?&n모모를 외롭게 하지 말아 주세요.

1001406658.english: Hehehe, Commander. Are you lost because you're seeing this outfit for the first time?&nThen I'll teach you.&nDirectly. One. By one.
1001406658.korean: 에헤헤, 사령관님. 처음 보는 옷이라&n헤매시는 건가요?&n그러면 제가 가르쳐 드릴게요.&n직접. 하나. 하나.

1001406659.english: Commander, is there an outfit you wish me to wear? If the Commander wishes,&nI can wear anything.&nIf you want... I can wear the wind...
1001406659.korean: 사령관님, 제가 입기를 바라는 옷이&n있으신가요? 사령관님이 바라시면&n무엇이든지 입을 수 있어요.&n원하신다면... 바람을... 입을 수도 있어요.

1001406660.english: Playing the pipa? It's simple. Just hold it with both hands like this. When the blade pops out, swing it at the enemy. Then, it makes a sound, right?
1001406660.korean: 비파 연주? 간단해요. 이렇게 양손으로 잡고.&n날이 튀어나오면 적에게 휘둘러요.&n그러면 어쨌든 소리는 나죠?

1001406661.english: Momo told me the rules for wearing this outfit. There are a few strange things about it, but... since Momo wouldn't trick me, I am following them exactly.
1001406661.korean: 모모가 이 옷을 입었을 때의&n규칙을 알려줬어요. 이상한 것이&n몇 가지 있지만… 모모가 저를 속일 리 없으니&n그대로 따르고 있어요.

1001406662.english: For some reason, I feel overflowing with energy when I wear this outfit. Just like when the full moon rises. I guess Momo wasn't wrong to tell me to wear this.
1001406662.korean: 이 옷을 입으면 왠지 모르게 힘이 넘쳐나요.&n마치 만월이 떴을 때처럼.&n모모가 괜히 이 옷을 입으라고 한 게&n아닌가 봐요.

1001406663.english: It is my role to encourage good and punish evil. I wore this outfit solely for the purpose of rewarding good and punishing evil. If a gentleman... is happy to see this outfit... then I, I am a little happy too.
1001406663.korean: 선은 권하고, 악은 징벌하는 것이 저의 역할.&n이 복장도 어디까지나 권선징악을 위해서&n입은 옷이죠.&n신사가... 이 옷을 보고 기뻐한다면...&n저, 저도 조금은 기뻐요.

1001406664.english: Where are you looking right now? I can feel the gaze of a gentle... no, a gentleman's gaze emanating from your whole body. ......I-is there a specific move you want?
1001406664.korean: 지금 어디를 보고 있나요?&n전신에서 젠틀... 아니, 신사의 시선이&n느껴지네요.&n......따, 따로 원하는 동작이 있나요?

1001406665.english: I read in a book that having many descendants is... a virtue. So, gentleman, shall we share love together and practice the virtue of having many descendants?
1001406665.korean: 어느 책을 보니 자손을 번창시키는 것은...&n미덕이라고 하더군요. 그러니 신사.&n우리 함께 사랑을 나누며 자손 번창의 미덕을 &n행하도록 할까요?

1001406666.english: Do not succumb to the evil called lust, gentleman!

1001406667.english: You want me to serve you?&nI must remain chaste...&nBut... since the person I love ordered it...&nI shall obey.
1001406667.korean: 수, 수청을 들라고요?&n정절을 지켜야 하는데...&n하지만... 제가 사랑하는 사람이 명했으니...&n따라야겠네요.

1001406668.english: They say rabbits die if lonely,&nbut that's a superstition. Rabbits do not die just from loneliness.&nBut... I would die without a gentleman.&nSo do not leave me alone.
1001406668.korean: 토끼는 외로우면 죽는다는 말이 있지만&n그건 미신이에요. 토끼는 외로워도 죽거나&n그러진 않아요.&n하지만... 저는 신사가 없으면 죽어버려요.&n그러니 저를 내버려 두지 마세요.

1001406669.english: Hey Commander... can I paint a piece on the wall of the Orca? ... No way. Approved drawings aren't exactly hip... Just pretend you didn't hear that!
1001406669.korean: 저기 사령관… 오르카호 벽에&n작품 하나 그려도 될까?&n…아니지. 허가 받은 그림은 힙하지 못한데…&n못 들은걸로 해줘!

1001406670.english: As expected, the clothes in the Taylor line are super cool. It's not that Audrey's clothes are bad, but... I'd say they're a little overwhelming...
1001406670.korean: 역시 테일러 라인의 옷들이 초 쿨하다니까.&n오드리 옷이 나쁜 건 아니지만…&n살짝 부담된다고 할까…

1001406671.english: Shh! This is a secret, but tonight, Captain Mei is going to paint a masterpiece on the Throne of Judgment. Aren't you scared? How can you paint a masterpiece if you fear authority!?
1001406671.korean: 쉿! 이건 비밀인데 오늘 밤,&n메이 대장 심판의 옥좌에 작품 하나 &n그릴 거야. 두렵지 않냐고?&n권위를 두려워하면 어떻게 걸작을 그려!?

1001406672.english: Commander, do you have any spare batteries? Yeah, nothing special, just to slip some to Pupp Head. Pupp Head is happy to get batteries, and I'm happy not to get dragged away. Isn't that a win-win?
1001406672.korean: 사령관, 전지 남는 거 있어?&n응, 별건 아니고 펍 헤드한테 찔러주려고.&n펍 헤드는 전지가 생겨서 좋고,&n나는 안 끌려가서 좋고. 상부상조 아냐?

1001406673.english: Ah! Commander! Don't come near me! N-It's not that I don't want to, it's just that I'm covered in paint right now! With special paint that makes you visible in the dark!
1001406673.korean: 앗! 사령관! 가까이 오지마!&n시, 싫은 게 아니라 지금 몸에&n페인트 잔뜩 묻어 있어서 그래!&n어두우면 보이는 특수페인트로!

1001406674.english: Hey, why don't we form a crew together? We could go around here and there, brainstorm what kind of art to draw, and eat something delicious on the way back. Hehe, that sounds super fun, right?
1001406674.korean: 저기 같이 크루 만들지 않을래?&n같이 여기저기 돌아다니면서&n어떤 그림을 그릴지 회의하고,&n돌아오는 길에 맛있는 것도 먹고.&n헤헤, 엄청 즐겁겠지?

1001406675.english: Wait, wait, wait! Let go of the band! Band!

1001406676.english: I want to see the Commander's work too…&nWill you draw it here?

1001406677.english: Hehe. I secretly wrote a few words in the Commander's room…&nDid you see it? You haven't seen it yet?&nStayed up working again, didn't you!?&nI wrote it so you could see it when you turn off the light and lie down in bed!&nI'll love you forever. Sylphid.
1001406677.korean: 헤헤. 사령관 방에 몰래 몇 마디 썼는데…&n봤어? 아직 못 봤다고?&n또 잠 안 자고 일 했지!?&n불 끄고 침대에 누우면 볼 수 있게 써뒀는데!&n영원히 당신을 사랑해. 실피드가. 라고!

1001406678.english: The meaning of this picket sign? Haha, why are you asking the obvious? Of course it's my turn to fight! Get all the picket signs and opponents ready!
1001406678.korean: 이 피켓의 의미?&n하하, 무슨 뻔한 걸 묻고 있어?&n당연히 내가 싸울 상대의 순번이지!&n피켓이랑 상대 잔뜩 준비해두라고!

1001406679.english: Back when she was suspended from competing, she even worked as a round girl in events outside of BWE. And she interfered in that match and won. So she just needs to avoid competing in BWE matches, right?
1001406679.korean: 옛날에 경기 출장 정지 먹었을 때에&nBWE 외의 다른 종목 경기에 라운드 걸로&n활약했던 적도 있었지.&n그리고 그 경기에 난입해서 승리했어.&nBWE 경기만 출장 안 하면 되는 거잖아?

1001406680.english: Hmm, this outfit is uncomfortable to move in... Well, since it's me, I suppose this kind of handicap is necessary for a fair match.
1001406680.korean: 으음, 이 옷 움직이기 불편한데...&n뭐, 나니까 이 정도 핸디캡 정도는 있어야&n공평한 경기가 되겠지만 말이야.

1001406681.english: Since I was wearing this outfit, that... who was it again? The older of the two sisters, asked me for weight-loss workout tips, so I taught her while working out with her. We did it together for one day, but she didn't want to do it with me again after that...
1001406681.korean: 내가 이 옷을 입으니까 둠 브링어의&n그... 누구더라? 크고 작은 자매 중에&n큰 쪽이 나한테 살 빼는 운동법을 묻길래&n같이 운동하며 가르쳐줬지.&n하루 같이하고 다음부터는 같이 안 하더라...

1001406682.english: I was offered a job at Café Amor... but working in a place like that doesn't suit my personality... What? The manager goes there often? You should have told me that earlier!
1001406682.korean: 카페 아모르에서 함께 일해보지 않겠냐고&n제안을 받았는데… 그런 곳에서 일하는 건&n내 성미에 안 맞아서...&n뭐? 매니저가 자주 간다고?&n그런 건 일찍 말했어야지!

1001406683.english: Manager. Do you happen to like rabbits? Then I was thinking of introducing you to a devoted rabbit who is good at wrestling and loves cross-stitching and shopping... What do you think? Are you interested?
1001406683.korean: 매니저. 혹시 토끼 좋아해?&n그러면 레슬링 잘하고, 십자수랑 쇼핑&n좋아하는 일편단심인 토끼 하나 소개시켜&n주려고 하는데... 어때? 관심있어?

1001406684.english: That's cheating. You're saying we should play without any rules?

1001406685.english: Long ago, I ran naked on the ring&nand got suspended from matches…&nHehe. Will I get suspended again?
1001406685.korean: 옛날에 링에서 알몸으로 날뛰다가&n경기 출장 금지 먹은 적이 있는데...&n후후. 한 번 더 출장 금지 먹겠네?

1001406686.english: Just as the manager watches me, I always&nkeep a careful eye on the manager's actions.&nHaha, the manager probably needs a championship belt too… but I don't see an appropriate one…&nWell, I guess I can just hold you! Come here!
1001406686.korean: 매니저가 나를 지켜보는 것처럼 나도&n언제나 매니저의 활약을 잘 지켜보고 있어.&n하하, 매니저에게도 챔피언 벨트가 필요할 &n거 같은데... 적당한 게 안 보이네...&n뭐, 내가 안아주면 되겠지! 이리와!

1001406687.english: I'll call you Arthur. Because I'm Merlin, and you're the only king I serve... and above all, calling you Commander is just too normal!
1001406687.korean: 아서라고 부를게. 왜냐면, 난 멀린이고,&n당신은 내가 섬기는 유일한 왕인데다가...​&n무엇보다 사령관이라고 부르는 건&n너무 노멀하니까!

1001406688.english: They say Prydwen means "beautiful face." Doesn't that suit me really, really well? What do you think, Arthur? You agree, right?
1001406688.korean: 프리드웬에는 아름다운 얼굴이라는 뜻이 있대.&n나한테 정말정말 잘 어울리는 말 아니겠어?&n어때, 아서도 그렇게 생각하지?

1001406689.english: If you want peace, prepare for war. But what if you want war? Then please find our adorable Merlin!
1001406689.korean: 평화를 원한다면, 전쟁을 준비하라.&n하지만 전쟁을 원한다면?&n그 때는 귀염둥이 멀린을 찾아주세용!

1001406690.english: Arthur...! Help me! Black Friday is chasing me again! Huh? You're asking if I played a prank first? No, I was just warming up the beer a little.
1001406690.korean: 아서어...! 살려줘! 블프가 또 쫓아와!&n응? 내가 먼저 장난친 거 아니냐고?&n아냐, 난 그냥 맥주를 좀 뜨뜻하게 데워줬을&n뿐이라구.

1001406691.english: "I'm a strategist, so why would I go out to the battlefield to fight? A strategist is someone who helps win a war, right? So if I kill all of Arthur's enemies, that means we can win the war right away! That is the Poseidon-style strategist."
1001406691.korean: 난 참모인데 왜 전장에 나가서 싸우냐고?&n참모는 전쟁에서 이기도록 돕는 사람이잖아?&n그럼 내가 아서의 적들을 전부 다 죽여버리면,&n바로 전쟁에서 이길 수 있다는 말이고!&n이게 바로 포세이돈식 참모야.

1001406692.english: Want to go on a trip together on the Prydwen, Arthur? Forget the Stronghold, forget the Black Friday... just the two of us. You ask if I'm asking you out on a date? Of course I am!
1001406692.korean: 프리드웬 타고 같이 여행이나 갈래, 아서?&n스트롱홀드도 빼고, 블프도 빼고...&n나랑 아서랑 단 둘이서만.&n데이트 신청이냐고? 그야 당연하지~!

1001406693.english: Ah, wait! I'm not fully adjusted yet, so I'm a bit in a difficult situation right now...
1001406693.korean: 앗, 잠깐만! 몸 조정이 다 안 끝나서&n지금은 좀 곤란해...

1001406694.english: Then... shall we take a look at Arthur's Excalibur...? Hehe...
1001406694.korean: 그럼... 아서의 엑스칼리버 구경 좀 해볼까...?&n히힛…

1001406695.english: Nothing smells better in the morning than napalm, except Arthur in the morning.
1001406695.korean: 아침에 맡는 네이팜 냄새보다 더 기분 좋은 건,&n아침에 맡는 아서 냄새밖에 없지.

1001406696.english: Arthur, where should we go for our honeymoon? Tell me anywhere you like. Even a place with Iron Bugs is fine. We can just conquer it and make it our land.
1001406696.korean: 아서, 우리 신혼여행은 어디로 갈까?&n마음에 드는 곳이 있으면 어디든 말해봐.&n철충이 있는 곳이라도 괜찮아.&n점령하고 우리 땅으로 만들면 되니까.

1001406697.english: What I want is war. A war to overwhelmingly trample and ravage the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) that drove my friends to their deaths. That is why I call myself a warmonger. And that will not change until we win the war against the Iron蟲.
1001406697.korean: 내가 원하는 건 전쟁이야.&n내 친구들을 죽음으로 몰아넣은 철충을&n압도적으로 짓밟고 유린하는 전쟁.&n그게 내가 전쟁광을 자칭하는 이유야.&n그리고 그건 철충과의 전쟁에서&n이길 때까지 변하지 않을 거야.

1001406698.english: Captain Gamma would never agree, but... I think the easier the fight, the better. After all, the weaker the opponent, the less damage we suffer. I won't... never lose friends again. Well, since Arthur is here, that won't happen, right?
1001406698.korean: 감마 대장님은 절대 동의 안 하겠지만...&n난 싸움은 쉬울수록 좋다고 생각해.​&n그야, 상대가 약할수록 우리 쪽의 피해가&n줄어드니까.​ 다시는... 다시는 친구들을&n잃지 않을 거야.​ 뭐, 아서가 있으니까&n그럴 일은 없겠지만. 그치?

1001406699.english: Arthur, where should we go for our honeymoon? Tell me anywhere you like. Even a place with Iron Bugs is fine. We can just conquer it and make it our land.
1001406699.korean: 아서, 우리 신혼여행은 어디로 갈까?&n마음에 드는 곳이 있으면 어디든 말해봐.&n철충이 있는 곳이라도 괜찮아.&n점령하고 우리 땅으로 만들면 되니까.

1001406700.english: What I want is war. A war to overwhelmingly trample and ravage the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs) that drove my friends to their deaths. That is why I call myself a warmonger. And that will not change until we win the war against the Iron蟲.
1001406700.korean: 내가 원하는 건 전쟁이야.&n내 친구들을 죽음으로 몰아넣은 철충을&n압도적으로 짓밟고 유린하는 전쟁.&n그게 내가 전쟁광을 자칭하는 이유야.&n그리고 그건 철충과의 전쟁에서&n이길 때까지 변하지 않을 거야.

1001406701.english: Captain Gamma would never agree, but... I think the easier the fight, the better. After all, the weaker the opponent, the less damage we suffer. I won't... never lose friends again. Well, since Arthur is here, that won't happen, right?
1001406701.korean: 감마 대장님은 절대 동의 안 하겠지만...&n난 싸움은 쉬울수록 좋다고 생각해.​&n그야, 상대가 약할수록 우리 쪽의 피해가&n줄어드니까.​ 다시는... 다시는 친구들을&n잃지 않을 거야.​ 뭐, 아서가 있으니까&n그럴 일은 없겠지만. 그치?

1001406702.english: My name is taken from King Arthur and the Knights of the Round Table, but right now we only have King Arthur and Merlin. I guess we'll have to create the rest of the Knights of the Round Table together, right?
1001406702.korean: 내 이름은 아서 왕과 원탁의 기사들에서&n따온 건데, 지금은 아서 왕이랑 멀린밖에 없네.​&n아무래도 나머지 원탁의 기사들은 우리가&n같이 만들어야겠지?

1001406703.english: When I said I wanted to farm, the fairies and elven came running with fire in their eyes... I learned a lot, but... it was scary.
1001406703.korean: 제가 농사를 짓고 싶다고 하니까&n페어리랑 엘븐 분들이 눈에 불을 &n켜고 달려왔어요…&n많이 배우기는 했지만… 무서웠어요.

1001406704.english: "He who does not work shall not eat!" If we think about it the other way around... it becomes, "He who works, eat!" I'll work hard and eat hard!
1001406704.korean: 일하지 않는 자! 먹지도 말라!&n이 말 반대로 생각하면…&n일하는 자! 먹어라! 가 되겠네요?&n열심히 일하고 열심히 먹을게요!

1001406705.english: Butter-grilled, corn salad, corn cheese, corn soup... Ah, Commander! I was giving names to the corn I'm growing right now. Do you have a name in mind, Commander?
1001406705.korean: 버터 구이, 콘 샐러드, 콘 치즈, 콘 스프...&n아, 사령관님! 지금 키우고 있는 옥수수에게&n이름을 붙여주고 있었어요.&n사령관님도 원하시는 이름이 있나요?

1001406706.english: What's hard about farming? Well, there are various things, but for me, pests are the biggest problem. I've worked so hard to cultivate everything, and all that's left is the harvest... but when I see the field in such a mess... I never... forget the resentment I feel regarding food.
1001406706.korean: 농사지을 때 힘든거요? 음, 이런저런 게&n있겠지만 저에겐 유해조수가&n제일 큰 문제에요. 기껏 잘 키워서 수확만&n남았는데… 엉망이 된 밭을 보면…&n먹을 것에 대한 원한은… 결코… 잊지 않아요.

1001406707.english: When I first started farming, I thought harvesting just enough for myself was enough. But now that I'm farming myself, I want to share my produce with others. Hehe, after all, it’s more than I can eat all by myself.
1001406707.korean: 처음에 농사를 지었을 때는 제가 먹을 것만&n수확하면 충분하다고 생각했는데.&n직접 농사를 지으니 저의 결실물을 남에게도&n먹여주고 싶어졌어요. 헤헤, 어차피 혼자 다&n못 먹을 양이니까요.

1001406708.english: Commander, I've always saved the best catch for you. It's not because you're our Commander... but because I... Hehe, anything beyond this is a secret.
1001406708.korean: 사령관님, 제일 좋은 수확물은 언제나 &n사령관님을 위해서 남겨뒀어요.&n사령관님이 우리 사령관님이라서가 아니라…&n제가 사령관님을… 헤헤, 이 이상은 비밀.

1001406709.english: Wait, just a moment! I just got back from work, so I smell of sweat…
1001406709.korean: 자, 잠깐만요! 지금 일하고 와서 땀냄새가…

1001406710.english: I haven't started dairy farming yet…&nbut I do have the knowledge, so I'll teach you one by one, Commander.&nWith my own body.
1001406710.korean: 아직 낙농은 시작 안했는데… &n그래도 지식은 있으니까 사령관님께&n하나하나 가르쳐 드릴게요.&n제 몸으로요.

1001406711.english: There are many things I want to do in the future.&nI want to grow more types of vegetables,&nstart dairy farming, make processed goods…&nand… raise the Commander's child. Hehe. You'll help me a lot, right?
1001406711.korean: 앞으로 하고 싶은 일은 많아요.&n키우는 채소의 종류를 늘리고 싶고,&n낙농도 시작하고 싶고, 가공품도 만들어보고&n싶고… 그리고… 사령관님의 아이도 기르고&n싶고. 헤헤. 많이 도와주실거죠?

1001406712.english: Hmm, this magic looks like it would be hard to do alone... Alright. You, from now on, become my assistant. I won't accept any objections.
1001406712.korean: 흐음, 이 마술은 혼자 하기 힘들겠는데...&n그래. 당신, 이제부터 내 조수가 되도록 해.&n반론은 받지 않겠어.

1001406713.english: I'm not that skilled at magic yet, but I'm studying hard in my own way. Enough to be able to perform some pretty big magic soon. ...When that time comes, maybe I should try performing on stage?
1001406713.korean: 아직 마술에 그렇게 능숙한 건 아니지만,&n나름대로 열심히 공부하고 있어.&n조만간 꽤 큰 마술도 선보일 수 있을 정도로.&n...그 때가 되면 무대에서 공연을 해 볼까?

1001406714.english: I changed Garum's design a bit for the performance. Personally, I quite like the current look as well. It has a more dandy and calm vibe.
1001406714.korean: 공연을 위해 가름의 디자인을 좀 바꿔봤어.&n개인적으로는 지금 모습도 꽤 마음에 들어.&n좀 더 댄디하고 차분한 느낌이라서 말이야.

1001406715.english: Phew... Why does this performance costume keep catching fire? Wasn't there some kind of mistake when it was made? ...You mean it was made exactly as the designer intended?
1001406715.korean: 후우... 이 공연복, 왜 자꾸 불이 붙는 거지?&n옷을 만들 때 뭔가 실수가 있었던 거 아니야?&n...디자이너의 의도대로 잘 만들어진 거라고?

1001406716.english: You ask why I suddenly became a magician? Well... just... it looked fun, so I started it as a hobby. That kid liked magic, too... ...and you told me to take up a hobby.
1001406716.korean: 갑자기 왜 마술사가 된 거냐고? 뭐... 그냥...&n재밌어 보이길래 취미삼아 시작한 거야.&n그 아이가 마술을 좋아하기도 했고...&n...당신이 취미를 가져보라고 말했으니까.

1001406717.english: Since there are times when dangerous magic is performed, the magician and the assistant need to understand each other well. So, let's hold hands for an hour a day so we can easily read each other's minds. ...It's just for magic practice, so don't get the wrong idea, okay?
1001406717.korean: 위험한 마술을 선보일 때도 있으니,&n마술사와 조수는 서로를 잘 이해해야 해. &n그러니 서로의 마음을 쉽게 알아차리기 위해&n하루에 한 시간씩 손을 잡고 있는 걸로 하자.&n...마술 연습을 위한 거니까, 착각하지 마?

1001406718.english: ...Not something weird, I said help me practice magic.

1001406719.english: ...Alright. From now on, we'll practice escape magic.&nYour hands and feet will be bound, leaving you defenseless.&nIn this state… no matter what you do, you won't be able to resist. No matter what, that is.
1001406719.korean: ...좋아. 지금부터 탈출 마술 연습을 할 거야.&n손 발을 묶고 무방비 상태가 되는 거지.&n아무래도 이 상태라면... 당신이 무슨 짓을 해도&n손을 쓸 수가 없겠네. 무슨 짓을 해도, 말이야.

1001406720.english: Here, a gift. I'll give you a specially made card.&nWhy only heart cards?&n…Because… it's a gift for my Nauthiz.&nI-is that a problem?
1001406720.korean: 자, 선물이야. 특수 제작한 카드를 줄게.&n왜 다 하트 카드밖에 없냐고?&n...당신... 내 Nauthiz에게 주는 선물이니까.&n부, 불만 있어?

1001406721.english: This outfit? Hahaha... I heard that you have to be properly dressed to participate in the game... So today, I am Constantia, the Royal Guard.
1001406721.korean: 이 복장요? 아하하하… 게임에 참여하려면&n옷부터 갖춰 입어야 한다고 해서…&n오늘은 근위총병 콘스탄챠입니다.

1001406722.english: Master, just a moment. My collar is a bit crooked here... Yes, it's fine now. I may be a Royal Guard Musketeer, but the maid is open year-round.
1001406722.korean: 주인님, 잠시만요. 여기 옷깃이 삐뚤어져서...&n네, 이제 괜찮아요.&n근위총병이지만 메이드는 연중무휴랍니다.

1001406723.english: I enjoyed playing a game with several people last time, and it sparked my interest in games. Virtual reality games are great, but I also like games like this where multiple people can chat while playing.
1001406723.korean: 지난번에 여러 사람들과 함께 게임을 즐기고&n저도 게임에 관심이 생겼어요.&n가상현실 게임도 좋지만 이렇게 여러 사람이&n대화를 하며 진행하는 게임도 좋네요.

1001406724.english: Griffon and LRL are running late. Would you like to read the rulebook while you wait? Or maybe just the two of us could play a simple game? Either way, it would be fun to be with you, Master.
1001406724.korean: 그리폰이랑 LRL이 늦네요.&n기다리시는 동안 룰북을 읽어보시겠어요?&n아니면 저랑 둘이서 간단하게 게임이라도?&n어느 쪽이든 주인님과 함께이니 즐겁겠네요.

1001406725.english: You're going to join the game too, Master, right? I've prepared an outfit for you as well. Actually… I wanted to wear matching couple outfits… Ah, no. I didn't say anything.
1001406725.korean: 주인님도 게임에 참여하실거죠?&n주인님을 위한 옷도 준비해뒀어요.&n사실… 커플룩으로 하고 싶었는데…&n아, 아뇨. 아무말도 안 했어요.

1001406726.english: Being a Royal Guard means you must always be by your Master's side, right? Staying by your side at all times, helping you, and protecting you even at the cost of your life. Huh? It's no different than usual? Hehe.
1001406726.korean: 근위병이면 언제나 주인님의 곁에 있어야&n한다는 의미겠죠? 어느 때나 주인님 곁에&n머물고, 주인님을 도와드리고,&n목숨을 바쳐서라도 주인님을 지키고.&n어라? 평소랑 다를 게 없네요?  후후.

1001406727.english: M-Master. Please focus on the game.

1001406728.english: Master? Would you like to enjoy another game?&nHehe, then… shall we start a game just for the two of us?
1001406728.korean: 주인님? 다른 게임을… 즐기고 싶으신가요?&n후후, 그러면… 단 둘만의 게임을 시작할까요?

1001406729.english: There have been countless hardships, but thanks to the Master,&nthis period feels more hopeful than ever.&nHow can I express this gratitude with a simple 'thank you'?&nNo matter the hardships, I and everyone will stay with the Master.
1001406729.korean: 수많은 고난이 있었지만 주인님께서 계신&n덕분에 그 어느 때보다 희망찬 시기네요.&n이 고마움을 어떻게 감사하다는 간단한 말로&n끝낼 수 있을까요?&n그 어떤 고난이 있어도 저와 모두는 주인님과&n함께 하겠어요.

1001406730.english: I am the Nine-tailed Snow Priestess, colder than eternal snow. T-Don't say I put too many unique features into this! I just hoped that at least one thing would please you.
1001406730.korean: 만년설보다 차가운 아홉꼬리 설무녀이니라.&n트, 특색을 너무 많이 넣었다고 하지 말거라!&n하나라도 그대의 마음에 들기를&n바랐단 말이다.

1001406731.english: These are clothes I made little by little, squeezing in time from my sleep so you wouldn't know. Do you like them? No, you must. Otherwise, wouldn't it be pointless to get scolded for dozing off during work hours due to lack of sleep?
1001406731.korean: 언니들 몰래 자는 시간을 쪼개서&n틈틈이 만든 옷이니라. &n마음에 드느냐? 아니, 들어야한다.&n안 그러면 수면부족으로 업무시간에&n졸았다가 혼난 보람이 없지 않더냐.

1001406732.english: I cannot take my eyes off the blizzard created by my concubine. If you wish, I will show you as much as you want. ......Just for today. I used so many tuna cans making the clothes that I had no choice but to borrow a hologram machine...
1001406732.korean: 첩이 만들어낸 눈보라에 눈을 못 떼는구나.&n그대가 바란다면 얼마든지 보여주마.&n......오늘 하루까지만 말이다.&n옷을 만드는데 참치캔을 너무 많이 써서&n홀로그램 기기는 빌릴 수밖에 없었느니라...

1001406733.english: Oh my, take my hand. N-it is certainly not because I am cold! I am a Snow Woman right now. It makes no sense for someone like me to be sensitive to the cold! *Sneeze*
1001406733.korean: 그대여, 첩의 손을 잡아주거라.&n겨, 결코 추워서 그런 건 아니다!&n첩은 지금 설녀다. 그런 첩이 추위를 &n타는 건 어불성설이지 않느냐! 에츄.

1001406734.english: The tail is a seal. Sometimes it seems like you like only the tail excessively, rather than the concubine's whole self. Aren't you interested in anything else? Huh?
1001406734.korean: 꼬리는 봉인이다. 가끔보면 그대는 첩의&n전부가 아니라 꼬리만 지나치게 좋아하는&n것 같단 말이다.&n다른 곳에는 관심이 가지 않느냐? 응?

1001406735.english: Why do you gaze at me like that? You say my complexion is too good for a Snow Woman? What kind of obvious nonsense are you talking about? With me by your side, how could my frozen heart not beat?
1001406735.korean: 왜 그리 첩을 바라보는 것이냐?&n첩이 설녀치고는 너무 혈색이 좋다고?&n무슨 당연한 소리를 하고 있는 것이더냐.&n그대 곁에 있는데 얼어붙은 심장이 안 뛰고&n배기겠느냐?

1001406736.english: If you are captivated by the concubine's beauty and dare to lay a hand on her, you will freeze to death.
1001406736.korean: 첩의 미모에 반해 함부로 손을 댔다가는&n얼어붙고 말 것이야.

1001406737.english: Everywhere your hand touches, my frozen body melts.&nWon't you let it melt all over?&nAh, inside as well… that is.
1001406737.korean: 그대의 손길이 닿는 곳마다 첩의 얼어붙은&n몸이 녹아나는구나.&n바라건대 첩의 온몸을 녹여주지 않겠느냐?&n아, 안쪽까지... 말이다.

1001406738.english: I may seem cold, but the flame I carry is hot enough to burn even hellfire.&nIf I were to name this flame…&nI would call it love. The love I feel for you.
1001406738.korean: 첩은 차가워 보이지만 첩이 품은 불꽃은&n지옥불조차 태워버릴 정도로 뜨거우니.&n이 불꽃에 이름을 붙이자면...&n사랑이라 하겠다. 그대를 향한 사랑 말이다.

1001406739.english: I've been getting closely marked by the City Guards lately, so Sister Lilith sent me to the shrine to keep quiet for the time being. The shrine is boring!
1001406739.korean: 요즘 시티 가드한테 집중 마크 당하니까&n리리스 언니가 당분간은 조용히 있으라고&n신사로 보냈어.&n신사는 지루해!

1001406740.english: Lilith initially intended to send me to Kohei. But I guess she didn't like some of Kohei's doctrines. I'm fine with it, though...
1001406740.korean: 리리스 언니가 처음에는 코헤이로&n보내려고 했어. 그런데 코헤이의 어떤 교리가&n마음에 안 들었나봐.&n나는 괜찮은데…

1001406741.english: When I went to the shrine, there was a guy with many tails, a suspicious guy, Hachiko, and some little guy. Then wouldn't it be okay if just one of me wasn't there?
1001406741.korean: 신사에 가니까, 꼬리 많은 애랑, 수상한 애랑,&n하치코랑, 뭔가 조그마한 애가 있었어.&n그러면 나 하나 정도는 없어도 되지 않을까?

1001406742.english: This shrine seems quite different from what I know... They ward off evil and pray for good fortune, but it doesn't feel like they are serving a deity at all. Well... I guess it doesn't really matter?
1001406742.korean: 여기 신사 내가 알고 있는 거랑은 많이 다른&n거 같은데… 액을 쫓고, 복은 빌어도 신을&n모신다는 느낌은 전혀 안 들어.&n뭐… 아무래도 상관 없나?

1001406743.english: Do I look awkward wearing this outfit, Master? When in Rome, do as the Romans do! If you want to hide a tree, hide it in the forest! If you want to seduce you, wear a priestess's robe! Huh? Isn't that right? Hmm? Really?
1001406743.korean: 내가 이 옷을 입고 있는 게 어색해, 주인님?&n로마에 가면 로마 법을 따르라!&n나무를 숨기려면 숲에 숨겨라!&n주인님을 유혹하려면 무녀복을 입어라!&n응? 아니야? 흐응? 진짜아?

1001406744.english: I was secretly grilling meat with Hirume, but I got caught by Shirayuri and got scolded. She said the smell would linger. Hachiko cooked for us with the leftover meat, but surprisingly, Vargr didn't really like eating meat.
1001406744.korean: 히루메랑 같이 몰래 고기 구워 먹다가 &n시라유리한테 걸려서 혼났어. 냄새 밴다고.&n하치코가 남은 고기로 요리 해줬는데,&n바르그는 의외로 고기 잘 못 먹더라.

1001406745.english: Sister Lilith told me to stay still... but if you keep it like this, I can't stay still, Master~
1001406745.korean: 리리스 언니가 얌전히 있으라고 했는데…&n이러면 얌전히 못 있게 되는데, 주인님~

1001406746.english: Master, do you want to do religious activities with me?&nSeed species, let's socialize.&nIf Master wants, I can't refuse.&nLet's work hard on religious activities, Master.
1001406746.korean: 주인님, 나랑 종교활동하고 싶은 거야?&n씨앗 종, 사귈 교.&n주인님이 원하니 어쩔 수 없네.&n우리 열심히 종교활동하자, 주인님.

1001406747.english: Master, welcome! Huh? Isn't it boring these days?&nHmm… not really? Other kids are good too,&nFood is tasty, and City Guard isn't annoying.&nAbove all… Master comes to see us often!&nAh! Hachiko is calling. Let's go, Master!
1001406747.korean: 주인님, 어서와! 응? 요즘은 지루하지 않냐고?&n음… 그다지? 다른 애들도 좋은 애들이고,&n밥도 맛있고, 시티 가드가 귀찮게 안 하고.&n무엇보다도… 주인님이 자주 만나러 오잖아!&n아! 하치코가 부른다. 가자, 주인님!

1001406748.english: When I mentioned that I was taking photos for my wrestler debut, Rena lent me her championship belt. Even though it's a borrowed belt right now, I'm going to take photos later wearing a belt I earned with my own real skills!
1001406748.korean: 레슬러 데뷔 사진을 찍는다고 하니까, &n레나 씨가 챔피언 벨트를 빌려주셨어요.&n비록 지금은 빌린 벨트지만,&n나중에는 진짜 제 실력으로 얻어낸 벨트를&n맨 채로 사진을 찍을 거예요!

1001406749.english: Actually, being a villainous wrestler isn't an easy job. You have to constantly think about things like how to lose in style or how to look even more like a villain.
1001406749.korean: 사실 악역 레슬러도 쉽지 않은 일이에요.&n어떻게 하면 멋지게 패배할 수 있을까,&n어떻게 하면 좀 더 악당같이 보일까...&n이런 고민을 계속 해야 한단 말이죠.

1001406750.english: You ask why "Breaker" is attached to my name? Well, it's because anyone who meets me gets utterly crushed! ...Of course, it's just a concept, a concept!
1001406750.korean: 왜 이름 뒤에 브레이커가 붙었냐고요? 그야,&n절 만난 상대는 철저하게 박살나버리기&n때문이죠! ...물론 어디까지나 컨셉이에요,&n컨셉!

1001406751.english: "Your name is Rena the Champion? Why don't you drop 'The Champion' and just call yourself Rena? You're going to get crushed by me anyway!" ...I'm preparing a taunt like that. Rena won't be offended, right?
1001406751.korean: 이름이 레나 더 챔피언이라고? 더 챔피언을&n떼어버리고, 그냥 레나라고 하는 건 어때?&n어차피 나한테 박살날 텐데 말이야!&n...라는 도발 대사를 준비중인데, 레나 씨가&n기분 나빠하시진 않겠죠?

1001406752.english: Even as a wrestler, you can't skip working out. Building muscle helps prevent injuries and makes learning new techniques easier. So, would you like to do 500 squats together?
1001406752.korean: 레슬러라고 해도 운동을 쉴 수는 없죠.&n근육을 만들면 부상 예방에도 도움이 되고,&n새로운 기술을 배우는 것도 쉬워지니까요.&n그러니까 같이 스쿼트 500개만 하실래요?

1001406753.english: I did get booed a lot by the crowd after becoming a villain wrestler. Haha, but it’s okay. It just means my skills were that great. And... I have the Commander here who always cheers me on and supports me like this.
1001406753.korean: 악역 레슬러가 되고 나서 관중들에게 잔뜩&n야유를 받긴 했죠. 하핫, 그래도 괜찮아요.&n그만큼 제 실력이 뛰어났다는 뜻이니까요.&n그리고... 항상 이렇게 절 응원해주시고&n지지해주시는 사령관님이 계시니까요.

1001406754.english: It's dangerous to do that during technique practice!

1001406755.english: Hmm… Is this a match request, Commander?&nAlright. I'll accept. This arena…&nWill be on the bed.
1001406755.korean: 흐응... 경기 신청인가요, 사령관님?&n좋아요. 받아들일게요. 이번 경기장은...&n침대 위겠네요.

1001406756.english: Tonight, the revenge match of yesterday's game…&nIs it possible? I was knocked out yesterday…&nBut tonight, I will win!
1001406756.korean: 오늘 밤, 어제 경기의 리벤지 매치...&n가능할까요? 어제는 녹아웃 당해버렸지만...&n오늘은 제가 이기고 말 거예요!

1001406757.english: Taylor is always calculating cost-effectiveness, while Audrey insists that beauty is everything... For the best work, isn't a designer's motivation—that is, interest—the most important thing?
1001406757.korean: 테일러 언니는 맨날 경제성을 따지고,&n오드리는 무조건 예쁜 게 최고라고 하고…&n최고의 작품을 위해서는 디자이너의&n모티베이션, 즉 흥미가 제일 중요한 거 아냐?

1001406758.english: 3 points, 2 points, 4 points, 1 point, 1 point, 4 points, 2 points! 2 points! Zero points! Argh! There isn't a single fun piece among these! Why isn't there a single one that gets over 5 out of 10! My standards? Magical Girl Magical Momo Season 1 is… What was that sound just now? What? Censorship for peace?
1001406758.korean: 3점, 2점, 4점, 1점, 1점, 4점, 2점! 2점! 빵점!&n이잇! 여기 작품 중에 재밌는게 없잖아!&n10점 만점에 5점을 넘는 게 왜 하나도 없어!&n내 기준? 마법소녀 매지컬 모모 시즌 1이…&n방금 그 소리 뭐야? 뭐? 평화를 위한 검열?

1001406759.english: Taylor scolded me for speaking without thinking. I definitely thought before I said it... Is it a problem that I told Captain Doombringer I was jealous because he was short, and told the Lieutenant I was jealous because she had small breasts?
1001406759.korean: 테일러 언니한테 생각없이 말하지 말라고&n혼났어. 나는 분명히 생각하고 한 말인데…&n둠브링어 대장에게 키가 작아서, 부관에게&n가슴이 작아서 부럽다고 한 게 문제 있어?

1001406760.english: I'm Olivia. O! Li! Bi! A! If you call me by the rest of my name, I'll make you watch my handpicked list of 100 worst movies. Why do I hate the rest of my name? … … Look up what "Sewer" means.
1001406760.korean: 나는 올리비아야. 올! 리! 비! 아!&n뒤의 이름까지 부르면 내가 엄선한&n망작 100선을 보게 할 거야.&n왜 뒤의 이름을 싫어하냐고?&n……Sewer가 무슨 뜻인지 찾아봐.

1001406761.english: Taylor and Audrey both designed costumes for movies and plays, but they couldn't keep up with me in this field. You know how they say a genius can't beat someone who works hard, and someone who works hard can't beat someone who enjoys what they do? … … though the opposite is true too.
1001406761.korean: 테일러 언니도, 오드리도 영화나 연극 의상을&n디자인했지만 이쪽 분야는 나를 따라오지&n못 했어. 천재는 노력하는 자를 이길 수 없고,&n노력하는 자는 즐기는 자를 이길 수 없다고&n하잖아? ……반대도 마찬가지지만.

1001406762.english: Yesterday was Harpyia, today is Werewolf, tomorrow is Muse, the day after tomorrow is Orangeade, the day after that is Galatea… Ah! It’s so much fun having so many friends in Orca to talk to about the works.
1001406762.korean: 어제는 하르페이아, 오늘은 워울프,&n내일은 뮤즈, 모레는 오렌지에이드,&n글피는 갈라테아… 아! 오르카에는 작품에&n대해서 이야기할 수 있는 친구들이 많아서&n엄청 즐거워.

1001406763.english: 10 points off! If this continues, we're going on strike!

1001406764.english: Wait, wait. This, this kind of emotion is… first time.&nLet… let me enjoy the feeling…&nGently… okay?
1001406764.korean: 자, 잠깐, 잠깐. 이, 이런 감동은 처, 처음이라.&n그… 내가 감동을 만끽할 수 있게…&n살살… 알았지?

1001406765.english: I've designed costumes for plays, musicals, movies, recitals,&nceremonial suits, uniforms, characters from comics and games,&nand many other outfits. Anything that can give me emotion.&nNow… hehe. I want to design your outfit?
1001406765.korean: 나는 연극, 뮤지컬, 영화, 낭송회,&n준공식용 정장, 유니폼, 만화와 게임 캐릭터를&n위한 의상, 그 외에도 많은 의상을&n디자인했어. 나에게 감동을 줄 수 있으면 모두.&n지금은… 후후. 당신의 옷을 디자인하고 싶네?

1001406766.english: Hmm... I was going to sew up any tears in your clothes... but there aren't any to stitch. Well, I guess it can't be helped. Should I embroider it for you? With my name. Hehe.
1001406766.korean: 으음… 옷이 찢어진 부분이 있으면&n꿰매주려고 했는데… 꿰맬 곳이 없잖아.&n뭐. 어쩔 수 없지. 자수라도 놓아줄까?&n내 이름으로. 헤헤.

1001406767.english: Come here. Sit here. And look at me. Hmm... Hmmm... Hehe... Hehe... Yeah. Just... because it makes me happy just to look at you. Because good things never fade or get boring.
1001406767.korean: 여기 와봐. 여기 앉아봐. 그리고 날 봐.&n흐음… 흐응… 후후… 헤헤…&n응. 그냥… 보고만 있어도 좋아서.&n좋은 건 결코 사라지지도&n지루해지지도 않으니까.

1001406768.english: If each person's life were a work of art... my life is a masterpiece. Because you are here. Others' opinions? What does that matter? I'm happy with it.
1001406768.korean: 각자의 생이 하나의 작품이라면…&n나의 생은 걸작이야. 당신이 있으니까.&n남의 평가? 무슨 상관이야? 내가 좋다는데.

1001406769.english: Hmm... three days in a long take... No! Four days! Hehe, and let's not end it here... let's make it into a series.
1001406769.korean: 흐음… 롱테이크로 사흘… 아니! 나흘!&n후후, 그리고 여기서 끝내지 말고…&n연작으로 만들어보자.

1001406770.english: I am AL Phantom, a special operative of Orca, responsible for covert missions such as assassination, facility destruction, and infiltration of enemy lines.&nOnce again, I look forward to your guidance.
1001406770.korean: 암살과 시설 파괴, 적진 잠입 등의 은밀 임무를&n전담하는 오르카의 특급 요원, AL 팬텀입니다.&n다시 한 번 잘 부탁드립니다.

1001406771.english: You wonder why my tone has changed? That is...&nSince I have become a special operative, I wanted to show a more reliable side of myself.&n...Ho, by any chance, did you prefer my previous tone?
1001406771.korean: 말투가 바뀐 이유... 말씀이십니까? 그건...&n특급 요원이 되었으니, 좀 더 믿음직스러운&n모습을 보여드리기 위해서입니다.&n...호, 혹시, 이 전 말투가 더 좋으셨나요?

1001406772.english: To repay Commander for trusting me,&nI approached the mission with a professional attitude.&nHow was it? Did I show you a reliable side?
1001406772.korean: 저를 믿어주신 사령관님께 보답하기 위해,&n프로페셔널한 모습으로 임무에 나가봤습니다.&n어떠셨나요? 저, 믿음직스러운 모습...&n보여드렸나요?

1001406773.english: I am now comfortable talking with familiar people.&nBut talking with unfamiliar people is still a bit...&ndifficult. Nevertheless, I will do my best!
1001406773.korean: 이제 아는 분들과 대화하는 건 익숙해졌어요.&n하지만, 아직 모르는 분들과 대화하는 건 좀...&n힘들더라고요. 그래도 열심히 노력해볼게요!

1001406774.english: I am the special operative Phantom who can carry out any difficult mission.&nSo please reconsider sending Submarine for sandwich deliveries!&nSubmarine still can't handle it!
1001406774.korean: 그 어떤 어려운 임무도 해내는 것이 바로 저,&n특급 요원 팬텀입니다. 그러니, 서브마린에&n샌드위치 심부름을 보내시는 건 재고해주세요!&n아직 서브마린은 힘들단 말이에요!

1001406775.english: If it's not during a mission, I can be more relaxed?&nWhew... Thank you. Honestly, I was already exhausted,&nnot because of the mission, but...&npretending to keep distance from Commander.
1001406775.korean: 임무 중이 아니면 편하게 해도 좋다고요?&n휴우... 감사합니다. 사실, 안 그래도 힘들던&n참이었어요. 임무가 아니라...&n사령관님께 …거리를 두는 척… 하는 거요.

1001406776.english: Ugh, C-Commander, please maintain some decorum.

1001406777.english: Commander, there are many eyes watching...&nreally, understood. Now, come into my cloak&nand continue.
1001406777.korean: 사령관님. 주변에 보는 눈도 많은데...&n정말, 알았어요. 자, 제 망토 안으로 들어와서&n계속하시죠.

1001406778.english: Commander, are you keeping my feelings well?&nCan I check tonight.... is it okay?
1001406778.korean: 사령관님, 제 마음은 잘 간직하고 계신가요?&n오늘 밤, 확인하러 가도.... 괜찮을까요?

1001406779.english: I will do my best to protect the security and justice of Orca alongside Wraith White! Commander... no, Gentleman, please keep an eye on me too!
1001406779.korean: 레이스 화이트와 함께 오르카의 치안과&n정의를 지키기 위해 열심히 노력할게요!&n사령관님... 아니, 젠틀맨도 지켜봐 주세요!

1001406780.english: Phantom Black! And Wraith White! Together, AL Cute! They are righteous magical girls who exterminate evil.
1001406780.korean: 팬텀 블랙! 그리고 레이스 화이트!&n둘이서 AL 큐트!&n악을 섬멸하는 정의로운 마법소녀들이죠.

1001406781.english: Senior Baekto said it was okay for me to shed the apprentice magical girl label now, so I received this outfit. I'm still a little shy about it... but I'll do my best.
1001406781.korean: 백토 선배가 이제 견습 마법소녀 딱지를&n떼어도 좋다고 해서, 이 옷을 받게 되었어요.&n아직 좀 부끄럽지만... 열심히 할게요.

1001406782.english: Moonlight Magical Power... Moonlight Magical Power Up! Ugh, I'm still embarrassed... M-Commander? How long have you been watching?
1001406782.korean: 문 라이트 매지컬 파워...&n문 라이트 매지컬 파워 업!&n으으, 아직 부끄러워...&n사, 사령관님? 언제부터 보고 계셨어요?

1001406783.english: Baekto-senpai, Momo-senpai, and Pokkuru-senpai... everyone is so kind to me. I can't believe I've made so many friends... I'm so glad I became a magical girl...
1001406783.korean: 백토 선배도, 모모 선배도, 뽀끄루 선배도...&n다들 너무 친절하게 대해주세요.&n친구가 이렇게 많이 생기다니...&n마법소녀가 되길 잘 한 것 같아요...

1001406784.english: You ask if I'm embarrassed to be a magical girl? Of course, I was at first. But now, it's okay. Because I know that the Commander... no, the Magical Gentleman... is always cheering for me.
1001406784.korean: 마법소녀가 부끄럽지는 않냐고요?&n물론 처음에는 부끄러웠죠.&n하지만, 이제는 괜찮아요. 사령관님이...&n아니, 매지컬 젠틀맨이 항상 절 응원하고&n있다는 사실을… 알거든요.

1001406785.english: The, the third ritual isn't ready yet!
1001406785.korean: 세, 세 번째 의식은 아직 준비되지 않았어요!

1001406786.english: Now... I think we can proceed with the third ceremony.&nNo, rather... I would like to ask first. Is that okay?
1001406786.korean: 이제는... 세 번째 의식을 진행해도 괜찮을&n것 같아요. 아니, 오히려... 제 쪽에서 먼저&n부탁드리고 싶어요. 그래도... 괜찮을까요?

1001406787.english: From now on, I will call Commander not a gentleman...&nbut my husband.&nWhy? Because now I belong to Commander...&nand Commander belongs to me...
1001406787.korean: 이제는 사령관님을 젠틀맨이 아니라...&n남편이라고 부를 생각이에요.&n왜, 왜냐면... 이제 저는 사령관님 거고...&n사령관님은 제 거니까...

1001406788.english: It is said that a blaring horn leads to defeat; therefore, even while on an outing, one must never take one’s protection lightly, Master. I, KeumRan, will always protect you.
1001406788.korean: 경적필패라 하였으니, 설령&n나들이 도중이라 하여도&n주인님의 호위를 가벼이&n해서는 안 되는 법.&n이 금란이 항상&n지켜드리겠습니다.

1001406789.english: At first, I only planned to prepare a parasol. However, when the designers heard about the parasol, they said they would prepare clothes to go with it.
1001406789.korean: 처음에는 양산만 준비하려&n했습니다. 헌데, 디자이너&n분들께서 양산 이야기를&n들으시더니, 그에 어울리는&n옷을 준비해주신다고 하셔서.

1001406790.english: I have no weapons, but this parasol is enough. ...Just kidding. Actually, I’ve hidden a sword inside the parasol for protection.
1001406790.korean: 무기는 없지만, 이 양산&n하나면 충분합니다.&n...농담입니다.&n사실, 호위를 위해&n양산 안쪽에&n검을 숨겨놓았습니다.

1001406791.english: Master, would you like to go on an outing together on a day as nice as today? The breeze is cool, and the sunlight is warm... I think we can have a wonderful time.
1001406791.korean: 주인님, 오늘처럼 날이&n좋을 때 함께 나들이&n나가지 않으시겠습니까?&n바람은 선선하고, 햇빛도&n따스하니.... 좋은 시간을&n보낼 수 있을 것 같습니다.

1001406792.english: If I block out the sunlight like this, it is nice because I can keep my eyes open even when the sun is bright. ...And I can see my master's face for longer, too. I think I was being a bit silly.
1001406792.korean: 이렇게 햇빛을 가리면,&n해가 밝아도 눈을 뜰 수&n있어 좋습니다.&n...주인님의 얼굴도,&n더 오래 볼 수 있고요.&n조금 주책을 부린 것&n같군요.

1001406793.english: Hirume said... that in some foreign countries, there is a custom of writing a man and a woman's names together under an umbrella. She said that if you do that, your love will come true... Surely, a parasol would have the same effect, right?
1001406793.korean: 히루메가 말하길…&n외국에는 남녀의 이름을&n우산 아래에 같이 써 놓는&n풍습이 있다고 하더군요.&n그러면 사랑이 이루어진다고&n하던데... 양산으로도 분명&n같은 효과를 볼 수 있겠지요?

1001406794.english: Ugh... Ah, it’s not that I’m in pain. It’s just that now that my clothes have changed, Master’s touch feels unfamiliar…
1001406794.korean: 읏... 아, 괴로운 것은&n아닙니다. 그저, 옷이&n달라지자 주인님의 손길이&n낯선 느낌이 되었기에…

1001406795.english: Your touch, Master, has not changed&nbut the sensation feels different…&nIt's refreshing.&nCould you let me feel this freshness a little more...?
1001406795.korean: 주인님의 손길은 변한 것이&n없을 터인데...&n촉감이 달라져서 그런지…&n신선하군요.&n좀 더 이 신선함을 느끼게&n해 주시겠습니까...?

1001406796.english: Come inside the production hall,&nMaster.&nThe sunlight is harsh; I'm afraid it might burn your skin.&nIt's fine to come a bit closer. One step closer…&nAnother step from there...&nClose enough for our bodies to touch...
1001406796.korean: 양산 안으로 들어오시지요,&n주인님.&n햇볕이 따가워 살이 타실까&n두렵습니다.&n조금 더 가까이 오셔도&n괜찮습니다. 한 걸음 더…&n거기서 한 걸음 더...&n몸이 밀착할 정도로 가까이...

1001406797.english: Vice-Captain Sirene seems too busy, so I have decided to help my subordinates by working as a barista at Café Horizon. I look forward to working with you, my Lord.
1001406797.korean: 세이렌 부함장이 너무 바빠 보여서,&n소관이 부하들을 도와 카페 호라이즌의&n바리스타를 하기로 했소.&n잘 부탁드리오, 주군.

1001406798.english: I have perfectly mastered the art of brewing coffee. I have been properly trained by Captain Marie and the other members, so I will never make a mistake.
1001406798.korean: 커피를 내리는 법은 완벽히 숙지하고 있소.&n마리 대장과 다른 대원들에게 제대로&n훈련 받았으니, 결코 실수는 없을 것이오.

1001406799.english: Just as a warrior puts on armor before going to war, I merely donned a cafe uniform to become a barista. Th-that is why I am not ashamed at all. I-it is true...
1001406799.korean: 무인이 전쟁에 나설 적에 갑옷을 입듯이,&n소관도 바리스타가 되기 위해&n카페 유니폼을 입었을 뿐이오.&n그... 그러니 소관은 전혀 부끄럽지 않소.&n정... 정말이오...

1001406800.english: Even though I am the captain of Horizon, aren't I the youngest at the cafe? So when I called Lieutenant Tethys "Senior Tethys," she was absolutely terrified. ...I was a little disappointed.
1001406800.korean: 소관이 호라이즌의 대장이라고 해도&n카페에서는 막내 아니오?&n그래서 테티스 중위에게 '테티스 선배님'&n이라고 불렀더니 아주 기겁을 하더군.&n...조금 섭섭했소.

1001406801.english: I hear there is a special item on the menu at Cafe Horizon. ...Would you perhaps like to order the special item?
1001406801.korean: 카페 호라이즌의 메뉴 중에는&n특별한 메뉴가 있다고 하오.&n...혹시 특별 메뉴를 주문해 볼 생각은 없소?

1001406802.english: I heard that this uniform is meant to seduce my lord. So... what do you think? Does my lord... seem to have been seduced by my clothes? Is his heart... fluttering for me?
1001406802.korean: 이 유니폼은 주군을 유혹하기 위한&n옷이라 들었소. 그래서... 어떻소?&n주군은... 소관의 옷에 유혹당한 것 같소?&n소관에게... 두근대고 계시오?

1001406803.english: Don't... stare at me like that.
1001406803.korean: 너... 너무 그렇게 뚫어져라 바라보진 마시오.

1001406804.english: Th-This is…&nAre you trying to order from the secret menu?&n…If so, please step back for a moment…
1001406804.korean: 이, 이건 그러니까...&n시크릿 메뉴를 주문하려는 것이오?&n...그렇다면, 잠시 저 뒤쪽으로...

1001406805.english: I've prepared morning coffee for you, Sir.&nTake a sip, shake off your sleep, and…&nLet's start the day energetically.&nAnd before I go… a morning kiss as well…
1001406805.korean: 서방님을 위해 모닝 커피를 준비했습니다.&n한 잔 마시고 잠을 털어버린 뒤...&n오늘 하루도 힘차게 시작하시지요.&n그리고, 저... 가기 전에, 모닝 키스도 한 번...

1001406806.english: I asked the other kids how dates work. I heard that dating is a battle... but I couldn't hear the rest of the story because I had to go on an emergency call.
1001406806.korean: 데이트는 어떻게 하는 건지&n다른 애들한테 물어봤어.&n데이트는 전투라는 말까진 들었는데…&n뒤의 이야기는 긴급출동하느라 못 들었어.

1001406807.english: A date is a battle. Battles are dangerous. Therefore, dates are dangerous. So I brought a shield and a shotgun.
1001406807.korean: 데이트는 전투다.&n전투는 위험하다.&n따라서 데이트는 위험하다.&n그래서 방패랑 산탄총 가져왔어.

1001406808.english: The guys in the tech department added various functions to the shields and guns, but the others removed them all. They said it just breaks easily for no reason. I'm smart, so I could use them well...
1001406808.korean: 기술부 애들이 방패랑 총에&n여러가지 기능 달아줬는데.&n다른 애들이 전부 빼버렸어.&n괜히 고장만 쉽게 난다고.&n나는 인텔리해서 잘 쓸 수 있는데…

1001406809.english: Don't stand in front of me. Taking the lead is my job. You want to hold my hand? Hehe, well, I guess I have no choice. Here you go.
1001406809.korean: 내 앞에 서지마. 앞장 서는 건 내 역할이니까.&n나랑 손 잡고 싶다고?&n헤헤, 그러면 어쩔 수 없네. 자.

1001406810.english: Commander, let's eat lunch together over there. Mom's lunch... Ah, no. The Officer of Operations... Ah, no. Ugh, he told me not to say...
1001406810.korean: 사령관, 저기서 같이 도시락 먹자.&n엄마가 도시락… 아, 아니. 작전관님께서…&n아, 아니. 으으, 말하지 말라고 하셨는데…

1001406811.english: Miho recommended a cafe, Bulgasari a clothing store, and Pinto a movie theater. Where do you like? Me? Anywhere as long as I'm with the Commander!
1001406811.korean: 미호는 카페, 불가사리는 옷가게,&n핀토는 영화관을 추천해줬어.&n어디가 좋아?&n나? 사령관과 함께라면 어디든지!

1001406813.english: Eek! D-Don't touch me suddenly…&nWould it be okay if it's not sudden?&n……Yeah.
1001406813.korean: 히익! 가, 갑자기 만지지마…&n갑자기가 아니면 괜찮냐고?&n……응.

1001406814.english: I was nervous since they say a date is like a battle.&nBut it's more enjoyable than I thought.&nWalking, talking, eating with the Commander.&nI guess it's because I'm with the Commander?&nLet's continue to be together from now on!
1001406814.korean: 데이트는 전투라고 해서 많이 긴장했는데.&n생각했던 것보다 즐거워.&n사령관이랑 같이 걷고, 이야기하고, 밥 먹고. &n아마 이건 사령관이랑 함께라서 그런 거겠지?&n앞으로도 계속 함께 있자!

1001406815.english: Collecting honey is Aqua's new mission! I'll gather lots of fresh honey so Master can have a sweet and delicious meal!
1001406815.korean: 꿀을 모으는 게 아쿠아의 새로운 임무야!&n신선한 꿀을 잔뜩 모아서, 주인님이 달콤하고&n맛있는 식사를 할 수 있게 해 줄게!

1001406816.english: Yesterday, I studied flowers with Lise, Daphne, and Dryad. We learned so much, from what honey tastes like to what ingredients it contains... so you can look forward to it!
1001406816.korean: 어제는 리제 언니랑, 다프네 언니랑,&n드리아드 언니랑 같이 꽃에 대해 공부했어.&n꿀은 어떤 맛인지, 어떤 성분이 있는지...&n잔뜩 배웠으니까, 기대해도 좋아!

1001406817.english: Sonia was looking for a good spot to suck up honey before... I wonder if there is some special place where the honey tastes even better? Then, Aqua, I'm going to look for a good spot to suck up honey too!
1001406817.korean: 전에 소니아 언니가 꿀 빨기 좋은 장소를&n찾던데... 꿀이 더 맛있어지는 특별한 곳이&n있기라도 한 걸까?&n그럼, 아쿠아도 꿀 빨기 좋은 곳을 찾아볼래!

1001406818.english: They say bears really love honey! So Friga gave her older sister a bottle of honey, and the next day, there was a huge pile of Elven Milk in front of the room...
1001406818.korean: 곰은 꿀을 엄청 좋아한대!&n그래서 프리가 언니한테 꿀을 한 병 줬는데,&n다음 날 방 앞에 엘븐 밀크가&n잔~뜩 쌓여 있었어...

1001406819.english: Leah keeps the beehive from getting wet, and Titania pretends not to, but she keeps it warm. Aqua really, really loves her sisters!
1001406819.korean: 레아 언니는 벌집이 비를 맞지 않게 해주고,&n티타니아 언니는 아닌 척 하지만, 벌집을&n따뜻하게 유지해주고 있어.&n아쿠아는 언니들이 정말정말 좋아!

1001406820.english: Aqua likes taking care of flowers and raising bees. But isn't all of that possible thanks to Master? That's why Aqua likes Master the most!
1001406820.korean: 아쿠아는 꽃을 돌보는 것도 좋아하고, 벌들을&n키우는 것도 좋아해. 하지만, 그건 전부&n주인님 덕분에 가능한 일이잖아?&n그래서, 아쿠아는 주인님이 제일 좋아!

1001406821.english: Master! It's dangerous! You might get stung by a bee!

1001406822.english: Hehe, Master, do you like Aqua's new outfit too?
1001406822.korean: 헤헤, 주인님도 아쿠아 새 옷이 맘에 들어?

1001406823.english: They say bees should be in warm places. Aqua is a bee right now too, so Master please hold me tight and warm.
1001406823.korean: 꿀벌은 따뜻한 곳에 있어야 한대.&n아쿠아도 지금은 꿀벌이니까,&n주인님이 따뜻하게 꼭 안아줘.

1001406824.english: There is only one thing I want when I go on a date with you, Master. Just as you wish.
1001406824.korean: 주인님과 데이트를 할 때&n바라는 건 하나밖에 없어요.&n주인님께서 바라시는 대로.

1001406825.english: I'm sorry, Master. I've been busy getting rid of pests lately, so I haven't been able to write much of the exchange diary this time. Here... these are the thirty-one volumes I wrote this time.
1001406825.korean: 죄송해요. 주인님.&n최근에 해충을 구제하느라 바빠서&n이번에는 교환일기를 별로 못 썼어요.&n여기… 이번에 쓴 서른한 권이에요.

1001406826.english: Um... Master. So... uh, it's hard to explain... but... may I, may I hold your hand?
1001406826.korean: 저... 주인님. 그러니까…&n마, 말씀드리기 어려운데…&n저기… 소, 손을 잡아도 될까요?

1001406827.english: … …Hah!? Ah, no, I’m fine, Master. I just fainted for a moment because I was so happy.
1001406827.korean: …...핫!?&n아, 아뇨, 괜찮아요, 주인님. &n너무 행복해서 잠시 기절했을 뿐이에요.

1001406828.english: You're saying that if Master comes at 4 o'clock, I'll start being happy from 3 o'clock? No... I'm happy just having Master here.
1001406828.korean: 주인님께서 4시에 오시면, 3시부터&n행복해지기 시작할 거라고요?&n아니에요...&n저는 주인님께서 계신 것만으로도 행복해요.

1001406829.english: Leah gave me clothes, Daphne gave me cosmetics, Dryad gave me perfume, Aqua gave me flowers, and Titania… gave me accessories. The sisters I love second only to my Master styled me.
1001406829.korean: 레아 언니는 옷, 다프네는 화장품,&n드리아드는 향수, 아쿠아는 꽃&n그리고 티타니아… 언니는 액세서리를.&n제가 주인님 다음으로 사랑하는 자매들이&n저를 꾸며줬어요.

1001406830.english: Master... if you do this... ah...

1001406831.english: Master... make it so the children can't read our diary... Please do such a thing.
1001406831.korean: 주인님… 아이들이 우리 일기를 읽지 못할...&n그런 일을 해주세요.

1001406832.english: I wanted to get rid of all the pests lurking around Master. But the more I love Master, the more I try to like the things Master likes...
1001406832.korean: 주인님 주위를 얼쩡거리는 해충들을 모두&n구제해버리고 싶었어요.&n하지만 주인님을 사랑하면 사랑할수록&n주인님께서 좋아하는 것도 좋아… 하려고&n노력하고 있어요.

1001406833.english: Is it surprising that I handle the latest equipment so well? The limitations of innate ability can be overcome with experience and equipment, so I worked hard to learn and master it.
1001406833.korean: 내가 최신 장비를 잘 다루는 게 신기한가?&n선천적인 능력의 한계는 노련함과 장비로&n얼마든지 극복할 수 있으니&n열심히 배우고 익혔다네.

1001406834.english: "It's not underwear, so I'm not ashamed? What are you talking about? Even if it were underwear, I wouldn't be ashamed!"
1001406834.korean: 속옷이 아니니 부끄럽지 않다?&n무슨 소린가?&n속옷이라도 부끄럽지 않다네!

1001406835.english: Did you see the performance by my students? I'm really glad to see they seem to be doing well. Lover lover lover♪ Hehe, aren't they cute?
1001406835.korean: 제자들이 공연을 한 거 봤는가?&n잘 지내는 것 같아 정말로 기쁘군.&n러버러버러버♪ 후후, 귀엽지 않은가?

1001406836.english: Ugh, this is a disaster! I prepared a meal for the soldiers who said they were hungry, and they all suddenly collapsed! Medic!
1001406836.korean: 크, 큰일일세!&n배고프다고 한 대원들에게 식사를 차려줬더니 &n전부 갑자기 쓰러졌다네!&n위생병!

1001406837.english: My attire is an ace's privilege. I was P/A-4 Python, the Black Viper of the Battlefield. You think the title is childish? Well, strictly speaking, the me of the past was.
1001406837.korean: 내 복장은 에이스의 특권이지.&n전장의 검은 독사 P/A-4 피톤이 바로 나였네.&n칭호가 유치하다고?&n어, 엄밀하게 말하자면 이전의 내가 그랬다네.

1001406838.english: I was truly delighted to see that all my students were safe. It must be because I taught them well. I’m joking. Half of it is because my students are outstanding. The other half is thanks to you. Thank you.
1001406838.korean: 제자들이 모두 무사한 것을 보니 참으로 &n기뻤다네. 내가 잘 가르쳤기 때문이겠지.&n농담일세. 반은 제자들이 뛰어나기 때문.&n남은 반은 자네 덕분이겠지. 고맙네.

1001406839.english: If you're hoping for 8+1, wake up from your dream.

1001406840.english: Um... I'm confessing in advance... please don't be disappointed... It, it's my first time... even if I'm clumsy... please understand.
1001406840.korean: 저기… 미리 고백하니…&n실망하지 말아주게나…&n처, 처음이니… 어설퍼도... 이해해주게.

1001406841.english: In my day, I was so busy with battles, performances, unit management, and training that I had no time to blink. So... I know well how remarkable your efforts are. Come here, I'll give you a hug. Good, very good.
1001406841.korean: 나 때는 말일세. 전투와 공연, 부대 관리,&n훈련 등으로 눈코 뜰 새 없이 바빴다네.&n그러니... 자네의 노고가 얼마나 굉장한지&n잘 안다네. 자, 이리 오게, 안아주겠네.&n기특하군, 기특해.

1001406842.english: They say a student surpassing their teacher is a master's greatest joy... but it is a bit lonely not to have seen my students grow. However, do not worry! I have no intention of losing to my students yet! Whether in battle! … … love.
1001406842.korean: 청출어람이 스승에게 가장 큰 기쁨이라지만...&n제자들의 성장을 보지 못해 조금은 쓸쓸하군.&n허나 걱정말게! 제자들에게 질 생각은&n아직 없으니! 전투든! ……사랑이든.

1001406843.english: I have never been without fear of death. Even if memories continue, the me here is a different being from the me of the past… I have ended up telling you such a heavy story because you were here…
1001406843.korean: 죽음이 두렵지 않은 적은 없다네.&n기억이 이어진다 해도 여기 있는 나와&n이전의 나는 다른 존재이니…&n자네 앞이라 무거운 이야기를 해버렸구만…

1001406844.english: You look completely drained of energy today. Did you skip a meal? Even if you have to eat poison, never skip a meal! Wait! I will prepare a table full of food for you!
1001406844.korean: 자네, 오늘따라 영 기운이 없어 보이는군.&n혹시 끼니를 거른 겐가?&n독을 먹더라도 끼니는 거르지 말게!&n기다리게! 내 한 상 가득 차려올 터이니!

1001406845.english: I have honed my skills since my last defeat, so I will not be the first to fall this time. Therefore, today… let us… entangle ourselves like snakes… and spend the time.
1001406845.korean: 일전의 패배 이후 절차탁마하였으니&n이번에는 먼저 쓰러지지 않을 걸세.&n그러니 오늘은… 뱀처럼 얽혀…&n시간을 보내세.

1001406846.english: Master, Daphne alone wasn't enough for you?&nI also came to nurse you.&nWhere does it hurt?
1001406846.korean: 주인님, 다프네 혼자로는 부족하셨죠?&n저도 주인님을 간호하기 위해 왔어요.&n어디가 편찮으신가요?

1001406847.english: Experience in nursing, you ask? Don't worry.&nI've done plenty through Dryads.&nAt least I can tell when something's just a pretended illness.
1001406847.korean: 간호 경력 말씀이신가요? 걱정 마세요.&n드리아드를 통해서 많이 해봤으니까요.&n적어도 뭐가 꾀병인 지는 구분할 줄 알아요.

1001406848.english: What's this red stuff? Heh heh heh... what could it be?&nCome to think of it, the pest that was making your eyes dizzy&nwas injured, wasn't it? Heh heh heh heh heh...&nI put some red medicine on it.
1001406848.korean: 이 붉은 게 뭐냐고요? 후후후... 뭘까요?&n그러고보니 주인님의 눈을 어지럽히는&n해충 하나가 다쳤었죠? 후후후후후후...&n빨간약 발라줬어요.

1001406849.english: Would you like to be nursed by those other pests full of lecherous thoughts?&nOr would you rather be nursed by Lise, who always only thinks of you?&nObviously Lise, right?
1001406849.korean: 음흉한 마음이 가득한 다른 해충들에게&n간호 받고 싶으신가요?&n아니면 언제나 주인님만을 생각하는&n리제에게 간호 받고 싶으신가요?&n당연히 리제죠?

1001406850.english: Answer some questions before the checkup.&nDo you like Lise? Do you like Lise?&nDo you like Lise? Do you like Lise?&nDo you like Lise? Do you like Lise?
1001406850.korean: 검진 전에 질문에 답해주세요.&n리제를 좋아하시나요? 리제를 좋아하시나요?&n리제를 좋아하시나요? 리제를 좋아하시나요?&n리제를 좋아하시나요? 리제를 좋아하시나요?

1001406851.english: It's time for your injection.&nSo please take off your pants.&n...Yes. It's all done. Put them back on.&nMaster? Don't be surprised if I faint.&nHaa...
1001406851.korean: 주사 맞으실 시간이세요.&n그러니 바지를 벗어주세요.&n……네. 다 끝났습니다. 다시 입어주세요.&n주인님? 제가 기절해도 놀라지 말아주세요.&n하아…

1001406852.english: Heh heh heh heh. You like me more, don't you?

1001406853.english: If Master is like this because of me... then I must take responsibility and nurse you.&nLie down on the bed.
1001406853.korean: 주인님께서 저 때문에… 이러면 제가&n책임지고 간호해드릴 수밖에 없겠네요.&n침대에… 누워주세요.

1001406854.english: Why did I lock the door?&nBecause you need to rest.&nWhy did I get into bed?&nTo keep your temperature up.&nWhy did I hold your hand?&nBecause I... love you.
1001406854.korean: 문을 잠근 이유요?&n안정을 취하셔야 하니까요.&n제가 침대에 들어온 이유요?&n체온을 유지해야 하니까요.&n주인님의 손을 잡은 이유요?&n주인님을... 사랑하니까요.

1001406855.english: What is the speed at which swallows fly? It's Mach 100! Huh? You're asking where swallows come from?
1001406855.korean: 제비가 비행하는 속도는? 바로, 마하 100!&n응? 제비의 출신지는 어디냐고?

1001406856.english: Shall we take a drive around Europe as a pre-lunch workout? Want to come along, Commander?
1001406856.korean: 점심 먹기 전에 식전 운동으로 유럽이나&n한 바퀴 돌고 올까? 같이 갈래, 사령관?

1001406857.english: I'm a swallow. I'm not a penguin. Passeriformes, swallow family, swallow genus, swallow. Got it?
1001406857.korean: 난 제비야. 펭귄이 아니라구.&n참새목, 제빗과, 제비속, 제비. 알겠지?

1001406858.english: You say the fastest bird in the world is in the blink of an eye? No way, I'm faster than that! ...Oh wait. I'm not a bird, am I...?
1001406858.korean: 세상에서 제일 빠른 새가 눈 깜짝할 새라고?&n아냐, 난 그것보다 더 빠르다고!&n...아차. 난 새가 아니지...?

1001406859.english: If I were faster, I could finish the work in a flash and spend time with the Commander...
1001406859.korean: 내가 더 빨라지면 일을 순식간에 끝내고&n사령관이랑 시간을 보낼 수 있을 텐데...

1001406860.english: It’s okay if others don’t know who I am or what I’m based on. But the Commander... I really want the Commander to know the real me.
1001406860.korean: 다른 사람들은 내가 누군지, 뭐를 모티브로&n했는지 몰라도 괜찮아. 하지만 사령관은...&n사령관은 꼭 진짜 나를 알아줬으면 좋겠어.

1001406861.english: Mamama... don't just touch me however you want!

1001406862.english: Wa, wait a second… if you go full throttle from the start, I'll burn out too fast…
1001406862.korean: 자, 잠시만... 시작부터 풀 쓰로틀로 달리면&n나 너무 빨리 타버려...

1001406863.english: A swallow may be a migratory bird, but don't worry that I'll leave. I'll always stick close to the Commander.
1001406863.korean: 제비는 철새지만, 내가 떠날까봐 걱정하진 마.&n난 사령관 옆에 꼭 붙어 있을 테니까.

1001406864.english: I am the Empress's hound. I froze my targets and hunted them on the Empress's orders. Why? Are you interested too?
1001406864.korean: 나는 여제님의 사냥개.&n여제님의 명에 따라 목표를 얼리고 사냥했지.&n왜? 너도 관심있어?

1001406865.english: Mom? What do you mean, "mom" to a bioroid? Do I look like I have a child?
1001406865.korean: 엄마? 바이오로이드에게 엄마는 무슨.&n내가 애 딸린 걸로 보여?

1001406866.english: Rain JangHwa? That annoying little brat who's always trying to catch me? He even looks just like me, so it's driving me crazy!
1001406866.korean: 장화? 걸핏하면 날 잡겠다고 설치는&n귀찮은 꼬맹이?&n얼굴도 나랑 비슷해서 짜증나 죽겠다니까?

1001406867.english: Being honest is a good thing, isn't it? So why do people look down on me for being honest? I'm just being honest and true to myself.
1001406867.korean: 솔직한 건 좋은 거잖아.&n그런데 왜 내가 솔직한 건 안 좋게 봐?​&n나는 나에게 솔직하고 충실한 것뿐인데.

1001406868.english: Do you prefer your hair down or tied up? No, it's nothing. I was just curious. I'm telling you, it's true.
1001406868.korean: 당신은 머리 푼 게 좋아? 묶는 게 좋아?​&n아니, 별 거 아냐. 그냥 궁금해져서.&n진짜라니까?

1001406869.english: Clothes? What's wrong with my clothes? You're asking if I'm not embarrassed? What does other people care? I like it. And… you like it. You really do like it, right…? Huh?
1001406869.korean: 옷? 내 옷이 왜? 안 창피하냐고?&n남의 눈이 무슨 상관이야? 내가 좋다는데.&n그리고… 당신이 좋다는데.&n좋은 거 맞지…? 응?

1001406871.english: Hehe, can't hold back? What should I do… I'm the same way. Wait~ I'll go wash. Or… should we wash together?
1001406871.korean: 후후, 못 참겠어?&n이걸 어쩌나… 나도 마찬가진데.&n기다려~ 씻고 올게.&n아니다... 같이 씻을까?

1001406872.english: Honey~. Do you like it when I call you that? Hehe. But I won't be able to say it for long. I'll have to start preparing to say things like ‘so-and-so's dad', right?
1001406872.korean: 여보~. 이렇게 불러주니까 좋아? 후후.&n하지만 이런 말도 오래는 못 들을 거야. &n누구누구 아빠 소리들을 준비해야지?

1001406873.english: I am trying not to get close to the team members on a personal level. It feels like bonding has a negative impact on operational efficiency…
1001406873.korean: 대원들과는 사적으론 친해지지 않으려고&n노력하고 있습니다.&n유대가 작전효율에 악역향을 끼치는 것처럼&n느껴져서…

1001406874.english: I am aware that my weapon does not appear suitable for counter-terrorism operations. I will let the operational results speak for themselves.
1001406874.korean: 제 무기가 대테러작전에 적합하지 않아&n보인다는 것은 알고 있습니다.&n작전 결과로 대답을 대신하겠습니다.

1001406875.english: Are you talking about Hongryeon? I saw her committing acts of destruction while looking just like me. Absolutely not. I cannot tolerate this. I will catch her with my own hands without fail.
1001406875.korean: 홍련 말입니까? 저와 비슷한 외모를 한 채로&n파괴 행위를 일삼는 것을 보았습니다.&n절대로. 용납할 수 없습니다.&n기필코 제 손으로 잡겠습니다.

1001406876.english: Are you asking why we still adhere to uniforms? It is a matter of mindset. Because the extinction of humanity does not mean the loss of order.
1001406876.korean: 아직도 제복을 고수하는 이유 말입니까?&n마음가짐의 문제입니다.&n인류의 멸망이 질서의 상실을&n의미하지 않으니까요.

1001406877.english: Commander, I have devised a new operational plan... would you please review it? May I wait here while you review it?
1001406877.korean: 사령관님. 새로운 작전안을 구상했는데…&n검토해주시겠습니까?&n검토를 하시는 동안…&n여기서 기다려도 되겠습니까?

1001406878.english: I often hear that I seem cold. However… I would like to let you know that I am not like that, Commander.
1001406878.korean: 제가 차가워 보인다는 말은 많이 듣습니다.&n하지만… 사령관님에게만은 그렇지 않다는&n것을 알려드리겠습니다.

1001406880.english: Um… would it be… unpleasant… if I tied you up first?
1001406880.korean: 저… 혹시 묶어놓고 하는 건…&n싫어… 하시나요?

1001406881.english: I love you. I love you. I love you. I love you. I love you. I love you. Ah. I was practicing. Practicing what, you ask? ……Lo… love you. Next time… perfectly…
1001406881.korean: 사랑합니다. 사랑합니다. 사랑합니다.&n사랑합니다. 사랑합니다. 사랑합니다.&n아. 연습 중이었습니다.&n무슨 연습이냐고요?&n……사, 사랑합니다.&n다음에는…완벽하게…

1001406882.english: You ask why I'm suddenly wearing this outfit? It's to infiltrate the Golden Workers. ...It was an unavoidable choice.
1001406882.korean: 내가 갑자기 왜 이런 복장을 입고 있냐고?&n골든 워커즈에 잠입하기 위해서야.&n...어쩔 수 없는 선택이었다고.

1001406883.english: What do we do on site? Mostly blasting. Drilling holes, filling them with explosives, and BANG! It’s not much different from what the Mongoose team used to do.
1001406883.korean: 현장에서 하는 일? 주로 발파작업이지.&n구멍을 뚫고, 그 안에 폭약을 채워서 쾅!&n몽구스 팀에서 하던 거랑 큰 차이 없어.

1001406884.english: I don't know why, but Lumberjane and Tommy Walker keep urging me to officially transfer to the Golden Workers. Am I really that good at my job?
1001406884.korean: 왠지는 모르겠는데, 럼버제인이랑 토미워커가&n자꾸 골든 워커즈에 정식으로&n전입하는 걸 권하더라고.&n내가 그렇게 일을 잘 하나?

1001406885.english: The reason I infiltrated Golden Workers? It's to catch the author of the illegal pornographic novels currently circulating in Orca. I heard he belongs to Golden Workers.
1001406885.korean: 골든 워커즈에 잠입한 이유?&n최근 오르카에서 유통되고 있는&n불법 도색소설의 작가를 잡기 위해서야.&n녀석이 골든 워커즈 소속이라고 하더라고.

1001406886.english: I want to spend time with the Commander, but I guess it would be a bit difficult in this outfit... Huh? You don't really care? Really...?
1001406886.korean: 사령관이랑 같이 시간을 보내고 싶은데,&n아무래도 이 복장으로는 좀 힘들겠지...&n응? 별로 상관 없다고? 정말...?
