1001406887.english: You ask why I've been working so late lately? Well, I was thinking about the Commander and lost track of time... Ah, forget what you just said!
1001406887.korean: 요즘 왜 이렇게 일을 늦게까지 하는 거냐고?&n그게, 사령관 생각을 하고 있다 보니&n시간 가는 줄도 몰라서...&n앗, 방금 한 말은 잊어버려!

1001406888.english: You shouldn't mess around on the job site.

1001406889.english: You're sweaty, are you okay?&n...That's a good thing? Hehe, you pervert.
1001406889.korean: 땀 났는데 괜찮아?&n...그게 좋은 거라고? 흐흣, 이 변태.

1001406890.english: You won't say you're going to go wash now?&nWell... I'm not embarrassed anymore.&nIt's only natural that my man smells like me, right?
1001406890.korean: 이제는 씻고 오겠다는 말 안 한다고?&n그야... 이젠 안 부끄럽거든.&n내 남자한테 내 냄새가 나는 건 당연하잖아?

1001406891.english: You ask where the underwear is? Savior... do you think I, the Judge of the Order, would break the doctrine?
1001406891.korean: 속옷은 어디 있냐고?&n구원자여… 그대는 교단의 심판자인 내가.&n교리를 어길 거라 생각하는가?

1001406892.english: Angel and Veronica told me not to go around dressed like this, but… I am the Sword of the Order and the Savior! How could I easily break my will!
1001406892.korean: 엔젤과 베로니카가 이렇게 입고 돌아다니지&n말라고 했지만…&n나는 교단과 구원자의 검!&n어찌 쉽게 뜻을 꺾겠는가!

1001406893.english: The best thing about this outfit is its comfort, above all else. Why don't you give it a try? Hehe, just kidding. Why the fuss? Did you think I couldn't even crack a joke?
1001406893.korean: 이 옷의 장점은 무엇보다도 편안함에 있지.&n그대도 입어보지 않겠나? 후후, 농담이다.&n왜 그러나? 나는 농담도 못 하는 줄 알았나?

1001406894.english: I have never harbored doubts about the doctrine. At the very least, a judge of the denomination should not. This is because if doubt is mixed with strictness, it loses its value.
1001406894.korean: 교리에 의혹을 품은 적은 없다.&n적어도 교단의 심판자는 그래서는 안 된다.&n엄정함에 의혹이 섞이면&n그 가치를 상실하기 때문이다.

1001406895.english: It seems that more and more people these days are dressing in accordance with the denomination's doctrine. Seeing the teachings of light spreading far and wide fills me with satisfaction.
1001406895.korean: 요즘 교단의 교리에 따라 복장을 갖추는&n이들이 많아지는 것 같다.&n빛의 가르침이 널리 퍼지는 것을 보니&n절로 흡족해지는군.

1001406896.english: I understand that you consecrated this garment. However… I have become dissatisfied with the sacred object you consecrated alone. I hope you will understand the meaning behind this.
1001406896.korean: 이 옷은 그대가 축성했다고 알고 있다.&n하지만… 나는 그대가 축성한 성물만으로는&n만족하지 못하게 되었다.&n무슨 의미인지 그 뜻을 헤아려주길 바란다.

1001406897.english: How could the Judge go against the Savior's will?

1001406898.english: Hehe, actually since the moment you visited the lecture hall...&nI've been looking forward to it.&nSince you granted my wish...&nI too... will grant your desire.
1001406898.korean: 후후, 사실 그대가 교단을 방문했을 때부터…&n기대하고 있었다.&n그대가 나의 뜻을 이루어주었으니…&n나 또한... 그대의 바람을 이루어주겠다.

1001406899.english: Savior, there are many clothes I hope you will consecrate.&nClothes you would likely like.&nDon't you want me to wear those clothes?
1001406899.korean: 구원자여 그대가 축성해주길 바라는 옷이 많다.&n그대가 좋아할 법한 옷들 말이다.&n내가 그 옷들을 입기를 바라지 않나?

1001406900.english: You ask what Cheon-u means? Well, it's short for "Genius Nuuna"... Hahaha. Just kidding. They say it's a name derived from the ox of the sky.
1001406900.korean: 천우가 무슨 뜻이냐고? 그건 바로,&n천재 누우나를 줄여서... 아하하. 농담이야.&n하늘의 소에서 따 온 이름이래.

1001406901.english: Your older sister gets a little... depressed sometimes, you know...? Please don't be too surprised, just... let it be. The Commander is a good younger brother, after all... I'm begging you.
1001406901.korean: 누나가 가끔 좀...우울해질 때가 있거든...?&n너무 놀라지 말고, 그냥... 그러려니 해 줘.&n사령관은 착한 동생이니까... 부탁이야.

1001406902.english: I can't lose to Sekhmet and Cerestia. I'm going to show them clearly that I'm the real older sister... Huh? You're saying those two aren't older sisters... but more like the mom?
1001406902.korean: 세크메트랑 세레스티아한테 질 수는 없지.&n내가 진짜 누나라는 걸 똑똑히 보여주도록...&n어? 그 둘은 누나가 아니라...&n엄마 포지션이라고?

1001406903.english: My sister hates throwing things away... because she's been abandoned before. The entrance to the research facility collapsed and she got trapped, and nobody came to rescue her...
1001406903.korean: 누나는 뭔가를 버리는 게 싫어...&n전에 버려진 경험이 있거든.&n연구시설 입구가 무너져서 갇혀버렸는데,&n아무도 구해주러 오지 않았단 말이야...

1001406904.english: I want to be loved. I don't want to be hated. If I become more useful, if I become stronger... the Commander will love me more...
1001406904.korean: 사랑받고 싶어. 미움받고 싶지 않아.&n좀 더 쓸모있어지면, 좀 더 강해지면...&n사령관이 날 더 사랑해줄거야...

1001406905.english: Commander, how is this Elven Milk? Is it delicious? Is it the best? Hmm... I see. It's tasty, isn't it? Hehe. I'm glad. Huh? You ask why I'm laughing? ...Well, there's a reason.
1001406905.korean: 사령관, 이 엘븐 밀크 어때? 맛있어? 최고야?&n흐응... 그렇구나. 맛있구나? 히힛. 기쁘네.&n응? 왜 웃냐고? ...그런 게 있어.

1001406906.english: Why? Do you want some food? Ahaha.

1001406907.english: Cows are a symbol of fertility and abundance. &nShall we find out why… together?
1001406907.korean: 소는 다산과 풍요의 상징이야.&n왜 그런지... 같이 알아볼까?

1001406908.english: Commander, I'll just quickly change my clothes.&nWith you… no, it's just that…&nAfter wearing the armor for so long, it got a bit damp…
1001406908.korean: 사령관, 잠깐 누나 옷 좀 갈아입고 올게.&n사령관이랑... 아니, 그게...&n갑옷을 입고 오래 있었더니 좀 축축해져서...

1001406909.english: Once a big sister, always a big sister! Not even the oath of a sacred vow can transcend that law! ...That is why you are still my big sister. Understand?
1001406909.korean: 한 번 누나는 영원한 누나!&n신성한 서약의 맹세조차&n그 법칙을 뛰어넘을 수는 없도다!&n...그래서 아직도 누나인거야. 알겠지?

1001406910.english: The reason the gloomy older sister mode isn't showing up these days is that the happiness I feel thanks to the Commander's love outweighs the sadness I feel because of Yoroi.
1001406910.korean: 요즘은 왜 우울한 누나 모드가 안 나오냐면,&n요로이 때문에 우울해지는 것보다&n사령관의 사랑 덕분에 행복해지는 마음이&n더 크기 때문이야.

1001406911.english: Big Sister, you worked really hard. So feel free to praise me as much as you want today! ...Huh? You mean I seem more like a younger sibling than a big sister?
1001406911.korean: 누나, 일 열심히 했어. 그러니까 오늘은&n누나를 마음껏 칭찬해도 좋아!&n...응? 왠지 누나가 아니라 동생 같다고?

1001406912.english: Your older sister likes taking care of kids, too. So... you'll make an effort, right?
1001406912.korean: 누나는 아이들 돌보는 것도 좋아해.&n그러니까... 노력해 줄 거지?

1001406913.english: It's time to sleep now, but…&nThe Commander came to see me, so I can't just let him go.&nWhat's the matter?
1001406913.korean: 이제 잘 시간이지만...&n사령관이 찾아왔는데 그냥 보낼 순 없지.&n무슨 일이야?

1001406914.english: Aren't you embarrassed being in your underwear?&nWell… should I be embarrassed to show off my perfectly maintained body?
1001406914.korean: 속옷 차림이라 부끄럽지 않냐고?&n글쎄, 내 완벽하게 관리된 몸을 보여주는 걸&n부끄러워 해야 하나?

1001406915.english: This is a Command Frame Type B.&nWhat does that mean? …It means it transforms into a bed.&nSleep is important even on the battlefield.
1001406915.korean: 이건 커맨드 프레임 B형태야.&n무슨 말이냐고? ...침대 형태라는 뜻이야.&n야전에선 수면이 중요하거든.

1001406916.english: This doll… is a gift from my sisters.&nSo I hug it to sleep, to keep it safe.&nIt doesn't mean anything else.
1001406916.korean: 이 인형은... 자매들에게 받은 선물이야.&n그러니까, 소중히 하기 위해 안고 자는 거야.&n다른 의미는 없어.

1001406917.english: Ugh… Commander, no, Darling, just 5 more minutes…&nWait, Commander? W-Why are you here?&n…Forget what I just said!
1001406917.korean: 으응... 사령관, 아니, 달링, 5분만 더...&n잠깐, 사령관? 여... 여긴 왜 온 거야?&n...방금 그건 잊어!

1001406918.english: Commander, will you stay by my side until I fall asleep?&nThen I feel like I'll have a pleasant dream.
1001406918.korean: 사령관, 잠들 때까지 내 옆에 있어 줄래?&n그러면 왠지 기분 좋은 꿈을 꿀 것 같거든.

1001406920.english: Good grief… can't be helped.&nThen come inside the blanket.&nBe gentle… I'm asking nicely.
1001406920.korean: 나 참... 못 말려.&n그럼 이불 안으로 들어와.&n상냥하게... 부탁할게.

1001406921.english: Darling, what are you doing? Hurry and get under the blanket…&nYou have to hold your wife tightly.
1001406921.korean: 달링, 뭐 해? 빨리 이불 속으로 들어와서...&n당신 아내를 꼭 안아줘야지.

1001406922.english: In the position of a racing queen&nto shine at Wraith,&nit is only natural that I, with perfect style, am chosen.
1001406922.korean: 레이스를 빛내기 위한 레이싱 퀸의 자리에,&n완벽한 스타일을 가진 내가 선정되는 건&n너무나도 당연한 일이지.

1001406923.english: The Black River Grand Prix was a place&nwhere its affiliated companies showcased their technology.&nSome AGSs also made their first appearance there.
1001406923.korean: 블랙 리버 그랑프리는 산하 회사들이&n기술력을 선보이는 자리였어.&n몇몇 AGS들도 거기서 처음 모습을 드러냈지.

1001406924.english: When the Densetsu Chief of Staff volunteered&nfor the Grid Girl role, I was a bit worried…&nbut surprisingly, he did the job diligently.
1001406924.korean: 덴세츠의 총사대장이 그리드 걸 역할에&n자원했을 때는 걱정을 좀 했는데...&n의외로 성실하게 일을 잘 하더라.

1001406925.english: I've never participated in a motor show before.&nOf course, it's only natural.&nEveryone was probably looking at me, not the cars.
1001406925.korean: 모터쇼에서 활동해 본 적은 없어.&n당연한 일이지. 다들 차가 아니라&n나만 보고 있었을 테니까.

1001406926.english: Later, when the situation improves…&nhow about holding the Orca Grand Prix?&nI think it would be nice to watch the race with my sisters.
1001406926.korean: 나중에, 상황이 좋아지면...&n오르카 그랑프리를 열어보는 건 어떨까?&n자매들과 함께 경주를 보면 좋을 것 같아.

1001406927.english: Since the Grand Prix isn't being held,&nI can't give you a trophy…&nbut the first-place trophy in my heart, I'll give to you, Commander.
1001406927.korean: 그랑프리가 열리지 않는 상황이니, &n트로피는 줄 수 없지만...&n내 마음 속의 1등 트로피는 사령관에게 줄게.

1001406929.english: Ready to do another lap?&nThen, once more… hold me, passionately.
1001406929.korean: 랩 한 바퀴 더 돌 준비 됐어?&n그럼, 다시 한 번... 안아줘, 정열적으로.

1001406930.english: They say the sound of an engine makes a person's heart race,&nbut what makes my heart race even more&nis the loving look in my darling's eyes.
1001406930.korean: 엔진 소리가 사람의 심장을 뛰게 한다지?&n하지만, 그것보다 더 날 두근대게 하는 건&n달링의 사랑이 담긴 눈빛이야.

1001406931.english: Even though winter is over, the fight goes on. This outfit... yeah. Just think of it as another combat uniform.
1001406931.korean: 겨울이 끝났어도, 싸움은 계속되지.&n이 복장은... 그래. 또 다른 전투복 같은&n느낌으로 생각해 줘.

1001406932.english: If the sisters of Valhalla are the body, I am the head. That means neither side can be missing.
1001406932.korean: 발할라의 자매들이 몸이라면, 난 머리야.&n어느 한 쪽이라도 없어선 안 된다는 말이야.

1001406933.english: Keep friends close, and your commander even closer. That's a widely accepted maxim in Orca.
1001406933.korean: 친구는 가까이, 사령관은 더욱 가까이 둬라.&n오르카에서 널리 통용되는 격언이지.

1001406934.english: If you want to handle something, leave it to us. Orca's best troubleshooters are on standby.
1001406934.korean: 뭔가를 처리하고 싶다면 우리에게 맡겨.&n오르카 최고의 해결사들이 대기하고 있으니까.

1001406935.english: Sometimes I feel like the unit members are too intimidated by me. Should I try to be a little more friendly? What do you think, Commander?
1001406935.korean: 가끔 부대원들이 날 너무 어려워 한다는&n생각이 들어.&n조금 더 친근하게 다가가야 할까?&n사령관은 어떻게 생각해?

1001406936.english: Jewels, gold... none of them satisfy me. The one who suits me best by my side... is definitely only the Commander.
1001406936.korean: 보석, 황금... 그 어떤 것도 성에 차지 않아.&n내 옆에 가장 잘 어울리는 건...&n역시 사령관 뿐이야.

1001406938.english: You're the only one I allow this with, Commander.&nSo don't waste this time…&nHurry, hold me tightly.
1001406938.korean: 내가 이런 걸 허락하는 건 사령관 뿐이야.&n그러니까, 이 시간을 헛되이 쓰지 말고...&n빨리, 꼭 안아줘.

1001406939.english: Even though I take on the role of godmother,&nI haven't truly become a mother.&nIt depends on what darling does, though.
1001406939.korean: 내가 대모를 자처하기는 해도,&n진짜 어머니가 된 건 아니야.&n달링이 어떻게 하느냐에 따라 달라지겠지만.

1001406940.english: Being a bodyguard isn't my main job, but that doesn't mean I can do it half-heartedly. I have to always perform the work assigned to me diligently.
1001406940.korean: 보디가드 일이 제 주 업무는 아니지만,&n그렇다고 대충 할 수는 없죠.&n맡은 일은 항상 성실하게 해야 하니까요.

1001406941.english: Preventing attacks isn't the whole story of security. Eliminating risk factors in advance is also important.
1001406941.korean: 공격을 막는 것만이 경호의 전부가&n아니예요. 사전에 위험요소를&n제거하는 것도 중요하죠.

1001406942.english: I tried on a suit following Alvis's lead... and somehow ended up receiving bodyguard training from the Companions.
1001406942.korean: 알비스를 따라 정장을 입어봤는데...&n어쩌다보니 컴패니언 분들께&n보디가드 연수를 받게 되었어요.

1001406943.english: The reason I chose a pink jacket is... I wanted to look cute to the Commander. ...Does that make me unfit to be a bodyguard?
1001406943.korean: 분홍색 자켓을 고른 이유는...&n사령관에게 귀엽게 보이고&n싶어서 그랬어요.&n...보디가드 실격인가요?

1001406944.english: Please make sure to accompany me when you go out on patrol. Are you asking me out on a date? Ah, no! It's for security!
1001406944.korean: 외부 순찰을 나가실 때는 꼭&n저와 함께 동행해 주세요.&n데이트 신청이냐고요?&n아, 아뇨! 경호 때문이에요!

1001406945.english: I must check thoroughly, down to the last speck of dust or thread. Because it is about protecting the Commander... my precious person.
1001406945.korean: 먼지 한 톨, 실 한 가닥까지&n철저하게 체크해야 해요.&n사령관을... 저의 소중한&n사람을 지키는 일이니까요.

1001406947.english: It seems you want close protection…&nSo that nothing&ncan come between us,&nlet's make sure&nwe stay tightly together.
1001406947.korean: 아무래도 밀착 경호를&n원하시는 것 같은데...&n저희 사이에 아무것도&n끼어들 수 없도록,&n꼭 붙어있도록 하죠.

1001406948.english: Are you satisfied with my protection?&nIf so, on the performance review,&nplease press the recommendation button.&nThe recommendation button… is my lips.
1001406948.korean: 제 경호에 만족하셨나요?&n그렇다면, 업무 평가서에&n추천을 눌러주세요.&n추천 버튼은... 제 입술이에요.

1001406949.english: It's morning, Commander! You ask what's with the sudden change? Well, that's how everyone greets in the comics.
1001406949.korean: 아침이야, 사령관!&n갑자기 뭐냐고?&n만화에선 다들 이렇게 인사하더라고.

1001406950.english: Here, since you worked hard, I'll let you pet my tail. ...Sometimes it seems like you like my tail more than me.
1001406950.korean: 자, 열심히 했으니까 꼬리 만지게 해 줄게.&n...가끔은 나보다 내 꼬리를 더 좋아하는 것&n같다니까.

1001406951.english: The childhood friend Hirume from the game, and the real-life Hirume. Which one do you like better?
1001406951.korean: 게임 속의 소꿉친구 히루메랑, 현실의 히루메.&n어느 쪽이 더 좋아?

1001406952.english: Childhood friends are people who are always together and know everything about each other. Doesn't that perfectly describe our relationship?
1001406952.korean: 소꿉친구란 항상 함께 하며,&n서로의 모든 것을 아는 사이.&n딱 우리 사이를 설명하는 말이잖아?

1001406953.english: I joined the band club because I thought I’d do some club activities. ...Why the band club, you ask? To confess my feelings to someone at the festival.
1001406953.korean: 동아리 활동을 할까 해서 밴드부에 들어갔어.&n...왜 하필 밴드부냐고?&n축제에서 누구한테 좋아한다고 고백하려고.

1001406954.english: I learned about school days through comics and games. So, just trust me and follow me! I'll create the perfect school life for you, Commander!
1001406954.korean: 만화랑 게임으로 학창시절에 대해 학습했어.&n그러니까, 나만 믿고 따라와!&n사령관에게 완벽한 학창시절을 만들어줄게!

1001406955.english: Ho, that's something I can't do because my likeability is low!
1001406955.korean: 호, 호감도가 부족해서 할 수 없는 행동이야!

1001406956.english: C-Commander. Now, my affection is high enough,&nthat I could try things I haven't been able to do until now…&nall sorts of things…
1001406956.korean: 사, 사령관. 지금이라면 호감도가 충분해서,&n그 동안 못했던 이런 일이나 저런 일들을&n다 해 볼 수 있는데...

1001406957.english: Hirume in the game, and Hirume in reality…&nthere are many differences, but this one thing never changes.&nThat is, I love you.
1001406957.korean: 게임 속의 히루메와, 현실의 히루메...&n많은 차이가 있지만, 이것 하나는 변함없다.&n바로 그대를 사랑한다는 것이지.

1001406958.english: Commander! How do you like this outfit? Does it look scary? Hehe, LRL won't sneak into the warehouse anymore, right?
1001406958.korean: 사령관님! 이 옷, 어떤가요? 무서워 보이나요?&n후후, 이제 LRL이 창고에 숨어들지 않겠죠?

1001406959.english: If Alvis is the Choco Guard and Vera is the Bodyguard... since I guard the warehouse... am I the Warehouse Guard?
1001406959.korean: 알비스 언니가 초코가드고, 베라 언니가&n보디가드라면… 저는 창고를 지키니까…&n창고가드인 걸까요?

1001406960.english: Commander! You haven't forgotten your promise to conserve resources, have you?
1001406960.korean: 사령관님! 자원을 아껴 쓰기로 약속하신 거,&n잊지 않으셨죠?

1001406961.english: Someday, I will become a cool person like Captain Leona. My goal is to support you by your side and protect the older sisters.
1001406961.korean: 저도 언젠간 레오나 대장님처럼 멋진 사람이&n될 거예요. 대장님을 옆에서 보좌하며,&n언니들을 지키는 게 제 목표에요.

1001406962.english: Alvis is really strange. She's so reliable on the battlefield, but strangely enough, as soon as she comes back to base... Ugh. I don't know what the problem is.
1001406962.korean: 알비스 언니는 참 이상해요. 전장에서는 참&n믿음직한데, 이상하게 기지에만 돌아오면…&n에휴. 뭐가 문제인지 모르겠어요.

1001406963.english: Commander, I tried dressing up like the older sisters... Could I... go on a date with you too?
1001406963.korean: 사령관님, 저도 언니들처럼 꾸며봤는데...&n저도 사령관님과 데이트... 할 수 있을까요?

1001406964.english: Commander, do you like this outfit too?

1001406965.english: Since I'm wearing new clothes,&neverything you've patted so far doesn't count!&nHehe, go ahead and pat me a lot again.
1001406965.korean: 새로운 옷을 입었으니까, 여태까지&n쓰다듬으신 건 무효!&n히힛, 또 잔뜩 쓰다듬어 주세요.

1001406966.english: Here, I've organized today's tasks for you.&nSurprised? Hehe,&nI'm not just good at organizing the storage.
1001406966.korean: 여기, 오늘 하실 일들을 정리해 두었어요.&n놀라셨나요? 헤헷, 창고 정리만 잘 하는 게&n아니라고요.

1001406967.english: As the saying goes, "All things return to their origin." I don't think there is any need to insist on conquering the world through martial arts. I will conquer the world with this racket!
1001406967.korean: 만류귀종이라 했어.&n굳이 무술로 세계 정복을&n고집 할 필요는 없는 거 같아.&n이 라켓으로 세계를 정복해주지!

1001406968.english: The Arsenal captain said that the owner is the best at ball control. Coach! I look forward to working with you starting today!
1001406968.korean: 볼 컨트롤은 주인이 제일 잘한다고&n아스널 대장이 그러더라고.&n코치! 오늘부터 잘 부탁드립니다!

1001406969.english: To hit a powerful serve, you need strict diet management, consistent practice, sufficient rest, and energy accumulation.
1001406969.korean: 강렬한 서브를 위해서는&n철저한 식단관리와 꾸준한 연습,&n충분한 휴식 그리고 기를 모아야 해.

1001406970.english: Watching a lot, practicing a lot, and playing a lot are the secrets to winning. Huh? What am I doing? I'm doing mental training for a championship interview.
1001406970.korean: 많이 관전하고, 많이 연습하고, 많이 경기하는&n것이 우승의 비결입니다.&n응? 뭐하냐고? 우승 인터뷰 상상훈련 중.

1001406971.english: Coach, do you like this outfit? I really hope you do. Otherwise, there's no point in wearing it a bit small on purpose.
1001406971.korean: 코치, 이 옷 마음에 들어?&n마음에 들어야 할 텐데.&n안 그러면 일부러 작게 입은 보람이 없잖아.

1001406972.english: I feel the coach's intense gaze every time I serve... Is it just my imagination? I hope it's not.
1001406972.korean: 서브를 할 때마다&n코치의 강렬한 시선이 느껴지는데...&n기분 탓인가? 기분 탓이 아니면 좋겠는데.

1001406973.english: No lewd acts under the pretext of coaching!

1001406974.english: Huh? Coach.&nYou seem more interested in coaching on the bed than tennis coaching…&nThen… shall we change the playing field?
1001406974.korean: 흐응? 코치. 테니스 코칭보다는…&n침대 위의 코칭에 더 관심이 많아 보이네?&n그러면… 경기장을 바꿔볼까?

1001406975.english: Cultivate yourself, regulate the family, govern the state, and bring peace to the world.&nThere's still a long way to go to become a champion.&nI think I've cultivated myself to some extent…&nSo shouldn't I strive for the family's sake?
1001406975.korean: 수신제가치국평천하라.&n챔피언이 되기 위해선 갈 길이 머네.&n수신은 어느 정도 된 거 같으니…&n제가를 위해서 힘써야 하지 않을까?

1001406976.english: They say marriage is the grave of life. It seems that is no exception for me, either. The white grim reaper vanished... and a white bride stood before Your Excellency.
1001406976.korean: 결혼은 인생의 무덤이라고 하죠.&n그건 저에게도 예외가 아닌가 봅니다.&n하얀 사신은 사라지고...&n하얀 신부가 각하 앞에 섰습니다.

1001406977.english: My sisters... especially Captain Leona, cheered for me. Thanks to their support, I was able to take that final step.
1001406977.korean: 자매들이… 특히나 레오나 대장님께서&n저를 응원해주셨습니다.&n자매들의 응원이 있었기에 마지막 한 걸음을&n내딛을 수 있었습니다.

1001406978.english: When I commissioned the dresses from the designers, they were burning with enthusiasm, saying that it had been a long time since they received an order that required a lot of materials.
1001406978.korean: 디자이너분들께 드레스를 의뢰하니&n오랜만에 재료를 많이 쓰는&n주문이 들어왔다고 의욕을 불태우더군요.

1001406979.english: I wondered if this dress would suit me. However, that concern was not important. What matters is that Your Excellency likes it.
1001406979.korean: 이 드레스가 저에게 어울릴까 고민했습니다.&n그러나 이 고민은 중요하지 않았습니다.&n중요한 건 각하께서 좋아하시는 거니까요.

1001406980.english: Your Excellency. Would you please extend your hand? No, it is not because I am uncomfortable. It is simply because I wanted to feel your warmth.
1001406980.korean: 각하. 손을 내밀어주시겠습니까?&n아뇨, 불편해서 그런 건 아닙니다.&n단지 각하의 체온을 느끼고 싶었으니까요.

1001406981.english: While spending time with Your Excellency, I began to have a dream... and that dream has finally become reality. Thank you, Your Excellency, for making my dream come true.
1001406981.korean: 각하와 함께 지내면서 꿈을 꾸게 되었고…&n꿈은 마침내 현실이 되었습니다.&n감사합니다, 각하. 제 꿈을 이루어주셔서.

1001406982.english: Your Excellency… please wait just a moment. Just a moment.

1001406983.english: Does it really matter… how many times?&nAs long as there is love… between us.&n…Love is… Infinite.
1001406983.korean: 횟수가… 무슨 상관이겠습니까.&n서로를 사랑하는... 마음이 있다면 말입니다.&n……사랑은… 무한입니다.

1001406984.english: Your Excellency.&nThere's a wish I've held onto for a very long time…&nWould you grant it for me?&nI've always wanted to call you this.&n…My love…
1001406984.korean: 각하.&n아주 오래전부터 바랐던 소원이 있는데…&n그 소원을 들어주시겠습니까?&n각하를 이렇게 부르고 싶었습니다.&n……내 사랑…

1001406985.english: Are you talking about this outfit? I heard you haven't been able to sleep at all lately... so I tried it on in case it might be of some help.
1001406985.korean: 이 옷 말씀이신가요?&n요즘 잠을 통 못 주무신다고 들었기에…&n도움이 될 수 있을까 해서… 입어봤어요.

1001406986.english: Sometimes I dream of the past. Dreams of the time when His Excellency the Commander was not here. ...It was a nightmarish time.
1001406986.korean: 가끔은 과거의 꿈을 꾸곤 해요.&n사령관 각하께서 계시지 않았던 때의 꿈을.&n...악몽같은 시절이었죠.

1001406987.english: I cannot put Your Excellency to sleep like magic, but I will stay by your side until you fall asleep.
1001406987.korean: 마법처럼 각하를 재워드릴 수는 없지만,&n각하가 잠드실 때까지 옆에 있어드릴게요.

1001406988.english: What kind of dream did you have today, Commander? Could you tell me about it secretly, just between us?
1001406988.korean: 오늘은 어떤 꿈을 꾸셨나요, 사령관 각하?&n제게만 몰래 이야기 해 주실래요?

1001406989.english: This time I spend with Your Excellency makes me happier than anything else. It is more magical than magic itself.
1001406989.korean: 각하와 함께 보내는 이 시간이&n그 어떤 것보다 절 행복하게 해 줘요.&n마법보다도 더 마법같은 일이죠.

1001406990.english: Are you curious about my ideal type? Someone with eyes like His Excellency, hair color like His Excellency, and a voice like His Excellency. Yes, His Excellency is my ideal type.
1001406990.korean: 제 이상형이 궁금하신가요?&n각하 같은 눈빛에, 각하 같은 머리색,&n그리고 각하 같은 목소리를 가진 사람.&n네, 각하가 바로 제 이상형이랍니다.

1001406992.english: If it is Your Excellency's desire,&nI will gift you a time as blissful as a dream.
1001406992.korean: 각하께서 원하신다면, 꿈처럼 황홀한&n시간을 선사해 드리겠어요.

1001406993.english: Are you curious about the dreams I have?&nHehe… Every night, I dream of a child who resembles you,&nand I kiss them goodnight.&nWill you… make my dream come true, Your Excellency?
1001406993.korean: 제가 꾸는 꿈이 궁금하신가요?&n후후, 저는 매일 밤 각하를 닮은 아이에게&n잘 자라고 입맞추는 꿈을 꾼답니다.&n제 꿈을... 이뤄주실 수 있나요, 각하?

1001406994.english: Descartes Voyager is the surname, and Satgat is the given name. Be careful not to get confused, Commander.
1001406994.korean: 데카르트 보이저가 성이고, 삿갓이 이름일세.&n헷갈리지 않도록 주의하시게, 사령관.

1001406995.english: You mean my ideal type? Hmm, first off, excellent communication skills and a sexy logic circuit... Why are you looking at me like that?
1001406995.korean: 내 이상형 말인가?&n흠, 일단 커뮤니케이션 능력이 뛰어나고&n논리 회로가 섹시한...&n왜 그런 눈으로 바라보나?

1001406996.english: The air is filled with the smell of ozone because of the storm; the weather is really nice. It’s the kind of weather that makes a poem spontaneously come to mind. 1001001… Oh wait, you’re human.
1001406996.korean: 폭풍 때문에 공기에 오존 냄새가 가득한 게,&n날씨가 아주 좋군.&n시구가 저절로 떠오르는 날씨야.&n1001001… 아차, 자네는 인간이었지.

1001406997.english: Hehe, you mean this look? Lady Veronica asked me to help manage the Order, so I decided to become a nun for a while.
1001406997.korean: 후후, 이 모습 말인가요?&n베로니카님께서 교단 관리를 도와달라&n하시기에, 잠시 수녀가 되기로 했답니다.

1001406998.english: In order to get used to the atmosphere of the Order, I will call Your Majesty the Savior while I am wearing this attire.
1001406998.korean: 교단의 분위기에 익숙해지기 위해서,&n이 옷을 입고 있는 동안에는&n폐하를 구원자님이라고 부르도록 하겠습니다.

1001406999.english: Are you curious about what I do at the denomination? I am handling administrative duties in Veronica's place. Veronica said that she would focus on managing the angels.
1001406999.korean: 교단에서 제가 하는 일이 궁금하신가요?&n베로니카님 대신 행정업무를 보고 있답니다.&n베로니카님은… 천사 분들을 집중적으로&n관리하겠다고 하시더군요.

1001407000.english: Even I find it a bit strange. A Cardinal becoming a nun. Though, as long as it pleases the Savior, it doesn't really matter.
1001407000.korean: 제가 생각해도 좀 이상한 상황이네요.&n추기경이 수녀가 되다니.&n구원자님이 보시기에 좋으시다면&n아무래도 상관없는 일이지만요.

1001407001.english: Were you wondering if I am following the laws of the Kohei Order? Hehe, would you like to check for yourself?
1001407001.korean: 제가 코헤이 교단의 율법을 따르고 있는지가&n궁금하셨나요?&n후훗, 직접 확인해보시겠습니까?

1001407002.english: You ask if it has anything to do with Captain Charlotte's clothes? Of course not. Other than the fact that they are clothes meant to seduce the Savior, they have absolutely nothing in common… Ah!
1001407002.korean: 샬럿 총사대장의 옷과 관계가 있냐고요?&n그럴 리가요.&n구원자님을 유혹하기 위한 옷이라는 점,&n그 외에는 아무런 공통점이 없습니다… 앗!

1001407003.english: That is a sacrilegious act, Savior.

1001407004.english: Though it may be a blasphemous act…  &nWell, I can just do it first and repent later. &nYes. Please hold me, Savior.
1001407004.korean: 불경한 행동이지만…&n뭐, 일단 저지르고 회개하면 되겠죠.&n네. 안아주십시오, 구원자님.

1001407005.english: Change the title. Calling His Majesty ‘Savior'  &ndoesn't really feel strange at all. &nAfter all, His Majesty is the one who saved us.
1001407005.korean: 호칭을 바꿔, 폐하를 구원자님이라 불러도&n별로 어색함이 느껴지거나 하진 않습니다.&n폐하께서는 저희를 구원해 주신 분이니까요.

1001407006.english: Hehe, surprised by the sudden maid outfit, aren't you? But this Merlin! I'm telling you, I can wear any outfit for Arthur!
1001407006.korean: 후후, 갑자기 메이드복이라 놀랐지?&n하지만 이 멀린! 아서를 위해서라면&n그 어떤 옷이라도 입어줄 수 있단 말씀!

1001407007.english: She looks like a cute, pretty maid on the outside! But her true identity is an evil arch-villain dreaming of world domination…! That’s the premise. Cool, right?
1001407007.korean: 겉보기에는 귀여운 미소녀 메이드!&n하지만 그 정체는, 세계정복을 꿈꾸는&n사악한 대악당…! 이라는 설정이야. 멋지지?

1001407008.english: It's fine without the cat headband. After all, I'm cuter than a cat! Right? …Right, Arthur?
1001407008.korean: 고양이 머리띠는 없어도 괜찮아.&n그야, 고양이보다 내가 더 귀엽잖아! 그렇지?&n…그렇지, 아서?

1001407009.english: You think I'm the only one at Café Poseidon? No way, Stronghold and Triton are here. Stronghold makes such a great cup of tea!
1001407009.korean: 카페 포세이돈에는 나 하나밖에 없지 않냐고?&n아니야, 스트롱홀드랑 트리톤이 있잖아.&n스트롱홀드가 차를 얼마나 잘 끓이는데!

1001407010.english: Ah, working at a cafe is tough~ I wish someone would give me a tip for all this hard work. The price for the tip is… one kiss?
1001407010.korean: 아, 카페 일 힘들다~&n이렇게 고생하는 나한테 누가 팁이라도&n좀 주면 좋겠네.&n팁 가격은… 뽀뽀 한 번?

1001407011.english: Arthur, how much sugar should I put in your coffee? Huh? As much as I like you? … Oh no. Even if I put in all the sugar in the world, it wouldn't be enough.
1001407011.korean: 아서, 커피에 설탕은 얼마나 넣어줄까?&n응? 아서를 좋아하는 만큼?&n…큰일났네. 이 세상에 있는 설탕을&n전부 넣어도 모자라겠는데?

1001407012.english: Kyaaa~♡ Sir/Madam, touching me while I'm working is difficult~
1001407012.korean: 꺄아~♡ 손님, 업무 중 터치는 곤란해요~

1001407013.english: You've ordered the special menu!  &nIt comes with delicious coffee…  &nand an even more delicious Merlin!  &nPlease enjoy!
1001407013.korean: 스페셜 메뉴를 주문하셨군요!&n맛있는 커피랑…&n더 맛있는 멀린이 나오는 메뉴랍니다!&n맛있게 드셔주세요!

1001407014.english: Welcome, Arthur! Same menu as always, right?  &nYou're saying such a menu doesn't exist? What do you mean?  &nYou're looking at it right now.
1001407014.korean: 어서 와, 아서! 항상 먹던 그 메뉴 맞지?&n그런 메뉴 없다고? 무슨 소리야?&n지금 보고 있으면서.

1001407015.english: I am not an Empressis Hound right now. If I had to give myself a name… I suppose I should be called your personal maid.
1001407015.korean: 지금 저는 엠프레시스 하운드가 아닙니다.&n굳이 이름을 붙이자면…&n주인님만의 메이드라고 해야겠군요.

1001407016.english: Serving the master and providing the best service. That is right. Being a maid… was truly my calling!
1001407016.korean: 주인을 섬기고, 최상의 서비스를 제공한다.&n그렇습니다. 메이드란…&n저의 천직과도 같은 일이었던 겁니다!

1001407017.english: Merlin said that the standard for a maid is, after all, a Victorian maid. Since serving my master must always be done by the book... I have chosen a Victorian maid.
1001407017.korean: 멀린이 말하기를, 메이드의 정석은 역시&n빅토리안 메이드라고 하더군요.&n주인님을 모시는 일은 항상 정석대로 해야&n하기에… 빅토리안 메이드를 선택했습니다.

1001407018.english: Welcome, Master. I have worked hard to clean the cafe to welcome you in the best possible environment. For about fifteen hours…
1001407018.korean: 어서 오십시오, 주인님.&n주인님을 최고의 환경에 모시기 위해&n카페를 열심히 청소해 두었습니다.&n약 열다섯 시간 정도…

1001407019.english: It is my duty to maintain your physical cleanliness as well as your surroundings, Master. I will also take responsibility for attending to your baths. What? You mean I am forbidden from entering the bathroom...?
1001407019.korean: 주인님의 주변 환경 뿐만 아니라,&n몸의 청결도 유지하는 것이 저의 의무.&n목욕 시중 또한 제가 책임지도록 하겠습니다.&n네? 욕실에는 출입 금지라고요…?

1001407020.english: Master, I hear that before the war, there were things called cat cafes. They say it was a place where you could pet cats to your heart's content... ...How about a dog cafe?
1001407020.korean: 주인님, 전쟁 전에는 고양이 카페라는 것이&n있었다고 합니다. 고양이를 잔뜩 쓰다듬을 수&n있는 곳이었다고 하는데…&n...가, 강아지 카페는 어떠십니까?

1001407021.english: Ah, we are still open, Master...

1001407022.english: Our café also…  &nsells a secret special menu  &nthat isn't on the menu board. &nIt's a… a menu called Vargr…  &nW-would you like to try it…?
1001407022.korean: 저희 카페에서는…&n메뉴판에는 없는 비밀스러운 스페셜 메뉴도&n판매하고 있습니다.&n바… 바르그라는 메뉴인데...&n하, 한번 드셔보시지 않겠습니까…?

1001407023.english: They say that in the past, lovers used to tempt each other  &nby inviting them to come over and see their cat. &n…So at our café… w-would you…  &ncome over to see the puppy?
1001407023.korean: 예전에는 연인들끼리 집에 고양이를 보러&n오라는 식으로 서로를 유혹했다고 하는군요.&n…저희 카페에… 가, 강아지 보러…&n오시지 않겠습니까?

1001407024.english: This is my first time trying my hand at Oriental painting. However, thanks to the help of the members from the East, I think I was able to get a good result!
1001407024.korean: 동양화에 도전하는 건 처음이에요.&n하지만 동양 출신의 대원 분들이 많이&n도와주셔서 좋은 결과가 나온 것 같아요!

1001407025.english: Shall I paint your face in the style of an East Asian painting, too? I'm sure it will turn out to be a wonderful piece.
1001407025.korean: 오라버니의 얼굴도 동양화 풍으로 한 번&n그려드릴까요?&n분명 멋진 작품이 나올 거랍니다.

1001407026.english: This outfit was Taylor's idea. He heard that I was practicing Oriental painting, so he came to visit and suggested that I have my clothes made in an Oriental style.
1001407026.korean: 이 옷은 테일러 님의 아이디어였어요.&n제가 동양화를 연습하고 있다는 소식을 듣고&n찾아오셔서 옷도 동양풍으로 맞추는 건&n어떻냐고 하시더라고요.

1001407027.english: You ask if grinding the ink every time is a hassle? No, since even that process is part of the painting, it is a pleasant hassle for me. … And it also gives me more time to see you, big brother.
1001407027.korean: 매번 먹을 가는 게 귀찮지 않냐고요?&n아뇨, 그 과정마저도 그림의 일부이기에,&n제게는 즐거운 귀찮음이랍니다.&n…오라버니를 보는 시간도 더 늘어나고요.

1001407028.english: There's actually a secret to this outfit... Can you guess what it is? You don't know? ... Hehe, this skirt, actually... I drew it.
1001407028.korean: 이 옷에는 사실 비밀이 하나 있는데…&n그게 뭔지 맞춰보실래요? 모르시겠다고요?&n…후훗, 이 치마, 사실… 제가 그린 거예요.

1001407029.english: Do you know the meaning behind the camellia flower? They say it means, "I love you more than anyone." That's just like how I feel for you, Oppa. Hehe...
1001407029.korean: 동백꽃에 담긴 뜻을 알고 계신가요?&n그건 '누구보다도 당신을 사랑합니다' 라는&n뜻이라고 해요.&n오라버니를 향한 제 마음과 같네요. 헤헷…

1001407030.english: Wait a minute, you might get ink on it!

1001407031.english: …Yes, brother. Please dye the paper that is me…&nwith your color.

1001407032.english: The subjects in a painting all have meaning.&nFor example, this crane I painted…&nit carries the meaning that I want to spend a lifetime together with you, brother. Hehe…
1001407032.korean: 그림의 소재들에는 다 뜻이 있답니다.&n예를 들어 제가 그린 이 그림의 학은…&n오라버니랑 제가 백년해로 하고 싶다는&n뜻을 담아 그린 거예요. 헤헷…

1001407033.english: You're saying this is the first time you've seen me this uninhibited? What are you talking about? This is my new battle suit to fully enjoy new pleasures on the battlefield called the bed.
1001407033.korean: 이렇게 풀어진 모습은 처음 본다고?&n무슨 소리야? 이건 침대라는 전장에서&n새로운 쾌락을 최대한 즐기기 위한&n내 새로운 전투복이라고.

1001407034.english: After washing my body with warm water, lying on a soft blanket and feeling the cold air from the air conditioner... it is truly the ultimate pleasure.
1001407034.korean: 따뜻한 물로 몸을 씻은 뒤에,&n푹신한 이불 위에 누워서 맞는&n차가운 에어컨 바람…&n그야말로 극상의 쾌락이야.

1001407035.english: At first, I thought, "What kind of pleasure is there in resting?" But... just lounging around in comfortable clothes turned out to be quite a refreshing pleasure.
1001407035.korean: 처음에는 쉬는 게 무슨 쾌락이냐고 생각했지.&n하지만… 편안한 차림새로 뒹굴대는 것도&n꽤 신선한 쾌락이더라고.

1001407036.english: Want to hang out at the Kohei Order together? The angels there have lots of delicious things. You're asking if it's okay to go out dressed like this? So what? The other kid dresses similarly anyway.
1001407036.korean: 같이 코헤이 교단에나 놀러 갈래?&n거기 천사들한테 맛있는 게 많거든.&n이렇게 입고 밖에 나가도 되냐고? 뭐 어때?&n다른 애도 비슷하게 입고 다니는데.

1001407037.english: One, two... You ask what I'm doing? I'm stretching. If you rest for too long, your body stiffens. Even when you need to rest, shouldn't you maintain the figure you like?
1001407037.korean: 하나, 둘… 지금 뭐 하는 거냐고?&n스트레칭이야. 너무 오래 쉬면 몸이 굳거든.&n쉴땐 쉬더라도, 당신이 좋아하는 몸매를&n유지해야 하지 않겠어?

1001407038.english: I'm thinking of having a pajama party. Just the girls putting on their pajamas, eating delicious food, and having a blast all night long. Oh, you're welcome to come too. In exchange for the food.
1001407038.korean: 파자마 파티라는 걸 해 볼 생각이야.&n여자들끼리 잠옷을 입고 맛있는 걸 먹으면서&n밤새 신나게 노는 거지.&n아, 당신도 와도 괜찮아. 맛있는 거 자격으로.

1001407039.english: I'm a bit tired right now.

1001407040.english: I just washed…&nWell, fine. Working up a sweat once is okay,&nand washing up together with you sounds good too.&nDo whatever you want, as much as you like.
1001407040.korean: 방금 씻었는데…&n뭐, 좋아. 한번 땀 좀 흘리고,&n당신이랑 같이 씻는 것도 좋겠지.&n얼마든지 하고 싶은 대로 해 봐.

1001407041.english: Got any plans for the holiday?&nMe? Yeah, I've got plans. To spend the whole day lazing around in bed with you.
1001407041.korean: 휴일인데 뭐 계획 있어?&n나? 난 계획 있지. 당신이랑 같이 침대에서&n하루종일 뒹굴대는 거.

1001407042.english: Are you referring to my achievements? … … Please ask my subordinate, Panther.
1001407042.korean: 저의 업적 말씀이십니까?&n……저희 부관인 팬서에게 물어보십시오.

1001407043.english: Excessive firepower always requires caution. It can lead to wasted resources or friendly casualties. Therefore, please deploy with caution.
1001407043.korean: 과잉화력은 언제나 주의할 필요가 있습니다.&n물자 낭비 혹은 아군의 피해 문제가&n발생할 수 있습니다.&n그러니 저는 신중히 투입해주십쇼.

1001407044.english: I do not enjoy drinking. What do you intend to do if you get drunk and start working?
1001407044.korean: 술은 즐기지 않습니다.&n술김에 일을 하면 어쩌려고 그러십니까?

1001407045.english: "He who does not work shall not eat... He who does not eat shall not work... I will skip meals for the time being."
1001407045.korean: 일하지 않는 자 먹지도 말라…&n먹지 않는 자 일하지도 말라...&n당분간 결식하겠습니다.

1001407046.english: Isn't it because my subordinates are competent that I am at ease? Panther goes without saying, Io is diligent, Carly is ambitious, and as for Spriggan… … … please give me a moment to think.
1001407046.korean: 부하가 유능하니 제가 편한 거 아니겠습니까.&n팬서는 말할 것도 없고, 이오는 성실하고,&n칼리는 향상심이 강하고, 스프리건은…&n……잠깐 생각할 시간을 주십쇼.

1001407047.english: I do it when I have to. For example, like this, holding the Commander's hand in front of him and… leading him to my room.
1001407047.korean: 저도 할 때는 합니다.&n예를 들어 이렇게 사령관님의 앞에서&n사령관님의 손을 잡고, 사령관님을…&n제 방으로 이끄는 것 말입니다.

1001407048.english: I have been hurt emotionally, so I will take a break for a while.

1001407049.english: Even if I'm excluded from the field for 10 months, that's fine.&n……Honestly, I just… if it's with you, Commander, that's enough.
1001407049.korean: 현장에서 10개월 제외되어도 좋습니다.&n……사실 그냥... 사령관님이라면 좋습니다.

1001407050.english: Commander, you work far too hard.&nPlease take after me and rest a little.&nHere, lie down, relax your body completely,&nand gently… hold me in your arms.
1001407050.korean: 사령관님은 너무 열심히 일하십니다.&n저를 본 받아서 좀 쉬십시오.&n자, 여기에 누우시고, 몸에 힘 쭉 빼시고,&n슬그머니… 저를 안아주십시오.

1001407051.english: You mean how I spend my leisure time? There is nothing special about it. Taking walks, chatting with other team members, reading books... or making love with the Commander like now...
1001407051.korean: 제가 여가를 보내는 방법 말입니까?&n별 거 없습니다. 산책을 하거나 다른 대원과&n대화를 나누거나, 책을 읽거나…&n지금처럼 사령관님과 사랑을 나누거나…

1001407052.english: Didn't someone say that a competent but lazy person is suitable as a supreme commander? So please take a proper rest.
1001407052.korean: 누가 말하지 않았습니까?&n유능하지만 게으른 자가&n최고 지휘관으로 적당하다고.&n그러니 적당히 쉬어주십시오.

1001407053.english: I hate war. I really... hate the dilemma where the harder I work, the more lives are lost. Though, it’s not really something a guy born as a weapon should be saying.
1001407053.korean: 저는 전쟁이 싫습니다.&n제가 열심히 일할수록 더 많은 생명이 &n사라지는 딜레마가 너무… 싫습니다.&n병기로 태어난 녀석이 할 말은 아니지만요.

1001407054.english: Someone mentioned that it would be good to combine the Commander and me and divide the load. Hehe, but we're already doing that, you know?
1001407054.korean: 누가 말하더군요.&n사령관님과 저를 합쳐서 나누면 좋겠다고.&n후후, 이미 하고 있는데 말이죠?

1001407055.english: Recently, I have frequently heard complaints that the training is difficult. While training is inherently meant to be tough, it becomes a problem when it is excessive. I intend to re-examine the training process from the soldiers' perspective.
1001407055.korean: 최근 훈련이 힘들다는 말이 자주 나오더군요.&n훈련은 본래 힘들어야 하지만,&n과하면 문제가 되는 법.&n병사들의 입장에서 훈련 과정을&n재점검하려 합니다.

1001407056.english: This is the first time I am showing you my summer combat uniform. I had kept it in the closet for a while as I participated in training as a commander.
1001407056.korean: 제 하계 전투복을 보여드리는 건 처음이군요.&n그 동안은 지휘관으로서 훈련에 참가했기에&n잠시 옷장에 넣어두고 있었습니다.

1001407057.english: Your Excellency, would you like to train together as well? The soldiers will surely be very happy.
1001407057.korean: 각하께서도 함께 훈련하시겠습니까?&n분명 장병들도 아주 기뻐할 겁니다.

1001407058.english: You think I seem excited for the arrival of summer? I'm not like that at all. What made you think that?
1001407058.korean: 여름을 맞아 기분이 들뜬 것 같다고요?&n저, 전혀 그렇지 않습니다.&n뭘 보고 그렇게 판단하셨죠?

1001407059.english: Just as you paint equipment white in a snowfield, you must use equipment suited to the surrounding environment. … Therefore, it is not strange to have changed the drone into the shape of a beach ball.
1001407059.korean: 설원에서 흰 색으로 장비를 도색하듯,&n주변 환경에 맞는 장비를 사용해야 합니다.&n…그러니, 드론을 비치볼 형태로&n바꾼 것도 이상한 일이 아닌 겁니다.

1001407060.english: This summer feels somehow special. The sky looks bluer than ever, and even the heated sand feels soft. Perhaps… it is because Your Excellency is by my side.
1001407060.korean: 이번 여름은 뭔가 특별한 느낌이군요.&n저 하늘은 어느 때보다 푸르게 느껴지고,&n달아오른 모래도 부드럽기만 합니다.&n아마… 각하께서 곁에 있기 때문이겠죠.

1001407061.english: Your Excellency, before strenuous exercise... you must stretch first.
1001407061.korean: 각하, 격렬한 운동 전에는...&n먼저 스트레칭을 해야 하는 법입니다.

1001407062.english: Have you loosened up enough?&nThen… um… shall we go train our stamina?
1001407062.korean: 몸은 충분히 풀리셨습니까?&n그렇다면… 저… 체력을 단련하러 가시죠.

1001407063.english: Renewing your resolve is very important.&nSo, just like on our first night…&nWould you hold me tight once more?
1001407063.korean: 초심을 되새기는 것은 매우 중요한 일입니다.&n그러니, 저희의 첫날 밤에 그랬듯이…&n다시 한번 저를 뜨겁게 안아주시겠습니까?

1001407064.english: … Why are you looking at me like that? Is it that fascinating that the Queen is working as a nurse?
1001407064.korean: …왜 그런 눈으로 봐?&n여왕이 간호사 일을 하는 게 그렇게 신기해?

1001407065.english: It is the Queen's first time working as a nurse, but there is no need to worry because her skills are undeniable. She learned properly from her sisters.
1001407065.korean: 여왕이 간호사 일을 하는 건 처음이지만,&n실력은 확실하니까 걱정할 필요 없어.&n자매들에게 제대로 배웠으니까.

1001407066.english: … It’s not like I volunteered because Daphne looked busy. I’m just helping out with the nursing work for a bit because I have nothing to do during the summer.
1001407066.korean: …딱히 다프네가 바빠보여서 자원한 건 아냐.&n그냥 여름을 보내는 중에 할 일이 없어서&n간호사 일을 잠깐 돕는 것 뿐이지.

1001407067.english: Are you staying hydrated? If you collapse from heatstroke, the Queen's workload will increase, so make sure to rest properly when it's hot.
1001407067.korean: 수분 보충은 잘 하고 있어?&n열사병으로 쓰러지기라도 하면 여왕의 일이&n많아지니까, 더울 땐 제대로 쉬어.

1001407068.english: You've been asking if the hospital room isn't too hot for a while now? Well, that's because I turned off the air conditioning. Do you really need air conditioning when the Queen is here? ...Well, if it's really that hot, just come closer to the Queen.
1001407068.korean: 아까부터 병실이 너무 더운 거 아니냐고?&n그야 냉방장치를 꺼 놨으니까 그렇지.&n여왕이 있는데 냉방장치가 필요해?&n…뭐, 정 더우면 여왕 가까이 오던가.

1001407069.english: Seeing that you came to see the Queen, are you hurt or something? You said you just came because you wanted to see me? … Then rest on that bed over there before you go. Don't close the curtains. Because… I want to see your face.
1001407069.korean: 여왕을 찾아온 걸 보니 다치기라도 한 거야?&n그냥 보고 싶어서 왔다고?&n…그럼 저쪽 침대에서 쉬다가 가던가.&n커튼은 치지 마. 얼굴… 보고 싶으니까.

1001407070.english: … Don't keep interrupting me during the examination.

1001407071.english: …Because I need to examine you… take off your pants.&nWhat kind of examination?&nOne to see if you can make me forget the Queen's pain…
1001407071.korean: ...검사해야 하니까… 바지 내려.&n무슨 검사냐고?&n여왕의 고통을 잊게 해 줄 수 있는지…&n알아보는 검사야.

1001407072.english: Wait a moment. I need to take off my gloves.&nThe precious time I get to hold your hand…&nI don't want to share it with my gloves.
1001407072.korean: 잠깐 기다려. 장갑을 벗어야 하니까.&n네 손을 잡고 있는 소중한 시간을…&n장갑이랑 나누고 싶지는 않거든.

1001407074.english: You're asking if I'm not working? It's fine, it's fine. I have Olivia and Audrey, after all. It's just one of me... What? You saw Olivia in the audiovisual room?
1001407074.korean: 일 안 하냐고? 괜찮아, 괜찮아.&n올리비아랑 오드리도 있잖아.&n나 하나 정도야… &n뭐? 시청각실에서 올리비아를 봤다고?

1001407075.english: Looking at Orca's designs, most of them are very cost-effective. Some don't even use a single sheet of fabric... That's very desirable!
1001407075.korean: 오르카의 디자인들을 보면&n대부분이 경제성이 뛰어나네.&n어떤 건 천 한 장도 안 들어가기도 하고…&n매우 바람직해!

1001407076.english: Mr. Can't you tell the City Guard to leave me alone? Where did the presumption of innocence and freedom of expression go?
1001407076.korean: 미스터. 시티가드한테&n나 좀 내버려두라고 하면 안 돼?&n무죄 추정의 법칙, 표현의 자유는&n어디 간거야?

1001407077.english: I really like that Orca has a lot of members with model-like physiques. Maybe it's because I'm too short to be a model myself, but seeing members like that makes me feel good too.
1001407077.korean: 오르카에는 모델체형인 대원들이&n많아서 참 좋아.&n내가 모델이 되기에는 키가 작아서 그런가.&n그런 대원들을 보면 나도 기분이 좋아지더라.

1001407078.english: Designers need vacations, too. They say a Taylor who only works and never plays becomes a fool. Lately, I've become a fool who knows only one thing... Guess what it is?
1001407078.korean: 디자이너들도 휴가가 필요해. 놀지 않고&n일만 하는 테일러는 바보가 된다 잖아.&n나도 요즘 하나밖에 모르는 바보가 됐는데…&n그게 뭐게?

1001407079.english: Mr., could you put some sunscreen on me? On the back... on the front... from head to toe... all the way.
1001407079.korean: 미스터, 선크림 좀 발라줄래?&n뒤에도… 앞에도… 머리부터… 발끝까지 전부.

1001407081.english: I'm curious about the structure of this knot.&nIt can't be helped.&nI'll teach you. One by one.
1001407081.korean: 이 매듭이 어떤 구조인지 궁금하구나?&n어쩔 수 없네.&n내가 가르쳐 줄게. 하나. 하나.

1001407082.english: Thank you, Mister. For everything, from start to finish.&nIf it weren't for you, our sisters&nwouldn't have been able to spend such happy times.&nEven Wristcut… everyone.
1001407082.korean: 고마워, 미스터. 하나부터 열까지 전부.&n미스터가 아니었으면 우리 자매들이&n이렇게 행복한 시간을 보낼 수 없었을 거야. &n리스트컷 언니까지… 전부.

1001407083.english: You ask if I'm not working? I am. Preparing for the contest. And Taylor and Audrey are here, too. Just one of me is nothing... What? Taylor said the exact same thing?
1001407083.korean: 일 안 하냐고? 하고 있잖아. 콘테스트 준비.&n그리고 테일러 언니랑 오드리도 있고 말이야.&n나 하나 정도야…&n뭐? 테일러 언니도 똑같은 말을 했다고?

1001407084.english: Are you asking if I matched my outfit with my other sisters? No. No. No. If you look closely, the way it's tied and the details are different. This is a sensitive issue.
1001407084.korean: 다른 자매들이랑 옷 맞춰 입은 거냐고?&n아니지. 아니지. 아니지.&n자세히 보면 묶는 법이랑 디테일이 다르잖아.&n이거 민감한 문제야.

1001407085.english: Why don't you try entering the contest too? Don't worry, you're not alone. There are participants among the AGS.
1001407085.korean: 당신도 콘테스트에 참여 해 보는 게 어때?&n혼자는 아니니까 걱정하지마.&nAGS들 중에 참가자가 있으니까.

1001407086.english: I'm not a contestant, but I'd like to be evaluated by someone. What do you think? Huh? Huh?
1001407086.korean: 난 콘테스트 참가자는 아니지만&n누구 씨에게 평가 받고 싶네.&n어때? 응? 응?

1001407087.english: You need a new swimsuit too, right? Okay, I'll make you the best swimsuit. How about a Taylor-style swimsuit? Isn't it nice?
1001407087.korean: 당신도 새 수영복이 필요하지?&n좋아, 내가 최고의 수영복을 만들어줄게.&n테일러 언니식 수영복은 어때? 좋지?

1001407088.english: Ah, the string is about to come undone. I wish someone would tie it for me. Ah, isn't there anyone around to help? … … You're just pretending not to know, aren't you?
1001407088.korean: 아, 끈이 풀리려고 하네.&n누가 다시 묶어주면 좋겠는데.&n아, 도와줄 사람 어디 없나?&n……일부러 모르는 척 하는거지?

1001407089.english: One warning! Two warnings and automatic elimination!

1001407090.english: Here, I'll hand this collar over to you.&nDon't know what it means?&nThen… you'll have to find out from now on, huh?&nHuh? Mas. ter.?
1001407090.korean: 자, 이 목줄 당신에게 넘겨줄게.&n무슨 의미인지 모르겠어?&n그러면… 지금부터 알아가야겠네?&n응? 주. 인. 님?

1001407091.english: Are you nervous? Alright, take a deep breath.&nInhale, exhale, inhale, exhale.&nFeeling more relaxed now? Then step onto the stage with confidence!&nBecause to me, you've always been a masterpiece!
1001407091.korean: 긴장했어? 자, 심호흡.&n들이마시고, 내쉬고, 들이마시고, 내쉬고.&n긴장 풀었지? 그러면 당당하게 무대에 올라가!&n당신은 언제나 나에게 최고의 명작이었으니까!

1001407092.english: Did you see that earlier? Those little rascals jumped into the water without even warming up! I gently reasoned with them in my own way and told them not to do that.
1001407092.korean: 아까 전에 봤어?&n땅꼬마들이 준비 운동도 없이&n물에 뛰어들더라니까?&n그러지 말라고 내 방식대로 잘 타일러줬지.

1001407093.english: I discussed beauty with Scathy, Mighty R, T.H.N., and Spatoia. As expected, we concluded that a well-trained body exudes ultimate beauty just by itself.
1001407093.korean: 스카디, 마이티R, 티에치엔, 스파토이아와 함께&n아름다움에 대해서 논했지.&n역시 잘 단련된 육체는 그것만으로도&n궁극의 미를 자아낸다는 결론을 내렸어.

1001407094.english: If you're the leader of Pride, don't be so timid! If you like how I look, just say so confidently!
1001407094.korean: 프라이드의 우두머리라면 쭈뼛거리지 말라고! &n내 모습이 마음에 들면 마음에 든다고&n당당하게 말하면 되잖아!

1001407095.english: Now that I'm at the water's edge, I see the entire Pride trying to seduce the Commander. Good. The Pride won't be a problem.
1001407095.korean: 물가에 오니 프라이드 전체가 사령관을 &n유혹하려고 하는 게 보이네.&n좋아. 프라이드는 아무런 문제가 없겠어.

1001407096.english: Do you think you've bound me with these chains? If I set my mind to it, chains like this are nothing... But well... if you like it...
1001407096.korean: 이 쇠사슬로 날 묶어뒀다고 생각해?&n내가 마음만 먹으면 이 정도 쇠사슬 쯤이야…&n하지만 뭐… 당신이 마음에 들어한다면야…

1001407097.english: Just because something is wild doesn't mean it's always violent. On the contrary, being wild can sometimes reveal a softer side. For example… when making love.
1001407097.korean: 야생이라고 언제나 난폭하기만 한 건 아니지.&n오히려 야생이기에 부드러운 모습을&n보여줄 때도 있지.&n예를 들어… 사랑을 나눌 때 말이지.

1001407098.english: You must have been prepared for the consequences when you did it, right?

1001407099.english: Hahahaha! Good! Good!&nSo, Commander, you felt the same way, didn't you? Good.&nI'll show you… the sight of me as a female.
1001407099.korean: 하하하하! 좋아! 좋아!&n사령관도 그럴 기분이 들었다는 거지? 좋아.&n암컷이 된 내 모습을… 사령관에게 보여주겠어.

1001407100.english: The one who tames me is you, Commander.&nAnd the one who awakens my wild instincts is also you.&nWhich side do you prefer right now? Just say the word.&nI'll show you the side you like
1001407100.korean: 나를 길들이는 것도 사령관이고.&n나의 야성을 일깨우는 것도 사령관이지.&n지금은 어느 쪽이 마음에 들어? 말만해.&n사령관이 좋아하는 모습을 보여줄테니까.

1001407101.english: Are you referring to this outfit? It is the summer combat uniform. Steel Line has a summer combat uniform, so why shouldn't the Armored Maiden have one?
1001407101.korean: 이 복장 말씀이십니까? 하계 전투복입니다.​&n스틸라인도 하계 전투복이 있는데,&n아머드 메이든이 없으라는 법이 있습니까?

1001407102.english: Ah, I'm busy. So busy. Isn't resting part of a soldier's job? Every single day is busy.
1001407102.korean: 아, 바쁘다. 바빠.​&n군인은 쉬는 것도 업무의 일환 아닙니까.&n매일 매일이 바쁘군요.

1001407103.english: Are you talking about the things in the bag? Panther said he would bring the sunscreen, pump, tube, mat, and parasol... Well, just to be safe, I packed a little bit of everything.
1001407103.korean: 가방에 들어있는 것들 말씀이십니까?&n선크림, 펌프, 튜브, 돗자리랑 파라솔은&n팬서가 가져온다고 했고…​&n뭐, 유비무환으로 이것저것 챙겨왔습니다.

1001407104.english: My nickname is the beach otter. I am more confident than anyone at lying still on the sand.
1001407104.korean: 제 별명이 모래사장의 해달입니다.&n모래사장에 가만히 누워있는 건&n누구보다 자신 있습니다.

1001407105.english: Our children work very hard on a daily basis, don't they? So shouldn't they rest whenever they can? That is why I am leading by example.
1001407105.korean: 우리 애들 평소에 고생 많이 하지 않습니까.&n그러니 쉴 수 있을 때 쉬어야 하지 않겠습니까.​&n그래서 제가 솔선수범하고 있습니다.

1001407106.english: Would you like to wear a straw hat? Aren't you thirsty? Are you good at swimming? Hehe, since I am with you, Commander, even such ordinary conversation is enjoyable.
1001407106.korean: 밀짚모자 쓰시겠습니까? 목은 안 마르십니까?&n수영은 잘 하십니까?​ 후후, 사령관님과 함께니&n이런 평범한 대화도 즐겁습니다.

1001407107.english: I would do as you say, but please understand that I really don't feel like it.

1001407108.english: My chest got all burned because of the dog tag…&nSee here? I feel like it would heal if you put some saliva on it…
1001407108.korean: 군번줄 때문에 가슴 다 데었습니다…&n여기 보이십니까? 침 바르면 나을 거 같은데…

1001407109.english: Please lie down. I'll apply some sunscreen for you. My hand…&nmight slip to a rather unexpected place, but…&nit won't be an accident, so please understand.
1001407109.korean: 누우십쇼. 선크림 발라드리겠습니다. 손이&n조금 엉뚱한 곳으로 미끄러질 수 있겠지만…​&n실수가 아니니 이해해주십쇼.

1001407110.english: My shield is a bit unique, isn't it? This is the Variable Shield Waverider. It's a shield designed for even more… active protection.
1001407110.korean: 내 방패가 좀 특이하긴 하지?&n이건 가변형 방패 웨이브라이더야.&n보다 더… 능동적인 보호를 위해서&n만들어진 방패지.

1001407111.english: Aias is small and gentle, so she's really cute. She says she's older than me because she was the first model created, but... actually, I want to adopt her as my little sister.
1001407111.korean: 아이아스는 작고 순해서 참 귀여워.&n본인은 자기가 먼저 만들어진 모델이니까&n나보다 언니라고 하지만…&n사실 내 동생 삼고 싶단 말이지.

1001407112.english: You ask why I love fishing so much? Because it satisfies an orca's hunting instinct. … Of course, I miss most of them… but someday, I’m definitely going to catch a big one!
1001407112.korean: 왜 이렇게 낚시를 좋아하냐고?&n범고래의 사냥 본능을 충족시켜 주거든.&n…물론 대부분 놓치긴 하지만…&n언젠간 꼭 월척을 낚고 말거야!

1001407113.english: Free got scolded by her older sister for surfing with a shield. You say she looks strangely happy even though she got scolded? ...There was someone who used to nag me in a similar way back in the day.
1001407113.korean: 방패로 서핑하다가 프리가 언니한테 혼났어&n혼났는데 묘하게 기뻐보인다고?&n...옛날에도 나한테 비슷한 잔소리를 하던&n사람이 있었거든.

1001407114.english: Bodyguards are supposed to hide their emotions, but I seem to have absolutely no talent for that. Why, you ask? Well, you see, whenever I see you, Master, I get so happy that I just can't help but smile...
1001407114.korean: 경호원은 감정을 숨겨야 하는데,&n난 그쪽에는 영 재능이 없는 것 같아.&n왜 그러냐고? 그게 있지, 주인님만 보면&n행복해서 막 웃음이 나오거든…

1001407115.english: The part of my body I'm most proud of? Of course, it's my tail. Because even with weapons in both hands... I can still give my master a tight hug with my tail.
1001407115.korean: 내 몸에서 제일 자랑스러운 부분?&n당연히 내 꼬리야.&n왜냐면, 양 손에 무기를 든 상태로도…&n내 꼬리로 주인님을 꼭 안아줄 수 있잖아.

1001407116.english: Hey, where are you touching! Do you want to get hit by a tail whip? Huh?
1001407116.korean: 어, 어딜 만지는 거야!&n꼬리치기 한번 맞아볼래? 앙?

1001407117.english: My goodness… even if whales are mammals,&nI still haven't produced anything yet?&n…If it's really urgent… just make it appear
1001407117.korean: 나 참… 고래가 포유류기는 해도,&n난 아직 아무것도 안 나오거든?&n…정 아쉬우면 뭐… 나오게 해 주던가.

1001407118.english: Orcas are very fierce animals.&nIf you underestimate them because they look cute,&nI might just gobble you up…&nKyaa! Don't touch my tail
1001407118.korean: 범고래는 굉장히 사나운 동물이라고.&n귀엽게 생겼다고 방심하다간,&n나한테 콱 잡아먹힐지도 몰…&n꺄악! 꼬리 만지지 마!

1001407119.english: The reason killer whales don't attack humans? Well... maybe it's because they're too lovely? Just like you, Master.
1001407119.korean: 범고래가 인간을 공격하지 않는 이유?&n글쎄… 너무 사랑스러워서 그런 게 아닐까?&n주인님처럼 말이지.

1001407120.english: From now on, I am the best fisherman. Because, you know, I caught the coolest, kindest, bravest... and most lovely fish in the world.
1001407120.korean: 이제부터 난 최고의 낚시꾼이야.&n그야, 내가 세상에서 제일 멋있고 자상하고&n용감하고… 사랑스러운 물고기를 잡았으니까.

1001407121.english: The tail is sensitive, so don't touch it carelessly! T-T, especially the part where the tail connects to the back—gently, absolutely, absolutely forbidden from saying "I love you" while rubbing it! Got it?
1001407121.korean: 꼬리는 민감하니까 함부로 만지면 안돼!&n트, 특히 꼬리랑 등이 연결되는 부분을&n부드럽게 문지르면서 사랑한다고 말하는 건&n절대 절대 절대 금지야! 알았지?

1001407122.english: Master, do you know? Orcas are famous for being great at raising their young. Don't you want to see just how good they are?
1001407122.korean: 주인님, 그거 알아? 범고래는 말이야,&n육아를 잘 하기로 소문난 동물이다?&n얼마나 잘 하는지…&n한 번 알아보고 싶지 않아?

1001407123.english: This swimsuit? Ms. Olivia made it for me. She said it looked like fun... Luckily, she gave it to me for free.
1001407123.korean: 이 수영복요?&n올리비아 씨께서 만들어 주셨어요.&n재밌을 것 같다고…&n다행히 공짜로 주셨어요.

1001407124.english: What? An octopus? I don't raise them or anything... Ah! Commander! I caught something for dinner tonight!
1001407124.korean: 네? 문어라뇨?&n기르거나 그러지는 않…&n아! 사령관님! 오늘 저녁거리를 잡았어요!

1001407125.english: I think we could make this swimsuit too... Should we make something similar and sell it after work? Hah! P-Commander! When did you arrive?
1001407125.korean: 이 수영복 우리도 만들 수 있을 거 같은데…&n근무가 끝나고 비슷하게 만들어서 팔아볼까?&n핫! 사, 사령관님! 언제 오셨나요?

1001407126.english: Are you talking about this Bulgasari? I applied glue to the inside and stuck it on... ... ... What were you imagining?
1001407126.korean: 이 불가사리 말씀이세요?&n안쪽에 접착제를 발라서 붙여둔 건데...&n……무슨 상상을 하신 거죠?

1001407127.english: Did you know, Commander? These swimsuit materials... are actually edible. By any chance... aren't you hungry?
1001407127.korean: 그거 아시나요, 사령관님?&n이 수영복 재료들…&n사실 먹을 수 있는 것들입니다.&n혹시… 배고프시지는 않으세요?

1001407128.english: Seeing the Commander having fun with Sia makes me feel proud, but on the other hand… um, so, shall the three of us spend some time together?
1001407128.korean: 사령관님께서 시아랑 같이 즐겁게 지내는&n모습을 보면 뿌듯하면서도 한편으로는…&n그, 그러니 셋이서 함께 시간을 보낼까요?

1001407130.english: It means you liked me, master?&nHehe, then I like you too.&nShall we continue what we couldn't before?
1001407130.korean: 사령관님의 마음에 들었다는 의미죠?&n후후, 그러면 저도 마음에 들어요.&n그럼… 전에 못했던 것을 이어서해볼까요?

1001407131.english: I thought I would never be able to have such a fun time with everyone again.&nBut thanks to the commander being here, I can smile again. Thank you.
1001407131.korean: 모두와 다시는 이렇게 즐거운 시간을 보낼 수&n없을 거라고 생각했어요.&n하지만 사령관님께서 계신 덕분에 다시&n웃을 수 있게 되었어요. 감사합니다.

1001407132.english: Olivia made me a swimsuit! Hehe, I like it because it's easier to put on than my usual clothes. Captain Jeon, do you want to wear one too?
1001407132.korean: 올리비아 언니가 수영복 만들어줬다?&n헤헤, 원래 입던 옷보다 입기 쉬워서 좋아.&n전단장님도 입을래?

1001407133.english: Sia likes the sea! Why? It's cool, it smells like the ocean, and also… um… Ah! It's crab! Crab is delicious too!
1001407133.korean: 시아는 바다가 좋아!&n이유? 시원하고, 바다 냄새가 나고, 또… 응…&n앗! 게다! 게도 맛있어!

1001407134.english: Sia's stomach is rumbling. Are you okay, Commander Jeon? If your stomach is rumbling too, let's eat Sia's lunch together.
1001407134.korean: 시아 배에서 꼬르륵해.&n전단장님은 괜찮아?&n전단장님도 꼬르륵하면 시아 도시락 같이 먹자.

1001407135.english: Ah! Captain Jeon! Warm-up before getting in the water! Galatea said something bad will happen if we don't. Alright, Sia will do it with you.
1001407135.korean: 아! 전단장님! 물에 들어가기 전에 준비운동!&n갈라테아가 안 그러면 큰일 난다고 했어.&n자, 시아가 같이 쭉쭉 해줄게.

1001407136.english: Melite asked Sia if she was happy now. At that moment, Melite looked like she was about to cry, so I gave her a tight hug. And so, Melite smiled brightly, too.
1001407136.korean: 멜리테가 시아에게 이제 행복하냐고 물었어.&n그 때 멜리테가 울 거 같아서 멜리테를&n꼬옥 해줬어.&n그러니까 멜리테도 방긋방긋했다?

1001407137.english: Sia likes MP and Captain Jeon. But when it's just MP and Captain Jeon alone, my chest feels tight right here. … So let's play with Sia too. Okay?
1001407137.korean: 시아는 엠피 언니랑 전단장님이 좋아.&n그런데 엠피 언니랑 전단장님 둘만 있으면&n여기 가슴이 꾸욱해.&n…그러니까 시아랑도 같이 놀자. 응?

1001407138.english: Do you want a Sia Bulgasari?

1001407139.english: MP sister told me to be careful of strange people…&nHehe, but you're the team leader, so it's okay, right?
1001407139.korean: 엠피 언니가 이상한 사람 조심하라고 했는데…&n헤헤, 하지만 전단장님은 전단장님이니까&n괜찮지?

1001407140.english: Team leader. Hehe. Team leader.&nWhy am I calling you?&nHehe. Just because I like you.&nTeam leader. Smile smile.
1001407140.korean: 전단장님. 헤헤. 전단장님.&n왜 부르냐고?&n헤헤. 그냥 좋아서.&n전단장님. 방긋방긋.

1001407141.english: The best and most effective way to save lives is prevention. So, warm up thoroughly! Make sure you rest and have your safety equipment ready! Only swim in designated areas! Got it?
1001407141.korean: 최고이자 최선의 인명구조는 예방이지.&n그러니까 준비운동은 철저히!&n휴식도, 안전 장비도 철저히!&n정해진 곳에서만 물놀이 하기!&n알겠지?

1001407142.english: Tomo gave me shaved ice, Shirayuri gave me energy jelly, and Miho gave me chocolate ice cream. They said I did a good job. Hehe, this is the reward of being a lifeguard.
1001407142.korean: 토모가 빙수, 시라유리가 에너지 젤리,&n미호가 초코 아이스크림 주고 갔어.&n수고한다고.&n헤헤, 이게 라이프가드의 보람이지.

1001407143.english: Haven't you seen Sonia? If you meet her, I won't expect you to act as a lifeguard, but at least tell her not to go swimming after drinking.
1001407143.korean: 소니아 못 봤어?&n걔 만나면 안전요원 역할까지는&n안 바랄테니까 적어도 술 마시고&n물놀이는 하지 말라고 해 줘.

1001407144.english: A hyena set off a giant firework on the beach, Harpe drifted away past a buoy while riding a tube, and Nereid and Galatea... Hehehe, I've just been complaining too much.
1001407144.korean: 하이에나가 해변에서 거대 폭죽을 터트리고,&n하르페가 튜브 타다가 부표 너머로&n떠내려가고, 네레이드랑 갈라테아가…&n에헤헤, 너무 푸념만 했네.

1001407145.english: Does the Commander swim well? If he does, that’s great; if not, I can teach him. Either way, it’s not bad.
1001407145.korean: 사령관은 수영 잘 해?&n잘하면 잘 됐고, 못하면&n내가 가르쳐 주면 되고.&n어느 쪽이든 나쁘지는 않네?

1001407146.english: My skin got completely sunburned from working in the scorching sun all day. I even got some strange marks on my swimsuit and stomach. By any chance… do you want to see? Since you're the Commander… I'm showing you this specially.
1001407146.korean: 종일 땡볕에서 일하니까 살이 다 탔어.&n수영복이랑 배에 이상한 자국도 남았고.&n혹시… 보고 싶어?&n사령관이니까… 특별히 보여주는 거야.

1001407148.english: Out! I may be a lifeguard right now,&nbut did you forget I used to be a city guard?&nIf I just leave this pervert alone, it'll be a disaster…&nTo the showers… follow me…
1001407148.korean: 아웃! 내가 지금은 라이프가드이지만&n원래는 시티가드라는 것을 잊었어?&n이 변태를 그냥 두면 큰일나겠네...&n샤워실로... 따라와…

1001407149.english: Not bored, you ask? Where's the time to be bored?&nThere are so many troublemakers I can't take my eyes off them for a second.&nAnd besides… Watson keeps me company at night.&nA lot. Hehe.
1001407149.korean: 안 지루하냐고? 지루할 틈이 어딨어?&n사고뭉치가 많으니 한시도 눈을 뗄 수가&n없는데. 그리고… 밤에 왓슨이 놀아주잖아.&n많이. 헤헤.

1001407150.english: I... I studied general knowledge really hard! A swimsuit is clothing made of masks or strings. So this isn't a swimsuit, it's everyday wear... What? You're saying it's not?
1001407150.korean: 저, 열심히 상식을 공부했어요!&n수영복은 마스크나 끈으로 만들어진 옷.&n그러니까 이건 수영복이 아니라 일상복…&n네? 아니라고요?

1001407151.english: Why don't the AGSs wear swimsuits? Shouldn't Mr. Stronghold... or Sister Fortress wear swimsuits too?
1001407151.korean: AGS들은 왜 수영복을 입지 않는 건가요?&n스트롱홀드 씨나... 포트리스 언니도&n수영복을 입으셔야 하지 않을까요?

1001407152.english: Are you asking if I'm afraid of water? Ha, of course not! It's just that I'm not in the mood to swim. … I'm telling you, really?
1001407152.korean: 물이 무섭냐고? 하, 그럴 리가!&n그냥 수영을 할 기분이 아닌 것 뿐이다.&n…정말이라니까?

1001407153.english: Whenever I run into Saraqael, he gives me food, saying he’s proud of me for keeping the law... I don’t really know the law, but he seems like a good person.
1001407153.korean: 사라카엘님이랑 마주칠 때마다&n율법을 지키는 모습이 기특하다면서&n먹을 걸 주시는데… 율법은 잘 모르겠지만&n좋은 분이신 것 같아요.

1001407154.english: It’s just a sandcastle right now... but someday, I want to live in a wonderful castle like this with my sisters... and with you, Human.
1001407154.korean: 지금은 모래성일 뿐이지만...&n언젠가는 이런 멋진 성에서 언니들이랑...&n그리고 인간님이랑 같이 살고 싶어요.

1001407155.english: … It would be pointless to hide it any longer. Right, I don't know how to swim. So… you teach me. Hold my hand tightly… so I don't drown.
1001407155.korean: …더 이상 숨기는 것도 무의미하겠지.&n그래, 나는 수영을 할 줄 모른다.&n그러니… 그대가 가르치도록 해라.&n물에 빠지지 않게... 손을 꼭 잡고.

1001407156.english: … Do you want to be buried in the sand?

1001407157.english: Learning to swim is good, but…&nright now I'd rather learn something else.&nLike how to spend joyful time together with you.
1001407157.korean: 수영을 배우는 것도 좋지만…&n지금은 다른 것이 배우고 싶구나. &n그대와 함께 즐거운 시간을&n보내는 법 말이다.

1001407158.english: H-human! Please, come here for a moment!&nThere's something missing that's absolutely necessary for summer vacation…!&nAnd that is… got you! It's you, human. Hehe…
1001407158.korean: 이, 인간님! 잠깐만 이리 와 주세요!&n여름 휴가에 꼭 필요한 게 하나 빠졌어요…!&n그건 바로… 잡았다! 인간님이에요. 헤헤...

1001407159.english: Yap! Superhero Pinto!&nNot a special forces operative, you say?&nEh, it's basically the same thing.
1001407159.korean: 얍! 슈퍼 히어로 핀토야!&n특수 작전대 아니냐고?&n에이. 하는 일은 똑같잖아.

1001407160.english: Distraction, provocation, suppression, subjugation, and retribution!&nIf it's about punishing villains, leave it all to me!&nI'll show results beyond what Commander expects!
1001407160.korean: 교란, 도발, 견제, 제압 그리고 응징!&n악당을 혼내는 일이라면 무엇이든 맡겨줘!&n사령관이 기대한 것 이상의 활약을 보여줄게!

1001407161.english: A hero does need a sidekick, after all…&nBut Mom's Mom, Bulgasari is too slow, Miho asks for too much, and Draco is…&nYeah. Draco's nice. He's nice…
1001407161.korean: 히어로에게는 역시나 사이드킥이 필요한데…&n엄마는 엄마고, 불가사리는 느리고, 미호는 &n바라는 게 너무 많고, 드라코는…&n응. 드라코는 착하지... 착해.

1001407162.english: Not long ago I had a talk with Peregrinus about justice.&nEven comrades with the same goal can each have different ideas of justice.
1001407162.korean: 얼마 전에 페레그리누스랑&n정의에 대해서 이야기했어.&n같은 목표를 가진 동료라도&n각자의 정의관은 다를 수 있더라.

1001407163.english: Allies are good, enemies are evil.&nI know my sense of justice is narrow.&nBut even if I stray down the wrong path,&nthere are people beside me who'll set me straight. Right?
1001407163.korean: 아군은 선, 적은 악.&n내 정의관이 편협하다는 것은 알고 있어.&n하지만 내가 잘못된 길을 가도 바로 잡아줄&n사람들이 옆에 있잖아. 안 그래?

1001407164.english: Commander, how about going on patrol to uphold justice?&nWe could look at clothes, go to the movies, eat something tasty.&nLike a date, you say? Ehehe, two birds with one stone.
1001407164.korean: 사령관, 정의를 실현하기 위해서 &n순찰하러 가지 않을래?&n옷도 보고, 영화관도 가고, 맛있는 것도 먹고.&n데이트 같다고? 에헤헤, 겸사겸사.

1001407165.english: So here's where the villain was hiding?

1001407166.english: Doing this in a public place isn't right…&nSo…&nlet's continue in my room…
1001407166.korean: 공공장소에서 이러는 거 바람직하지 못해…&n그러니까…&n내 방에서 마저하자…

1001407167.english: Commander, want to go do something just?&nWe could punish some villains,&nteach others what justice really means.&nOr else…&nwe could make love in my room.
1001407167.korean: 사령관 정의로운 일 하러가지 않을래?&n악당을 혼내주러 가도 되고,&n다른 사람들에게 정의란 무엇인지&n가르쳐줘도 되고. 아니면…&n내 방에서 사랑을 해도 되고.

1001407168.english: This unit is designed as a six-legged walking type, allowing it to operate freely even in urban warfare situations where it is difficult for tanks to enter.
1001407168.korean: 본 유닛은 6족 보행형으로 설계되어 있어,&n전차가 진입하기 힘든 시가전 상황에서도&n자유롭게 활동이 가능합니다.

1001407169.english: This unit supports the use of various types of ammunition. It can be equipped with non-lethal electric shock rounds, demonstrating excellent effectiveness in riot control.
1001407169.korean: 본 유닛은 다양한 탄종 사용을 지원합니다.&n비살상용 전기충격 탄환을 장착할 수 있어,&n시위 진압에도 탁월한 효과를&n보였습니다.

1001407170.english: There is not much that can block a Pike Railgun equipped with a Smart Destruction System.
1001407170.korean: 스마트 디스트럭션 시스템이 적용된&n파이크 레일건을 막을 수 있는 것은&n별로 존재하지 않습니다.

1001407171.english: It was a daily routine to visit the luxury swimming pool not as a user, but to provide security or conduct investigations…
1001407171.korean: 고급 수영장은 이용객이 아니라&n경비를 보거나 수사를 위해서 방문하는 게&n일상이었는데…

1001407172.english: I'm off today. If you want me to do work, bring me something equivalent. What? A criminal showed up? Then I can't just sit still.
1001407172.korean: 나 오늘은 비번이야.&n일 시키려면 그에 상응하는 것을 가져와.&n뭐? 범죄자가 나타났다고?&n그러면 가만히 있을 수 없지.

1001407173.english: These handcuffs? It’s an occupational hazard. It feels a bit lacking when you don’t have them when you need them. It’s kind of a hobby of mine, too. Hehe.
1001407173.korean: 이 수갑?&n직업병이지. 필요할 때 없으면 아쉽잖아.&n취미이기도 하고. 후후.

1001407174.english: It's going to be hard to say a word to Sonia. Swimming while having a drink... I wonder if it'll be okay since you're here?
1001407174.korean: 소니아한테 한소리 하기 힘들겠네.&n수영장에서 술 한 잔 기울이면서&n수영을 하다니...&n당신이 있으니 괜찮으려나?

1001407175.english: Resting in a place like this isn't my style... It makes me look like a corrupt cop. I don't deny using work to satisfy personal greed, but that isn't greed.
1001407175.korean: 이런 곳에서 쉬는 건 취향에 안 맞는데…&n부패 경찰 같잖아.&n업무로 사리사욕을 채우는 건 부정 안하지만&n그게 물욕은 아니라고.

1001407176.english: To think you called me to a place like this… What are you planning to do? Huh? Well, if it’s you… No, I didn’t say anything.
1001407176.korean: 이런 곳으로 날 부르다니…&n무슨 짓을 저지르려고 그러는 걸까? 응?&n뭐, 당신에게라면...&n아니, 아무 말도 안 했어.

1001407177.english: Do you want to wear handcuffs?

1001407178.english: Can you handle it? If you want this… fine. I'll play along. Now, lick it.
1001407178.korean: 감당 가능해? 당신이 좋다면…&n좋아. 어울려주지.&n자, 핥아봐.

1001407179.english: Did you warm up enough before getting into the water? Don't just dive in suddenly… and don't leave me alone. I can't imagine a life without you anymore.
1001407179.korean: 물에 들어가기 전에 운동은 충분히 했지?&n갑자기 물에 들어갔다가&n나를 혼자 두지 말라고.&n이제 당신이 없는 삶은 상상도 못 하겠으니까.

1001407180.english: You mean this swimsuit? It's Taylor's work. She said she got the inspiration while studying vocabulary with Emily after seeing a peel-and-stick sticker bookmark.
1001407180.korean: 이 수영복 말인가? 테일러의 작품이다.&n에밀리와 낱말 공부를 하다가&n붙였다 뗐다 하는 스티커형 책갈피를 보고&n영감을 떠올렸다고 하더군.

1001407181.english: You ask if I'm embarrassed because there's so much skin showing? This is a body I've maintained just to show you. Why on earth should I feel ashamed of showing a body like that?
1001407181.korean: 노출이 많아서 부끄럽지 않냐고?&n그대에게 보여주기 위해 관리한 몸이다.&n그런 몸을 보여주는 것에&n대체 어째서 부끄러움을 느껴야 하지?

1001407182.english: The tape looks like it would come off easily, but thanks to the special adhesive, that wasn't a problem. Oh, it won't be difficult for you to peel it off, so there's no need to worry.
1001407182.korean: 테이프가 겉보기에는 잘 떨어질 것 같지만,&n특수한 접착제 덕분에 그런 문제는 없더군.&n아, 그대가 떼는 건 어렵지 않을 테니,&n걱정할 필요는 없다.

1001407183.english: The Beast Hunter saw this swimsuit and freaked out, saying it was bad for Emily's education. I guess I'll have to tell her to hide for a while if she doesn't want to hear Taylor nag her.
1001407183.korean: 비스트헌터가 이 수영복을 보더니&n에밀리 교육에 나쁘다며 기겁을 하더군.&n아무래도 테일러에게 잔소리 듣기 싫으면&n당분간은 숨어다니라고 전해줘야겠어.

1001407184.english: If it weren't for you, I would have been quite embarrassed to show this side of myself. But since it's you, it's no problem. I don't hide anything from the person I love.
1001407184.korean: 이 모습을 보여주는 게 그대가 아니라면&n꽤 부끄러운 차림새였겠지.&n하지만 그대라면 문제 없다. &n난 사랑하는 사람에게 숨기는 게 없거든.

1001407185.english: There’s a reason this swimsuit is made of tape. It’s precisely so you can peel it off however you want. Now… where would you like to start peeling it off?
1001407185.korean: 수영복을 테이프로 만든 건 다 이유가 있다.&n바로 그대가 원하는대로 떼어낼 수 있도록&n테이프를 사용한 것이지.&n자… 그럼, 어디부터 떼어내 보겠나?

1001407186.english: Hehe, it was worth wearing this swimsuit. However, I have a few things to prepare as well... so please wait a moment.
1001407186.korean: 후훗, 이 수영복을 입은 보람이 있군.&n하지만 나도 여러가지 준비할 게 있으니…&n잠시만 기다리도록.

1001407187.english: It's time for the main dish. Go ahead—unwrap from wherever you want.
1001407187.korean: 메인 디쉬를 맛볼 시간이군.&n자, 그대가 원하는 곳부터… 포장을 벗기도록.

1001407188.english: Public indecency laws don't apply to this outfit. After all, I belong to you from head to toe—your private property.
1001407188.korean: 이 옷에 공연음란이란 성립하지 않는다.&n그야, 나는 머리끝부터 발끝까지 그대의 것.&n그대만의 사유물이니까 말이야.

1001407189.english: When you purchase the next skin and gift it to the target unit, the background will be unlocked.
1001407189.korean: 다음 스킨 구매 및 대상 전투원에게 선물 시, 배경이 활성화 됩니다.&n징벌의 사디어스 용 "단둘만의 풀파티"

1001407190.english: Ta-da! How do you like my new outfit, Commander? Do you like it? I prepared this for you because I thought you might get thirsty! Now you can drink Elven Milk anywhere!
1001407190.korean: 짜잔! 누나 새 옷 어때, 사령관?&n마음에 들어? 사령관이 목마를까봐&n누나가 준비한 옷이야! 이제 어디서든&n엘븐 밀크를 마실 수 있어!

1001407191.english: The reason I sell strawberry milk is… because I’m sweet and refreshing like a strawberry! ...What? You don't look like you agree? Commander~?
1001407191.korean: 누나가 왜 딸기우유를 파냐면…&n누나는 딸기처럼 달콤하고 상큼하니까!&n...뭐야, 동의하지 않는 표정인데? 사령관~?

1001407192.english: Please buy lots of Elven Milk… No… Is there a better line than this… I need to be of help to the Commander…
1001407192.korean: 엘븐 밀크 많이 사 주세요… 아니야…&n이것보다 좀 더 좋은 대사가 뭐가 있을까…&n사령관한테 도움이 되어야 하는데…

1001407193.english: You ask what the milk Sekhmet sells tastes like? That’s… a secret! You should focus on her when you’re with her, Commander!
1001407193.korean: 세크메트가 파는 우유는 무슨 맛이냐고?&n그건… 비밀이야! 누나랑 같이 있을 때는&n누나한테 집중해야지, 사령관!

1001407194.english: Actually, I hate wearing Yoroi. It’s uncomfortable because it’s too tight, and it makes me feel depressed when I wear it… On the other hand, I really like Milk Girl clothes because they’re comfortable!
1001407194.korean: 사실 누나는 요로이를 입는 게 싫어.&n옷이 꽉 껴서 불편하기도 하고,&n입고 있으면 우울해지거든…&n반면에 밀크걸 옷은 편해서 참 좋아!

1001407195.english: Here, we have plenty of Elven Milk, so line up… Huh? Commander, you're thirsty too? Don't worry, I've prepared a separate one for you. In the freshest condition possible.
1001407195.korean: 자, 엘븐 밀크는 많으니까 줄 서서…&n응? 사령관도 목마르다고?&n걱정마, 사령관 건 따로 준비해 놨거든.&n제일 신선한 상태로 말이야.

1001407196.english: Jo, watch out! The milk might spill...

1001407197.english: If you really wanted Elven Milk that badly, you should've said so. Can't be helped, then. I'll feed you plenty… just follow me for a bit?
1001407197.korean: 나 참, 그렇게 엘븐 밀크가 먹고 싶었으면&n말을 하지. 어쩔 수 없네.&n누나가 잔뜩 먹여줄 테니까... 잠깐 따라와?

1001407198.english: Come on, let's cuddle with your big sister Commander~ Hm? You think I'm treating you too much like a baby? Commander, you'll always be my baby. After all, you like milk so much.
1001407198.korean: 자, 우리 사령관 누나랑 꼬옥 하자~&n응? 너무 아기처럼 대하는 거 아니냐고?&n사령관은 누나한테는 항상 아기야.&n그야, 우유를 이렇게 좋아하는걸?

1001407199.english: It's true that the summer combat uniform looks like a swimsuit. They said it was designed with amphibious assaults in mind. It's not just the designer's personal taste.
1001407199.korean: 하계 전투복이 수영복 같다는 점은&n인정합니다. 상륙전까지 상정하고&n디자인했다고 하더군요.&n디자이너의 취향때문만은 아닐 겁니다.

1001407200.english: Even though it's a summer combat uniform, it's not only worn in summer. Sometimes it's used on purpose during cold-weather training… or when Brownie causes trouble.
1001407200.korean: 하계 전투복이지만&n여름에만 입는 것은 아닙니다.&n혹한기 훈련 때 일부러 입기도 하고......&n브라우니가 사고를 쳐서... 입기도 합니다.

1001407201.english: Discomfort while wearing the summer combat uniform? …It could use a little more support. And I'm not the only one who thinks so… What? You say that's actually a good thing?
1001407201.korean: 하계 전투복을 입으면 불편한 점 말입니까?&n...조금 더 단단히 받쳐주면 좋겠습니다.&n또 저만 그런 게 아니라서…&n네? 이게 좋은 거라고요?

1001407202.english: Last time, I made a slip of the tongue in front of Colonel Night Angel. The Colonel spoke harshly, but thankfully forgave me.
1001407202.korean: 지난 번에 나이트 앤젤 대령님에게&n말 실수를 했던 적이 있어요.&n대령님께서 심술궂게 말씀하셨지만&n다행히 용서해주셨어요.

1001407203.english: Singing… you mean? I'm sorry, the only songs I know are military marches… and I can't even sing those well. But if you'd like to hear, I'll try.
1001407203.korean: 노래… 말인가요?&n죄송합니다. 아는 노래는 군가밖에 없어서…&n그나마도 잘 부르지도 못하지만...&n각하께서 듣고 싶으시다면 노력하겠습니다.

1001407204.english: Your Excellency, if it would not be rude… may I apply sunscreen for you? Even in a small way, I want to be of help to you. You are someone precious… someone important.
1001407204.korean: 각하, 무례가 되지 않는다면… 선크림을…&n발라드려도 되겠습니까? 사소하게나마&n각하께 도움이 되고 싶습니다.&n각하께선 소중한… 중요한 분이시니까요.

1001407205.english: This makes things difficult for me…

1001407206.english: Just because I wear something revealing does not mean revealing behavior is permitted. …It is only permitted because it is you.
1001407206.korean: 개방된 모습을 했다고 개방적인 행동이&n허용되는 것은 아닙니다.&n…각하니까 허용되는 겁니다.

1001407207.english: Do you wish for me to wear clothes that expose more? Th-then… even everything is possible. If that is what you desire…
1001407207.korean: 각하께선 제가 노출이 많은 옷을&n입기를 바라십니까?&n그, 그러면…… 저, 전부도 가능합니다.&n각하께서 원하신다면...

1001407208.english: Today, I am your math teacher, Leprechaun. What would you like me to teach you first? Huh? The one on the blackboard? Uh... I mean... could I, could I call the Doctor?
1001407208.korean: 오늘은 수학 선생님 레프리콘이에요.&n무엇부터 알려드릴까요?&n네? 칠판에 있는 거요? 어… 그러니까...&n다, 닥터 불러와도 될까요?

1001407209.english: I tried following Alexandra's example... but it doesn't really suit me. I think reasoning with words works better for me than physical punishment.
1001407209.korean: 알렉산드라 님을 따라해봤는데…&n저하고는 좀 안 맞는 거 같아요.&n저에게는 체벌 보다는 말로 타이르는 쪽이&n더 맞는 거 같아요.

1001407210.english: There are probably some students who cause a lot of trouble. But no troublemaker... would be as bad as Brownie...
1001407210.korean: 학생 중에는 사고를 많이 치는&n학생도 있겠죠.&n하지만 어떤 사고뭉치도...&n브라우니만큼 심하지는 않겠죠…

1001407211.english: Captain Marie asked me what I wanted to do when the war ended. I couldn't answer back then... but I think I can say it now.
1001407211.korean: 전에 마리 대장님께서 전쟁이 끝나면&n무엇이 하고 싶냐고 물으셨어요.&n그때는 대답을 못 했지만...&n지금은 말할 수 있을 것 같아요.

1001407212.english: I tried being a one-day teacher. I realized that teaching someone isn't easy. But... it was still incredibly rewarding.
1001407212.korean: 일일 선생님 체험을 해봤는데.&n누군가를 가르치는 것이 쉽지 않더군요.&n하지만… 그래도 엄청 보람찼어요.

1001407213.english: Please focus on the blackboard, not me, Your Excellency. Come on. I said, focus on the class, not me. … Though I am happy about it.
1001407213.korean: 제가 아니라 칠판에 집중해주세요, 각하.&n아이참. 제가 아니라 수업에&n집중해 달라니까요.&n…기쁘긴 하지만요.

1001407215.english: I studied something special for your sake… and it seems you want it as well. We should practice… shouldn't we?
1001407215.korean: 각하를 위해서 특별한 공부를 했는데…&n마침 각하께서도 원하시는 것 같네요.&n실습… 해봐야겠죠?

1001407216.english: When all wars are over, children will surely be born. And among those children… there will be ours, won't there? Ehehe, I already feel like teaching them.
1001407216.korean: 모든 전쟁이 끝나면 아이들이 태어나겠죠?&n그리고 그 아이들 중에는…&n각하와 저의 아이가 있겠죠?&n에헤헤, 벌써 아이들을 가르치고 싶어지네요.

1001407217.english: It is our Order of Justice, the P-Strikers, to bestow courage upon those in despair! Where are the people who need hope and courage?
1001407217.korean: 절망에 빠진 자들에게 용기를 선사하는 것이&n우리 정의 기사단 P-스트라이커즈!&n희망과 용기가 필요한 분들은 어딨죠?

1001407218.english: What about the others? Due to the Densetsu members' schedules and practice room issues, they are receiving instruction individually. But don't worry. The Strikers overcome any adversity.
1001407218.korean: 다른 애들요?&n덴세츠분들 일정이랑 연습실 문제로&n각자 따로 지도를 받고 있어요.&n하지만 걱정마세요.&n스트라이커즈는 어떤 고난도 이겨내니까요.

1001407219.english: Mr. Goltarion was amazing. Even though he was originally a villain, he set the standard for a knight pursuing justice. Though he did occasionally shout out Ms. Pokkuru's name.
1001407219.korean: 골타리온 씨 굉장했어요.&n원래는 빌런이었으면서 정의를 추구하는&n기사의 본보기를 보여줬어요.&n가끔 뽀끄루 씨의 이름을 부르짖기는&n했지만요.

1001407220.english: This outfit? The designers, the Densetsu team, and the technical staff worked together to make it... Uh, watch out! This is a real weapon!
1001407220.korean: 이 복장요?&n디자이너분들과 덴세츠분들,&n기술진분들이 합심해서 만들어주셨...&n어어, 조심하세요! 이거 진짜 병기에요!

1001407221.english: I want to show people that even an ordinary bioroid can become a hero. Not just in acting, but in real life.
1001407221.korean: 사람들에게 보여주고 싶어요.&n평범한 바이오로이드도&n영웅이 될 수 있다는 걸요.&n연기뿐만 아니라 실제로도요.

1001407222.english: A hero is someone who never breaks in the face of any adversity, isn't they? And as long as you are here, Commander, I will never be broken. So please watch my exploits.
1001407222.korean: 영웅이란 어떠한 고난에도 결코 꺾이지&n않는 사람을 말하는 거겠죠?&n그리고 저는 사령관님이 계시는 한&n결코 꺾이지 않아요.&n그러니 저의 활약을 지켜봐주세요.

1001407224.english: Hehe, you couldn't resist, right?&nThere's a special way to take this off.&nI'll show you.&nSo… Commander, you take it off for me.
1001407224.korean: 헤헤, 못 참게 되신거죠?&n이거 벗기는 방법이 따로 있으니까&n알려드릴게요.&n그러니… 사령관님께서 직접 벗겨주세요.

1001407225.english: I had a dream.&nA dream of you, me, and everyone&nbuilding a peaceful world.&nShall we make that dream real now?
1001407225.korean: 꿈을 꿨어요.&n사령관님과 저 그리고 모두와 함께&n평화로운 세상을 이룩하는 꿈을요.&n이제 그 꿈을 현실에 실현시키러 갈까요?

1001407226.english: This outfit? Heh! It's a trophy of mine,&nrewoven by the Saint of Happiness.&nDid I thank Amy?&nOf course I did!
1001407226.korean: 이 옷? 크크크! 짐의 전리품을 행복의&n성녀가 다시 자아낸 의복이니라.&n에이미에게 감사인사는 했냐고?&n당연히 했지!

1001407227.english: Heh heh, human. Already trembling before my power?&nBut don't worry.&nA capable… capable… what was it again?
1001407227.korean: 후후, 인간. 짐의 힘에 벌써부터 벌벌&n떨고 있는 것이더냐?&n허나 걱정말거라.&n능력있는… 능력있는… 뭐였더라?

1001407228.english: A True Ancestor is a vampire who is both beautiful and strong.&nSo, offer me tribute!
1001407228.korean: 진조란 아름다우면서도, 강한 힘을&n가진 진짜 흡혈귀를 말해.&n그러니 나에게 공물을 바쳐라!

1001407229.english: Did you know the real True Ancestor is super cool and strong?&nWhen the Dragon Slayer was blinded by Nidhogg's venom,&nshe gave him her own eyes&nto save him?
1001407229.korean: 사실 진짜 진조는 진짜진짜 멋지고 강하다?&n용살자가 니드호그의 독에 눈이 멀었을 때,&n자신의 사안을 넘겨줘서&n위기를 넘기기도 했다?

1001407230.english: Servant, you still haven't read Dragon Slayer?&nCan't be helped. Here.&nIt's my treasured copy, so be careful, okay?
1001407230.korean: 권속이여, 아직도 드래곤 슬레이어를&n못 본 것이더냐?&n어쩔 수 없지. 자.&n내가 아끼는 책이니까 깨끗하게 봐야해?

1001407231.english: Will you not become my servant?&nIf you do, we can play every day,&neat delicious food, sleep together…&nAnd also… be my servant, Commander. Please?
1001407231.korean: 짐의 권속이 되지 않겠느냐.&n짐의 권속이 되면 매일 놀 수 있고,&n맛있는 것도 먹고, 같이 잠도 자고…&n그리고 또… 권속 되주라, 사령관. 응?

1001407232.english: Do you take me for a child? I'm a True Ancestor Princess!

1001407233.english: Since you're my servant,&nI'll allow it.&nPet me more,&nuntil I'm satisfied.
1001407233.korean: 그대는 짐의 권속이니&n특별히 허락하겠노라.&n더욱 쓰다듬거라,&n짐이 만족할 때까지.

1001407234.english: Servant. Our fates are bound, soul to soul.&nEven death cannot separate us.&nSo don't you dare leave me. Understood?
1001407234.korean: 권속이여. 우리의 운명은 혼과 혼으로&n이어져 있으니 죽음조차도 떼어놓지&n못 할 것이다. 그러니 나 두고 어디&n가버리면 안 돼. 알았지?

1001407235.english: Today's burden is not the Cyclops Princess! Today, I am… the Great Wolf Hunter Princess! I am the Little Red Riding Hood Princess!
1001407235.korean: 오늘의 짐은 사이클롭스 프린세스가 아니다!&n짐은 오늘… 위대한 늑대 사냥꾼 공주!&n빨간모자 프린세스인 것이다!

1001407236.english: Do you see the wolf blood on this axe? This is the proof of a true hunter… Huh? You’re looking for So-Wan? Eek…
1001407236.korean: 이 도끼에 묻은 늑대들의 피가 보이느냐?&n이것이야말로 진정한 사냥꾼의 증거…&n응? 소, 소완이 찾고 있다고? 히익…

1001407237.english: This is an outfit from the fairy tale the Saint Princess read to me before bed. It's the story about the princess in a red hat who goes into the forest to hunt a wolf!
1001407237.korean: 이건 잠자기 전에 성녀 공주님이 읽어준&n동화책에 나오는 옷이야.&n빨간 모자를 쓴 공주님이 늑대를 사냥하러&n숲 속으로 들어가는 얘기지!

1001407238.english: Actually, I even thought about wearing a Cinderella dress as the Witch of Fire. But... Amy told me not to because fire is dangerous...
1001407238.korean: 사실은 불의 마녀 신데렐라 옷을 입을까도&n생각을 해 봤었어. 그런데...&n에이미가 불은 위험하다고 하지 말래...

1001407239.english: I told Princess Jinjo the story of Little Red Riding Hood, but she stopped listening halfway through and said, "I won't let a saint like me get away with this," and then went somewhere with a scary look on her face...
1001407239.korean: 진조 공주님한테 빨간모자 얘기를 했는데,&n듣다 말고 '성녀인 짐을 가만두지 않겠다' &n라고 하면서 무서운 얼굴로 어디 가더라…
