1001407240.english: If anyone bothers the familiar... no, the Commander, tell me! Just like Little Red Riding Hood in the fairy tale... I will teach those bad guys a lesson in style!
1001407240.korean: 만약 누가 권속…&n아니, 사령관을 괴롭힌다면, 짐에게 말해라!&n동화 속에 나오는 빨간모자처럼…&n짐이 나쁜 녀석들을 멋지게 혼내주겠노라!

1001407241.english: So, the Commander likes this hat too?
1001407241.korean: 역시 사령관도 이 모자가 마음에 들었구나?

1001407242.english: Today I'll read you a fairytale!&nSince Commander always reads to me,&nsometimes I want to read to you instead. Is that okay?
1001407242.korean: 오늘은 짐이 권속에게 동화책을 읽어주겠다!&n항상 사령관이 동화책을 읽어주니까,&n가끔은 내가 읽어주고 싶었어. 괜찮지?

1001407243.english: These days, every day is fun.&nEveryone plays with me, reads me stories.&nIt's all thanks to you, Commander. Thank you.
1001407243.korean: 요즘은 매일매일이 즐거워.&n다들 나랑 잘 놀아주고, 동화책도 읽어줘.&n이게 다 사령관 덕분이야. 고마워, 사령관.

1001407244.english: Today, Commander, you're a guest on Neodym Airlines.&nIf you want anything, just say it…&nI'll provide the service for you.
1001407244.korean: 오늘 사령관은 네오딤 항공의 손님이야.&n원하는 게 있으면 뭐든 말해봐…&n내가 서비스 해 줄 테니까.

1001407245.english: On our plane, we offer in-flight meals…&nAnd… um… a lullaby service too.
1001407245.korean: 우리 비행기에서는 기내식 서비스랑…&n그리고… 음… 자장가 서비스를 제공할 거야.

1001407246.english: Later, let's travel the world together.&nSee the Eiffel Tower, the Statue of Liberty…&nThere are so many places I want to go with you, Commander.
1001407246.korean: 나중에 우리 같이 세계 여행을 가자.&n에펠탑도 보고, 자유의 여신상도 보고…&n사령관이랑 같이 가고 싶은 곳이 많아.

1001407247.english: To work as a crew member, don't you need a plane to board first?&nIt's fine. I can just make one.
1001407247.korean: 승무원 일을 하려면 먼저 탑승할 비행기가&n있어야 하는 거 아니냐고?&n괜찮아. 하나 만들면 되니까.

1001407248.english: After the war, there are so many things I want to try.&nArchitect, chef, painter, or… mom.&nBut this time, I decided to try being a flight attendant.
1001407248.korean: 전쟁이 끝나면 해 보고 싶은 게 너무 많아.&n건축가, 요리사, 화가, 아니면... 엄마.&n하지만 이번에는 승무원이 되어보기로 했어.

1001407249.english: In old movies, flight attendants bring champagne to important guests.&nSo, I'll give champagne to you, Commander.&nBecause you're someone precious to me.
1001407249.korean: 옛날 영화에선 승무원이 중요한 손님에게&n샴페인을 가져다 주더라.&n그러니까, 나도 사령관한테 샴페인을 줄게.&n사령관은 내 소중한 사람이니까.

1001407250.english: Commander, you're not supposed to do this while working.
1001407250.korean: 사령관, 일 하는 중에는 이러는 거 아니래.

1001407251.english: Commander, did you know? Long-distance planes have crew bedrooms.&nDo you want to go sleep together?
1001407251.korean: 사령관, 그거 알아? 장거리 비행기에는&n승무원 침실이 마련되어 있대.&n같이 자러 갈래?

1001407252.english: Our plane doesn't have seat belts, right?&nBut I'm here instead.&nIf you hold my hand tightly, you'll be safe.
1001407252.korean: 우리 비행기에는 좌석 벨트가 없지 않냐고?&n대신 내가 있잖아.&n나랑 손을 꼭 잡고 있으면 안전할거야.

1001407253.english: I'm not Neodim, I'm Phantom Thief N. I'm a fearsome thief who can steal anything. … But please don't be too scared of me.
1001407253.korean: 난 네오딤이 아니라 괴도 N이야.&n못 훔치는 게 없는 무시무시한 도둑이지.&n…그래도 너무 무서워하진 말아줘.

1001407254.english: Alvis and LRL want to rob the treasure vault together, but does the Commander know where the treasure vault is?
1001407254.korean: 알비스랑 LRL이 같이 보물고를 털자는데,&n사령관은 보물고가 어디인지 알아?

1001407255.english: Phantom Thief N is a righteous outlaw, so he only steals from bad people… and bunny girls. … The second one is a setting that Niba just put in on his own.
1001407255.korean: 괴도 N은 의적이라서, 나쁜 사람들이랑…&n바니걸한테서만 물건을 훔쳐.&n…두번째는 니바가 멋대로 넣은 설정이야.

1001407256.english: I originally planned to wear a detective outfit... but my teacher said that bad girls are the trend these days, so I decided to change direction from a detective to a phantom thief.
1001407256.korean: 원래는 탐정 복장을 입으려고 했는데…&n선생님이 요즘은 나쁜 여자가 대세라고 해서&n탐정에서 괴도로 방향을 바꾸기로 했어.

1001407257.english: Other phantom thieves return what they steal, but I won't return what I've stolen once. Because… I'm going to give this to the Commander as a gift.
1001407257.korean: 다른 괴도들은 훔친 물건을 돌려주던데,&n나는 한 번 훔친 건 돌려주지 않을 거야.&n왜냐면… 이건 사령관한테 선물할 거니까.

1001407258.english: I'll give Phantom Thief N's crime予告 letter... to the Commander. Since the Commander stole my heart... I'm going to go steal the Commander's heart too.
1001407258.korean: 괴도 N의 범죄 예고장을... 사령관한테 줄게.&n사령관이 내 마음을 훔쳤으니까...&n나도 사령관의 마음을 훔치러 갈 거거든.

1001407259.english: Is this a warning letter from the commander?

1001407260.english: Yes… I understand.&nTonight… I'll come to steal the Commander's love.
1001407260.korean: 응… 알겠어.&n오늘 밤… 사령관의 사랑을 훔치러 갈게.

1001407261.english: I'm a thief who shouldn't be caught…&nBut being caught by the Commander&ndoesn't seem so bad.&nSo… will you hold my hand tightly, Commander?
1001407261.korean: 난 잡히면 안 되는 도둑이지만…&n사령관한테 잡히는 건&n그렇게 나쁘지 않을 것 같아.&n그러니까... 내 손을 꼭 잡아줄래, 사령관?

1001407262.english: How about this outfit? Cool, right? Now all I need is a cool bike to match it. … All I need is a bike.
1001407262.korean: 이 옷 어떤가요? 멋지죠?&n이제 여기에 어울리는 멋진 바이크만 있으면&n되겠네요.&n…바이크만 있으면 되겠네요.

1001407263.english: Spatoia has an X74, and Coco has a White Shell. I'm the only one without a vehicle. A jetpack? Does that look like a vehicle?
1001407263.korean: 스파토이아는 X74, 코코는 화이트셸.&n내만 탈 거 없다 아이가.&n제트팩? 이게 탈 거로 보이나?

1001407264.english: I'll wipe it clean, tighten it, and lubricate it well. If any problems arise, I'll take it to Fortune, and I'll make sure to bring it safely into the accommodation rain or snow. Is that not enough?
1001407264.korean: 잘 닦고 쪼이고 기름치고,&n문제 생기면 포츈 언니야한테 델꼬가고,&n비가 오나 눈이 오나 숙소에 잘 들여놓을게.&n그래도 안 되나?

1001407265.english: A license? Do we really need a license in a world like this? Can't an Extraterrestrial Activity (EVA) certificate be used?
1001407265.korean: 면허? 세상이 이따군데도 면허가 필요하나?&n우주선외활동 자격증으로는 안 되나?

1001407266.english: Annie's bike? I didn't ride it secretly. I got permission from Annie. … … I got her to drink a ton and got her permission…
1001407266.korean: 애니 바이크?&n몰래 탄 거 아인데?&n애니한테 허락 받았는데?&n……잔뜩 술 먹이고 허락 받았다…

1001407267.english: When I ride my bike, I'll give you a ride first. I'll come pick you up whenever you call. Can't I do that? Huh? Oppa~.
1001407267.korean: 바이크 타면 오빠야부터 제일 먼저 태워주께.&n오빠야가 부르면 언제든지 태우러 가께.&n그래도 안 되나? 응? 오빠야아~.

1001407269.english: Do you think I wouldn't notice you trying to change the subject?&nI-I'm not saying I don't like it…&n……Just a little, okay?
1001407269.korean: 말 돌릴려고 그러는 거 내 모를 줄 아나?&n시, 싫다는 건 아니고...&n……조, 조금만이다?

1001407270.english: I know. Big brother worries about me and keeps saying no.&nBut I won't give up.&nTouring with big brother is my dream.
1001407270.korean: 알고 있다. 오빠야가 내 걱정해가지고 계속&n안 된다 카는 거. 그래도 나는 포기 안 한다.&n오빠야랑 같이 투어링하는 게 내 꿈이니까.

1001407271.english: That's it! I am Togashi Koyori! What? You don't know who I am? I'm installing the Sengoku Blade on the panel right now! Go!
1001407271.korean: 그래! 내가 바로 토가시 코요리야!&n뭐? 내가 누군지 모른다고?&n지금 당장 패널에 전국 블레이드를 설치한다!&n실시!

1001407272.english: Is Jane here? Or not? Then what about Eunice? Hagane? Marion? Is she not here? Then… what about Kaen? What? You say Kaen is here? Ah… is it a different Kaen…
1001407272.korean: 제인은 있어? 없어? 그러면 유니스는?&n하가네는? 마리온은? 없어?&n그러면… 카엔은? 뭐? 카엔은 있다고?&n아… 다른 카엔인가…

1001407273.english: Ah... to think the world has gone to hell like this. I guess this happened because I gave it a bad ending... Hahahaha! Just kidding! Just kidding!
1001407273.korean: 아아… 세상이 이렇게 망하다니.&n내가 배드 엔딩을 내서 이렇게 됐나봐…&n아하하하하! 농담이야! 농담!

1001407274.english: The thing that surprised me the most looking around here was that they use tuna cans as currency? I mean, what's so great about tuna cans? Gold coins are the best. Shiny gold coins.
1001407274.korean: 여기 둘러보고 제일 놀란 게.&n참치캔을 화폐로 쓰더라?&n아니, 참치캔이 뭐가 좋다고.&n금화가 최고지. 반짝반짝 거리는 금화.

1001407275.english: Believe it or not, I’ve been evaluated as a priestess with the strongest spiritual powers. Well… that’s just in the setting, though. Still, you saw me fighting, right? My combat power isn't fake.
1001407275.korean: 이래뵈도 최강의 영능력을 가진 무녀라는&n평가를 받았다구. 뭐… 설정상이긴 하지만.&n그래도 내가 싸우는 거 봤지?&n전투력은 가짜가 아니라구.

1001407276.english: The food is good, the beds are comfortable, I can take a bath, and there's a small paycheck. And… hehe. Yeah! I liked it.
1001407276.korean: 밥 잘 나오고, 잠자리도 편하고,&n목욕도 할 수 있고, 조금이지만 급료도 있고.&n그리고… 후후.&n응! 마음에 들었어.

1001407277.english: Goodbye. Let's never see each other again. … It's a warning.

1001407278.english: Hmm, well, that just means I'm that attractive, I guess.&nNext time, ask first before doing it. Okay?
1001407278.korean: 흐음~ 뭐, 그만큼 내가 매력적이라는 거겠지.&n다음부터는 먼저 물어보고 해. 알았지?

1001407279.english: That humanity will be destroyed and only bad things will happen&nI thought... but it's not always like that.&nHuh? Why? Heh heh... why is that?
1001407279.korean: 인류가 멸망하고 나쁜 일만 있을 거라고 &n생각했는데… 꼭 그런 것만은 아니네.&n응? 왜냐고? 후후… 왜 그럴까?

1001407280.english: Ah... it would have been really nice if the others were here too. I can't say for sure that they are all good kids... but I've grown attached to them through thick and thin.
1001407280.korean: 아아… 다른 애들도 있었으면&n정말로 좋았을텐데. 전부 다 좋은 애들…&n이라고 확실하게 말은 못 하겠지만&n미운 정 고운 정 다 들었거든.

1001407281.english: You ask why I collect things like money that have no value anymore? Well, that was my plan from the start... but now it's just a hobby.
1001407281.korean: 이제는 가치가 없는 돈 같은 걸 왜 모으냐고?&n처음부터 내 설계가 그렇게 된 거긴 한데…&n이제는 그냥 취미지.

1001407282.english: Hehe, I'll popularize the National Blade in Orca to raise my recognition and market value. And ultimately, the power of Orca... Did I sound too much like a villain?
1001407282.korean: 후후, 오르카에 전국 블레이드를 유행시켜서&n내 인지도와 몸값을 올리는거지.&n그리고 최종적으로는 오르카의 권력을...&n너무 악당 같았나?

1001407283.english: Ah! Seriously! I told you to tell me before you touch it! I need to be ready too...
1001407283.korean: 아! 정말! 말하고 만지라고 했잖아!&n나도 마음의 준비가 필요하다고…

1001407284.english: Sitting across from you like this, looking at you, Commander, I feel strange. Is it because of the alcohol, or because of you? ... Perhaps I’ve just gotten drunk on the atmosphere.
1001407284.korean: 이렇게 마주 앉아 사령관님을 바라보고 &n있으니 기분이 이상하네요.&n술 때문일까요, 사령관님 때문일까요?&n…분위기에 취해버린 걸지도 모르겠군요.

1001407285.english: I thought alcohol would just be bitter... but it's actually a pretty good experience. I am a little worried about getting drunk, though... but since the Commander will take care of it, it should be fine, right?
1001407285.korean: 술이라고 하면 쓰기만 할 줄 알았는데… &n생각보다 괜찮은 경험이네요.&n취하면 어떡하나 조금 걱정되기는 하지만… &n사령관님이 책임져 주실 거니까 괜찮겠죠?

1001407286.english: So this is the clear sound glasses make when they clink. A toast to your eyes… is that how you say it?
1001407286.korean: 술잔끼리 부딪히면&n이렇게 맑은 소리가 나는군요.&n당신의 눈동자에 건배…&n이렇게 말하는 거 맞나요?

1001407287.english: If you pour Baileys into Kahlúa without mixing it, and top it with a generous amount of whipped cream… are you talking about the name of this cocktail? Hmm… I’m a little embarrassed to say it myself.
1001407287.korean: 깔루아에 베일리스를 섞이지 않게 따르고, &n그 위에 휘핑크림을 잔뜩 올리면…&n이 칵테일의 이름 말인가요? 음…&n제 입으로 말씀 드리기는 조금 부끄럽네요

1001407288.english: I had something I wanted to tell the Commander while under the influence of alcohol, but I guess I wasn't drunk enough yet. The words I want to say keep swirling around in my mouth...
1001407288.korean: 술기운을 빌려서 &n사령관님께 드리고 싶은 말이 있었지만&n아직 충분히 취하지 못했나봐요&n하고 싶은 말이 자꾸 입 안에서 맴도는걸요…

1001407289.english: May I lean on you for a moment, Commander? I think I drank too much of this unfamiliar alcohol. Until this dizziness goes away… just for a moment… please hold me…
1001407289.korean: 잠시 사령관님께 기대고 있어도 괜찮을까요? &n익숙치 않은 술을 너무 많이 마셔버린거&n같네요. 어지러운게 가실 때 까지… 잠시만…&n저를 안아주세요…

1001407290.english: The excuse that you were drunk won't work, Commander.

1001407291.english: The excuse that you said it because you were drunk doesn't work on me.&nYou know it won't work, right?&nYou're responsible for getting me so worked up... you have to take responsibility, don't you?
1001407291.korean: 술기운에 그러셨다는 변명은 저한테 &n통하지 않는 거 아시죠?&n저를 달아오르게 만든 책임… 지셔야 해요?

1001407292.english: There are several things that are indispensable at a drinking party.&nGood drinks, snacks that go well with them, and a great atmosphere.&nAnd... the person looking at me from across the table...&nMy beloved...
1001407292.korean: 술자리에는 빠질 수 없는 게 여러 가지 있죠.&n좋은 술과 어울리는 안주, 멋진 분위기&n그리고… 내 맞은편에서 나를 바라보는… &n사랑하는 사람…

1001407293.english: That's right, I am the protagonist of Sengoku Blade. Befitting a protagonist, my in-game performance was the best, too. … The rumors about my bomb performance being bad are just nonsense!
1001407293.korean: 맞아, 내가 바로 전국 블레이드의 주인공이야.&n주인공답게 인게임 성능도 가장 좋았지.&n…봄 성능이 나쁘다는 건 헛소문일 뿐이야!

1001407294.english: The guy next to me is my familiar, Basaro. He's a guy I've worked with as a duo for a long time. You can think of him as a friend who assists me in battle.
1001407294.korean: 내 옆에 있는 애는 내 식신, 바사로야.&n나랑 같이 오랫동안 콤비로 활동한 녀석이지.&n내 전투를 보조하는 친구라고 생각하면 돼.

1001407295.english: I'm actually quite talented at engineering. I'm capable of whipping up a decent biplane with my own hands. … What? You're telling me not to say things like that in front of the Doctor?
1001407295.korean: 난 공학에도 꽤 재능이 있어.&n내 손으로 그럴듯한 복엽기도&n뚝딱 만들 수 있을 정도라고.&n…뭐? 닥터 앞에서는 그런 말 하지 말라고?

1001407296.english: I’ve been thinking about a pretty good business idea lately. It’s about building a tuna farm, strictly to spread the word about tuna sashimi… I’m sorry. Please don’t look at me like that!
1001407296.korean: 최근 괜찮은 사업을 생각해봤어.&n참치 양식장을 만드는 건데,&n어디까지나 참치회를 널리 알리기 위해서…&n…미안. 그런 눈으로 보지 말아줘!

1001407297.english: Why save money when the world has ended? It’s a kind of hobby... and an investment. If the world returns to normal, wouldn’t the value of currency return to its original state as well?
1001407297.korean: 세상이 망했는데 돈을 모으는 이유?&n일종의 취미 생활 겸… 투자야.&n세상이 원래대로 돌아가면&n화폐의 가치도 원래대로 돌아가지 않겠어?

1001407298.english: If I help the Commander save the world, I'll get my hands on immense wealth and power. With that power, I could live a life of leisure forever... Wait? Something's off.
1001407298.korean: 사령관을 도와서 세상을 구하면&n엄청난 돈과 권력을 손에 넣을 수 있겠지.&n그 힘으로 평생 놀고 먹는 삶을…&n어라? 뭔가 이상한데?

1001407299.english: You might end up tasting the power of a talisman.
1001407299.korean: 그러다가 부적 맛을 보는 수가 있어.

1001407300.english: Heh heh... Have you fallen head over heels for my charm?&nWell, it's only natural to fall for my beauty.
1001407300.korean: 후후... 내 매력에 푹 빠지기라도 한 거야?&n하긴, 내 미모에 반하는 건 당연한 일이지.

1001407301.english: Why are you helping the commander? Well, because of the reward money...&n...It's a joke, so don't take it that way.&nWhy would you ask something like that?&nIt's because I like the commander.
1001407301.korean: 사령관을 돕는 이유? 그야, 보상금 때문에…&n…농담이니까 그렇게 보지 마.&n뭘 그런 걸 물어봐?&n사령관이 마음에 드니까 그렇지.

1001407302.english: Ugh... I should have explained that in detail when I placed the order... What? You're asking what I mean? Look at this gun! It's not a Chicago Typewriter! I'm telling you, it's really important!!
1001407302.korean: 으으... 발주할 때 자세히 설명을 &n드렸어야 했는데...&n네? 무슨 소리냐구요? 이 총 좀 보세요! &n시카고 타자기가 아니잖아요! &n진짜 중요한 거라구요!!

1001407303.english: All the sisters in our family are La Madrina's henchmen, but... he only has one right-hand man, hehehe...
1001407303.korean: 우리 패밀리의 자매들은 모두 &n라 마드리나의 수족이지만… &n그분의 오른팔은 하나뿐이랍니다, &n후후후…

1001407304.english: Alvis says let's leave the gun behind and eat a chocolate bar together? Hehe, I guess I should prepare some cannoli to eat together.
1001407304.korean: 알비스가 총은 놔두고 &n같이 초코바를 먹자고 하네요? &n후훗, 같이 먹을 카놀리를 준비해야겠어요

1001407305.english: Commander, do you have a headache to deal with? Don't worry. Orca's best problem solver is always ready for you.
1001407305.korean: 사령관님, 처리해야 할 골칫거리가&n있으신가요? 걱정하지 마세요.&n오르카 최고의 해결사가 항상&n사령관님을 위해 준비 중입니다.

1001407306.english: Don't you think the tea party our family prepared is an offer you can't refuse? D...Diet!? Hehehe... It's fine just for today.
1001407306.korean: 저희 패밀리가 준비한 다과회,&n거절하지 못할 제안이라고 &n생각하지 않으시나요?&n다...다이어트!? 후후후… 오늘만은 괜찮아요.

1001407307.english: If I ever leave this job someday… just like that… I want to spend the time I’ve been gifted with you, Commander. Not as the person of the Family, but as the person only you know…
1001407307.korean: 언젠가 이 일을 그만두게 된다면…&n그렇게… 선물받은 시간동안 사령관님과 &n함께하고 싶어요. 패밀리로서의 제가 아닌, &n사령관님만이 아는 제가 되어서…

1001407308.english: It is interfering with the mission, so could you please wait until night?

1001407309.english: Hoo hoo hoo... Can't you wait until night?&nI'm on a mission, but... I guess I have no choice.
1001407309.korean: 후후후… 밤까지 기다리실 수 없으신가요?&n임무 중이지만… 어쩔 수 없네요.

1001407310.english: Commander... the promise we made to build a family together...&nI haven't forgotten either...
1001407310.korean: 사령관님… 함께 가족을 만들자고 한 약속…&n저도 잊지 않았어요…

1001407311.english: Taylor recommended this outfit, saying that sticking to the classics is important. What do you think? Do you like it?
1001407311.korean: 테일러 님께서 정석은 중요한 것이라고&n하면서 이 옷을 추천해주시더라구요.&n어떤가요? 손님 마음에 드나요?

1001407312.english: Phew, I don't know why it's raining like this... What? You're saying my underwear is showing? Hehehe, it's pretty, isn't it? It's underwear I like too.
1001407312.korean: 어휴, 뭔 비가 이렇게 내리는지…&n네? 속옷 보인다고요?&n에헤헤, 예쁘죠? 저도 좋아하는 속옷이에요.

1001407313.english: You ask what's in the bag? Hmm... it's a secret. It wouldn't be fun if you knew in advance, right? But the customer will like it, too.
1001407313.korean: 가방에 뭐가 들었냐고요?&n음… 비밀.&n미리 알면 재미없잖아요?&n하지만 손님도 좋아하실 거예요.

1001407314.english: What course is it today? Shaving, haircut, treatment, scalp clinic, massage, and nails... It's full service, right? Special services included.
1001407314.korean: 오늘은 어떤 코스인가요?&n면도, 컷, 트리트먼트, 두피 크리닉&n그리고 마사지랑 네일...&n역시 풀서비스죠? 특별 서비스 포함.

1001407315.english: Customer, aren't we seeing each other a bit too little lately? You saw me yesterday too? It's just that I want to see you more often. Hehe!
1001407315.korean: 손님, 요즘 너무 뜸하게 보는 거 아닌가요?&n어제도 봤다고요?&n제가 더 자주 보고 싶어서 그래요. 히힛!

1001407316.english: You ask if I have other guests besides you? Plenty, of course. Just think of how many Orca members are completely hooked on my service. But… special service is only for guests. Hehehe.
1001407316.korean: 손님 말고 다른 손님이 있냐고요?&n많죠~. 오르카 대원들 중에 제 서비스에&n푹 빠진 사람이 얼마나 많은데요.&n하지만… 특별 서비스는 손님에게만. 에헤헷.

1001407317.english: Sir, please wait just a moment for the special service. I'm looking forward to it too... Understood?
1001407317.korean: 손님, 특별 서비스는 조금만 기다려주세요.&n저도 기대하고 있으니까... 알았죠?

1001407318.english: Hehe, special service from now on?&nAs much as I waited... a whole lot... I'll serve you.
1001407318.korean: 에헤헷, 이제부터 특별 서비스?&n기다린 만큼… 잔뜩잔뜩... 서비스해드릴게요.

1001407319.english: Big Brother, how was the breakfast I made?&nDid you enjoy it? Hehe, then that's a relief.&nBecause I want to be your wife.&nBecause I practiced hard.
1001407319.korean: 오빠, 내가 차린 아침은 어땠어?&n맛있었어? 에헤헷, 그러면 다행이다.&n오빠의 아내가 되고 싶어서&n열심히 연습했으니까.

1001407320.english: Galatea appears, dressed in her date outfit! It’s an outfit that feels like a ginkgo tree with autumn leaves… How is it, honey? Does it suit me?
1001407320.korean: 데이트 복장으로 갈아입은 갈라테아 등장!&n단풍이 든 은행나무 같은 느낌의 옷인데…&n어때, 허니? 잘 어울려?

1001407321.english: Leave today's date itinerary to me! I've planned everything from A to Z! The first thing to do is… hold hands with Honey.
1001407321.korean: 오늘 데이트 코스는 나한테 맡겨!&n내가 A부터 Z까지 다 계획을 짜 왔거든!&n가장 먼저 할 일은… 허니랑 손 잡기야.

1001407322.english: You must be busy working hard every day, so thank you for spending time with me, honey!
1001407322.korean: 매일매일 열심히 일 하느라 바쁠 텐데&n나랑 같이 시간 보내줘서 고마워, 허니!

1001407323.english: I worked really hard preparing for this date. MP, Sia, Queen Mel... everyone helped out, so you can look forward to it!
1001407323.korean: 이번 데이트는 정말 열심히 준비했어.&n엠피랑, 시아랑, 멜 여왕님이랑...&n다들 도와줬으니까, 엄청 기대해도 좋아!

1001407324.english: What are you staring at so intently? Are you hungry? Do you want a bite of my crepe? Not the crepe... you were looking at me? H-Honey, really...
1001407324.korean: 뭘 그렇게 집중해서 보는 거야? 배고파?&n내 크레이프라도 한 입 먹을래?&n크레이프가 아니라... 날 보고 있었다고?&n허, 허니도 차암…

1001407325.english: How would you rate this date? Me? I always get 100 points. I mean, with you, Honey, that date starts at a minimum of 100!
1001407325.korean: 이번 데이트는 몇 점 짜리였어?&n나? 나는 항상 100점이지.&n그야, 허니와 함께라면&n그 데이트는 기본 100점부터 시작하는걸!

1001407326.english: Ah?! This is a bit of a hassle right now, Honey…

1001407327.english: I'm getting ready for my date with Honey, from my clothes to my accessories.&nI prepared so hard, but...&nI didn't have time to prepare pretty underwear, though...?&nSo... don't be too surprised later, okay?"
1001407327.korean: 허니랑 데이트하려고 옷부터 액세서리까지&n엄청 열심히 준비했는데…&n예쁜 속옷은 준비를 못 했거든…?&n그러니까… 이따가 너무 놀라면 안돼…?

1001407328.english: When you get a cool boyfriend later,&nI have a list of things we could do together.&nThat's this list right here...&nWhat do you want to do first, honey?
1001407328.korean: 나중에 멋진 남자친구가 생기면&n같이 뭘 할까 정리해둔 리스트가 있거든?&n그게 바로 이 리스트인데…&n뭐부터 하고 싶어, 허니?

1001407329.english: A member of the Four Heavenly Kings of the Sengoku Blades, the Ghost Swords. She is Kaen, the Crimson Dark Princess. Her real name is Hibino Fuuki. Of course, her real name has never been revealed in the story, but…
1001407329.korean: 전국 블레이드 사천왕 귀도중의 일원.&n홍련의 암희 카엔이다.&n본명은 히비노 후우키.&n물론 본명은 작중에서 드러난 적은 없지만…

1001407330.english: Since I was the only female among the Four Heavenly Kings, I was the only bioroid. But the other human actors treated me well. Of course, I handled all the dangerous scenes...
1001407330.korean: 사천왕 귀도중 중 홍일점이었기에 &n바이오로이드는 나밖에 없었지.&n하지만 다른 인간 배우들은 나를 잘 대해줬지.&n물론 위험한 장면은 내가 전담했지만…

1001407331.english: I used to belong to a group plotting the destruction of the world, but not this time. That was strictly according to the setting of the story.
1001407331.korean: 내가 세계 멸망을 획책하는 집단에&n소속되어 있었지만 이번만큼은 아니다.&n어디까지나 작중의 설정상 그랬던 거니까.

1001407332.english: Of all people, it has to be just me and Koyori left... It's not that I dislike her... but isn't her personality a bit... something? Still... a comrade is a comrade.
1001407332.korean: 하필 남은 게 나랑 코요리뿐이라니…&n그 녀석이 싫은 건 아니지만...&n그 녀석 성격이 조금 그렇지 않나.&n그래도... 전우는 전우지.

1001407333.english: Maybe it was because I was a villain, or maybe it was because of my appearance, but the little kids were afraid of me. The boys, in particular, couldn't look me straight in the face.
1001407333.korean: 악역이라서 그런지, 생긴 것때문에 그런지,&n꼬맹이들이 날 무서워했지.&n특히나 남자 꼬맹이들은&n내 얼굴을 똑바로 못 봤었다.

1001407334.english: The me who once fought to destroy the world is now fighting to save it. It’s a complicated feeling, but… I don’t dislike it.
1001407334.korean: 그 옛날 세상을 멸망시키려고 싸웠던 내가&n지금은 세상을 구하기 위해서 싸우는군.&n복잡한 기분이지만… 싫지는 않다.

1001407335.english: Since it is between a human and a bioroid... punishment is impossible, but I hope they realize that this is sexual harassment.
1001407335.korean: 인간과 바이오로이드 사이이다보니…&n처벌은 불가능하지만 성희롱이라는 건&n자각했으면 좋겠군.

1001407336.english: This outfit is appealing in many ways.&nI'm aware of it.&n...So I don't want to scold you.
1001407336.korean: 이 옷이 여러모로 어필하고 있다는&n자각은 하고 있다.&n……그래서 책망하고 싶지는 않군.

1001407337.english: There was already another Kaen here beside me.&nFrom now on, please don't call me Kaen...&nI'd like you to call me Fuuki.
1001407337.korean: 이미 여기에는 나말고 다른 카엔이 있더군.&n앞으로는 카엔이라 부르지 말고...&n후우키라고 불러줬으면 좋겠군.

1001407338.english: Even though being blind in one eye is inconvenient, I have no complaints. No, actually... my complaint is that I look a little menacing. Just a little. Just a little.
1001407338.korean: 한쪽 눈이 안 보이는 게&n불편하기는 해도 불만은 없다.&n아니, 사실... 조금 험악해 보이는 게 불만이다.&n조금만이다. 조금.

1001407339.english: If the world becomes peaceful again, I intend to return to being a villain. It’s only natural, since I was made into a villain actor. However, I will never forget the times we fought together.
1001407339.korean: 세상이 다시 평화로워지면&n나도 다시 악당으로 돌아갈 생각이다.​&n악역 배우로 만들어졌으니 당연하지.​&n하지만 함께 싸웠던 것은 결코 잊지 않겠다.

1001407340.english: Jane, Eunice, Hagane, Marion… They were the ones I fought against, but… they were good guys. I’d like to fight them again.
1001407340.korean: 제인, 유니스, 하가네, 마리온…&n나랑 싸우던 녀석들이기는 하지만…&n좋은 녀석들이었다.&n녀석들과 다시 싸워보고 싶군.

1001407341.english: I'd say something if it were anyone else... but since it's you... ... ... am I saying something about this too?
1001407341.korean: 다른 사람이라면 한소리 하겠지만…&n너니까…&n……이것도 한소리 하는건가?

1001407342.english: I heard that in an old story, a bear became human, fell in love with a human, and married them. It seems that he loved humans just as much as I do.
1001407342.korean: 옛날이야기의 어느 곰은 인간이 되어서 &n인간분과 사랑하고, 결혼을 했다고 하네요. &n그분도 저만큼이나 인간을 &n무척 사랑하셨나 봐요.

1001407343.english: I'm sorry, Master... The clothes you gave me as a gift have gotten soaked like this... What? To think you're actually happy about it... Hehe, you are so kind, Master.
1001407343.korean: 죄송해요, 주인님… 주인님께&n선물 받은 옷이 이렇게 젖어버렸네요…&n네? 오히려 좋으시다니…&n후후, 주인님은 참 상냥하시네요.

1001407344.english: I'm planning to go to the mountains to gather wild greens at the chef's request... Would you like to come along, Master?
1001407344.korean: 주방장님의 부탁으로&n산에 나물을 캐러 가려고 하는데...&n주인님도 함께 가시겠어요?

1001407345.english: If you encounter a bear in the mountains, you must run away carefully. However, if you meet Friga in the mountains… you can rest assured and just give her a tight hug.
1001407345.korean: 산에서 곰과 마주치게 되면 &n조심히 도망치셔야 해요. &n하지만 산에서 프리가를 만나게 된다면… &n안심하고 품에 꼬옥 안겨주시면 된답니다.

1001407346.english: Do you know this, Master? In an old story, the bear went into a cave with the tiger. Master, would you like to say "Roar"?
1001407346.korean: 그거 알고 계시나요, 주인님? &n옛날이야기에서 곰은 호랑이와 &n함께 동굴에 들어갔다고 해요. &n주인님, "어흥"이라고 한 번 말해보시겠어요?

1001407347.english: Master, don't you also want to meet our child soon? How happy would I be to hold my beloved Master and a child who looks just like you in my arms?
1001407347.korean: 주인님도 우리 두 사람의 아이를 얼른 &n만나고 싶지 않으신가요? 사랑하는 주인님과 &n주인님을 쏙 빼닮은 아이, 두 사람을 &n품에 안으면 저는 얼마나 행복할까요?

1001407348.english: Could you please wait a moment, as I might tip the basket over?

1001407349.english: Even the usually reliable master,&nWhen you're like this, you're as cute as a child.
1001407349.korean: 평소엔 믿음직한 주인님도,&n이럴 때면 아이처럼 귀여우세요.

1001407350.english: I'll probably never be human in my entire life.&nEating only mugwort and garlic, and being trapped in a cave, too.&nI can endure it, but... 100 days without my master?&nI can't stand not being able to see it.
1001407350.korean: 아마 저는 평생 인간이 될 수 없을 거예요.&n쑥과 마늘만 먹는 것도, 동굴에 갇히는 것도&n참을 수 있지만, 주인님을 100일이나 &n볼 수 없는 건 절대 참을 수 없는걸요.

1001407351.english: They say this outfit is modeled after the Oni from Eastern legends. I heard he was the leader of countless monsters; doesn't it suit me well, considering I used to have tons of fans?
1001407351.korean: 이건 동양 전설 속에 나오는 오니를&n모티브로 만든 옷이래.&n수많은 요괴들의 대장이었다던데,&n팬들을 잔뜩 끌고 다니던 나랑 잘 어울리지?

1001407352.english: You mean this bat? To beat up guys I don't like... Just kidding. This is actually a microphone. Azaz made it for me, saying, "If you're a demon, you should wield a bat."
1001407352.korean: 이 방망이 말이야?&n맘에 안 드는 녀석들을 때려주려고…&n농담이야. 이건 사실 마이크거든.&n아자즈가 '오니라면 방망이를 들어야죠'&n이러면서 만들어 줬어.

1001407353.english: Back in the day, whenever I held a concert, selling out every seat was the norm. So, make sure the concert hall for me is built to the size of at least an island!
1001407353.korean: 옛날에는 내가 콘서트를 열었다 하면&n전 좌석 매진은 기본이었어.&n그러니까, 날 위한 콘서트장은 최소한&n섬 하나 정도 크기로 짓도록 해!

1001407354.english: Of course the clothes suit me well. There isn't a single outfit that doesn't look good on me. And… above all… because they are clothes that Eternity made for me.
1001407354.korean: 옷이 잘 어울리는 게 당연하지.&n내게 안 어울리는 옷은 없거든.&n그리고… 무엇보다도...&n이터니티가 날 위해 만들어 준 옷이니까.

1001407355.english: Praise and applaud more. Because I, Lady Draculina, am that amazing... ... Th-You can stop now! Stop! Stop it!
1001407355.korean: 좀 더 칭찬하고 박수치고 하라고.&n이 드라큐리나 님은 그만큼 대단하니까...&n…이, 이제 그만 해도 돼! 그만! 그만 하라고!

1001407356.english: Since you have suffered so much for me all this time… I will grant you the special privilege of serving Lady Draculina for the rest of your life. Right beside me.
1001407356.korean: 여태까지 날 위해 고생해 줬으니까…&n너한테는 특별히 평생 이 드라큐리나 님을&n모실 수 있는 특권을 줄게.&n바로 내 옆자리에서 말이야.

1001407357.english: Hey, what are you doing that's getting all wrinkled up?
1001407357.korean: 아잇, 옷 다 구겨지게 뭐 하는 거야?

1001407358.english: Since you're wearing an oni outfit...&nI guess I should act like an oni, right?&nA little more... the way you want...&nYou can be rough.&n
1001407358.korean: 오니 옷을 입었으니…&n오니답게 행동해야겠지?&n좀 더… 네가 원하는 방식대로…&n거칠게 해도 좋아.

1001407359.english: You're too concerned about what other people think.&nI tend to watch.&nSometimes you should just do what you want.&n...even at nite, then... Better and...
1001407359.korean: 넌 너무 다른 사람 눈치를&n보는 경향이 있어.&n가끔은 네 맘대로 해버리란 말이야.&n…밤에도 그러면... 더 좋고…

1001407360.english: You asked if teaching swimming lessons is hard?&nIt's not tiring at all!&nIt's fun to swim while working, and everyone...&nYou can see them enjoying themselves while swimming, can't you?
1001407360.korean: 수영 수업하는 거 힘들지 않냐고? &n하나도 안 힘들어! &n일하면서 수영하는 것도 즐겁고, 다들 &n수영하면서 즐거워하는 것도 볼 수 있잖아!

1001407361.english: Aren't competitive swimsuits usually just cut out in the back?&nNo matter how I think about it, this swimsuit is...&nIt's a little strange, though...
1001407361.korean: 경영 수영복은 보통 등만 파여있는 거 아냐? &n아무리 생각해 봐도 이 수영복은&n조금 이상한데…

1001407362.english: I keep an eye on things here and there to prevent any problems.&nIf a problem arises, I solve it.&nIt's not much different from what I usually do!
1001407362.korean: 문제가 생기지 않게 여기저기 감시한다.&n문제가 생기면 해결한다. &n평소에 하던 일이랑 별로 다를 것도 없어!

1001407363.english: We're living on a submarine, so...&nYou absolutely have to learn survival swimming! The commander too.&nWant to learn? If you're in danger, I'll be there anytime.&nI'm going to run, but there's no harm in learning, right?
1001407363.korean: 우린 잠수함에서 생활하고 있으니까 &n생존 수영은 꼭 배워야 한다구! 사령관도 &n배워볼래? 위험하면 내가 언제든지 &n달려갈 거지만, 배워서 나쁠 건 없잖아?

1001407364.english: Commander? Even if I pretend to be unconscious,&nI'm not going to give you mouth-to-mouth.&nYou don't have to play those kinds of jokes...&nI can do that much, you know...
1001407364.korean: 사령관? 기절한 척 하고 있어도 &n인공호흡 안 해줄거야~ &n그런 장난 치지 않아도… &n그 정도는 해 줄 수 있다니까…

1001407365.english: Commander! If the pool closes today, we'll go together.&nYou're going to clean, right? If we do it together, even cleaning will be...&nI want it to end quickly, because of the other kids.&nYou can do things you've been holding back on... freely, right?"&nThe commander can touch it as they please.&nThat's not how I'm dressed!?
1001407365.korean: 사령관! 오늘도 수영장 문 닫으면 같이 &n청소 해 줄거지? 둘이서 하면 청소도 &n빨리 끝나고, 다른 애들 때문에&n참았던 일도… 마음껏 할 수 있잖아?

1001407366.english: &n&nThe commander can touch it as they please.&nThat's not how I'm dressed!?
1001407366.korean: 사령관 마음대로 만지라고 &n이렇게 입고 있는거 아니거든!?

1001407367.english: Commander! If you only touch it there,&nThe sunscreen all comes off!&nSo it doesn't burn in the commander's hand...&nDo I need to apply it again carefully?
1001407367.korean: 사령관! 거기만 그렇게 만지면&n선크림 다 지워지잖아!&n사령관 손 모양으로 타버리지 않게…&n다시 꼼꼼히 발라줘야 된다?

1001407368.english: Commander! After a full-body workout&nYou can't skip stretching!&nLast night... when we were doing full-body exercises, I told you, didn't I...?
1001407368.korean: 사령관! 전신 운동하고 나서&n스트레칭 빼먹으면 안 된다고!&n어젯밤에… 전신 운동할 때 알려줬잖아…

1001407369.english: "What is this triangular thing I'm wearing on my head...? I... I don't really know either, but Momo said that if I'm a ghost, I obviously have to wear it, so...
1001407369.korean: 머리에 쓰고 있는 세모난 이게 뭐냐고…?&n나… 나도 잘 모르는데, 모모가 &n유령이면 당연히 써야 되는 거라고 그래서…

1001407370.english: How frustrating! Who will quench my thirst? Hehe! How was it, Commander? Was I a little like a ghost?
1001407370.korean: 원통하다~ 누가 내 한을 풀어줄 것이냐~&n헤헤! 어때, 사령관? 조금 유령 같았어?

1001407371.english: I was waiting to surprise LRL and Alvis... but instead of surprising them, I just ended up making them worry by asking if it hurt...
1001407371.korean: LRL이랑 알비스를 놀라게 해주려고 &n기다리고 있었는데… 놀라게 하기는커녕&n아프지 않냐고 걱정만 시키고 말았어…

1001407372.english: Don't let your guard down, Commander! The Serpent turned ghost can appear anywhere! It will show up the moment you let your guard down… and give you a tight hug!
1001407372.korean: 방심하지 마, 사령관! 유령이 된 서펀트는 &n어디서든 나타날 수 있거든!&n사령관이 방심하는 틈에 나타나서…&n사령관을 꽈악 하고 끌어안아 버릴 거야!

1001407373.english: Commander, do you want to make me attain enlightenment? Neither the cross, nor holy water, nor salt will work on me~? Well, if you give me a tight hug, I might attain enlightenment without a second thought...
1001407373.korean: 사령관, 나를 성불 시키고 싶어? &n십자가도, 성수도, 소금도 통하지 않을걸~? &n뭐, 사령관이 꽈악 안아주면 &n미련 없이 성불해 버릴지도 모르지만…

1001407374.english: I've been trying my best to hold back because I heard that sleeping with a ghost can be harmful to your health... but when the Commander looks at me like that... I can't hold it in anymore...
1001407374.korean: 귀접은 몸에 해로울 수도 &n있다고 하길래 열심히 참고 있는 건데…&n사령관이 나를 그렇게 바라보면…&n나도 더 이상 참을 수가 없잖아…

1001407375.english: A commander who plays naughty pranks gets taken away by a ghost~

1001407376.english: Our commander's overflowing yang energy&nIt needs to be covered with the ghost's yin energy...&nEven I'm starting to feel hot...
1001407376.korean: 우리 사령관의 이 넘치는 양기를 &n유령의 음기로 덮어줘야 하는데… &n나까지 몸이 뜨거워져 버리네…

1001407377.english: I'm so happy with the days I spend with the commander that...&nI feel like I'm going to achieve enlightenment... Hehe, just kidding!&nBut being happy enough to die is the real deal!
1001407377.korean: 사령관과 함께하는 날들이 너무 행복해서 &n성불해 버릴 것 같아… 헤헤, 농담이야! &n하지만 죽을 만큼 행복한 건 진심이라구!

1001407378.english: This look might be a bit unfamiliar, right? This is the outfit that appears in Part 2 of *Dragon Slayer*. It is the appearance of a fallen saintess who drank dragon blood.
1001407378.korean: 이 모습은 좀 생소하겠지?&n이건 <드래곤 슬레이어> 2부에서&n등장하는 복장이다.&n용의 피를 마시고 타락한 성녀의 모습이지.

1001407379.english: The blood of an evil dragon doesn't just grant power. It brings tremendous side effects as well. For example, you might suddenly feel the urge to breathe fire... Just kidding. You don't have that ability.
1001407379.korean: 악룡의 피는 힘만을 주는 것이 아니다.&n엄청난 부작용도 함께 가져오지.&n예를 들면 갑자기 불을 뿜고 싶어진다던가...&n농담이다. 여에게 그런 능력은 없으니.

1001407380.english: The saint you knew is well within Yeoyi, so do not worry too much. Once the brainwashing is undone… she will return to her original form.
1001407380.korean: 그대가 알던 성녀는 여의 안에 잘 있으니,&n너무 걱정하지 말거라.&n세뇌가 풀리고 나면…&n다시 원래의 모습으로 돌아올 터이니.

1001407381.english: She wasn't made to like alcohol. When I said that... Merlin was shocked. … Just what kind of life was the Saintess living?
1001407381.korean: 여는 술을 좋아하게 만들어지지 않았다.&n그 말을 했더니...&n멀린 녀석이 충격을 받더구나.&n…대체 성녀는 무슨 삶을 살던 것이냐?

1001407382.english: Lately, I’ve been learning to sing from Erato. Because when I sing… I can forget my worries for a while. Someday, I’ll sing for you too.
1001407382.korean: 최근에는 에라토에게 노래를 배우고 있다.&n노래를 부를 때에는…&n이런저런 고민들을 잠시 잊을 수 있으니까.&n언젠가 그대에게도 들려주겠다.

1001407383.english: A personality created by brainwashing. It is like a bubble that will eventually vanish. However… this heart that loves you, this emotion… is undoubtedly real.
1001407383.korean: 여는 세뇌로 인해 만들어진 인격.&n언젠가는 사라질 물거품 같은 것이다.&n그러나… 그대를 사랑하는 이 마음은,&n이 감정은... 틀림없는 진짜다.

1001407384.english: Dragon Slayer, do you wish to taste the wrath of the evil dragon?

1001407385.english: Dragons are inherently greedy creatures.&nOnce they get their hands on something, they don't let it go.&n...So, tonight, I'll have you all to myself.
1001407385.korean: 용이란 본래 탐욕스러운 존재.&n한번 손에 넣은 것은 놓아주지 않는다.&n…그러니, 오늘 밤은 그대를 독점하겠다.

1001407386.english: Wait, the saintess says she has something to say to you.&nIf it were now... One plus one event...?&n... Do you know what this means?
1001407386.korean: 잠깐, 성녀가 그대에게 할 말이 있다는구나.&n지금이라면... 원 플러스 원 이벤트…?&n...이게 무슨 뜻인지 그대는 알고 있느냐?

1001407387.english: Commander! Thank you for always loving our Elven Milk! Ugh... I'm a little embarrassed because I look different from usual...
1001407387.korean: 사령관님! 언제나 우리 엘븐 밀크를 &n사랑해 주셔서 감사합니다! 우으… &n평소랑 다른 모습이라 조금 부끄럽네요…

1001407388.english: Ranch work is fun, but… ugh… even though I’m dressed lighter than usual… I’m sweating a lot…
1001407388.korean: 목장 일은 즐겁지만… 으으…&n평소보다 가볍게 입었는데도… &n땀이 많이 나네요…

1001407389.english: Elven put this outfit on me without even explaining... I was flustered because it was sudden... but still... I was happy because it felt like I had grown closer to Elven...
1001407389.korean: 엘븐이 설명도 하지 않고…&n이 의상을 입히더군요…&n갑작스러워서 당황했지만… &n그래도… 엘븐이랑 더 가까워진 거 같아서… &n기뻤습니다…

1001407390.english: Are you talking about the experience corner? Programs like cheese making or milking cows yourself are very popular… P-Commander? Where are you looking right now…?
1001407390.korean: 체험코너 말씀이신가요? 치즈 만들기나&n직접 우유를 짜보는 프로그램이 인기가 많…&n사, 사령관님? 지금 어디를 보시는 건가요…?

1001407391.english: Hathor is strawberry milk, Dark Elven is chocolate milk, Cerestia is banana milk... Commander... are you perhaps thinking about what my milk tastes like right now...?
1001407391.korean: 하토르 씨는 딸기우유, 다크엘븐은 초코우유,&n세레스티아 씨는 바나나우유... &n사령관님... 혹시 지금 제 우유는 무슨 맛이&n날지 생각하고 계신가요…?

1001407392.english: Commander? If you sign up for the Elven Milk subscription service over here right now… you can take home a bottle of freshly squeezed milk… by any chance… are you interested?
1001407392.korean: 사령관님? 지금 이쪽에서 엘븐 밀크 &n정기구독 서비스를 신청하시면… 갓 짜낸 &n신선한 우유를 한 병 받아 가실 수 &n있으신데… 혹시… 관심 있으세요?

1001407393.english: I just got back from work... don't I smell of sweat? What!? You mean I smell like milk!?
1001407393.korean: 방금 일하고 왔는데… 땀 냄새나지 않나요?&n네!? 우유 냄새가 난다구요!?

1001407394.english: When this happens, the commander really acts like a child.&nIt's considered. Hehe, if it were Ms. Frigga or Ms. Cerestia...&nI understand now...
1001407394.korean: 이럴 때면 사령관님이 정말 어린아이처럼 &n여겨져요. 헤헤, 프리가씨나 세레스티아씨가&n이해되네요…

1001407395.english: The commander really does drink elven milk.&nYou like it... every morning.&nIs what I'm pouring for you... not enough?
1001407395.korean: 사령관님은 정말로 엘븐 밀크를&n좋아하시네요… 매일 아침에&n제가 따라드리는 걸로는… 부족하신가요?

1001407396.english: It's a nice outfit, but... I'm a little embarrassed. Still... I'm glad that the Commander likes it.
1001407396.korean: 멋진 옷이지만… 조금 부끄럽긴 하네요.&n그래도… 사령관님께서 좋아하셔서&n저도 기뻐요.

1001407397.english: I wasn't used to singing, so I struggled a lot during practice. But Captain May and Captain Arsenal somehow found out about it and came to help me a lot.
1001407397.korean: 노래하는 게 익숙하지 않아서 연습할 때,&n고생을 많이 했어요.&n하지만 메이 대장과 아스널 대장이 어떻게&n알고 찾아와서 많은 도움을 줬어요.

1001407398.english: I received a lot of help from Amy. From counseling to planning and execution. And… in the past as well.
1001407398.korean: 에이미에게 큰 도움을 받았어요.&n상담부터 계획, 실행까지.&n그리고… 과거에도.

1001407399.english: Janghwa made a subtle expression when he saw me. However, seeing as he immediately closed his mouth, it seems something came to mind.
1001407399.korean: 장화가 제 모습을 보더니&n미묘한 표정을 짓더군요.&n하지만 이내 입을 다문 것을 보면&n뭔가 떠오른 게 있나봐요.

1001407400.english: I was worried the children might not like seeing this, but... they all told me it was pretty. They are children I am proud of and love.
1001407400.korean: 아이들이 이 모습을 보고 싫어하면&n어쩌나 걱정했지만…&n전부 예쁘다고 말해줬어요.&n자랑스럽고 사랑스러운 아이들이랍니다.

1001407401.english: Putting aside being a bioroid, an operations officer, someone's colleague, a friend, or family... just for this moment, please see me only as a woman.
1001407401.korean: 바이오로이드, 작전관, 누군가의 동료,&n친구, 가족이라는 모든 것을 떠나서…&n지금 이 순간만큼은 저를 여자로만 봐주세요.

1001407402.english: The children are watching over there... so it's after the performance. You understand, right?
1001407402.korean: 저기에서 아이들이 보고 있어서…&n공연이 끝난 후에요. 아셨죠?

1001407403.english: Heh heh, how do you sing in bed?&nDo you want to know?&n...Wow, it's still embarrassing to say things like this.
1001407403.korean: 후후, 침대에서는 어떻게 노래하는지&n알고 싶으신가요?&n……여, 역시 이런 말은 부끄럽네요.

1001407404.english: Thanks to meeting you, the new roles I've taken on have...&nThey all make me happy.&nSubordinates, women, lovers, family...&nWhat other happiness awaits us?
1001407404.korean: 당신과 만난 덕분에 새롭게 늘어난 역할들은&n모두 저를 행복하게 하네요.&n부하, 여자, 연인, 가족…&n또 어떤 행복이 우리를 기다리고 있을까요?

1001407405.english: I am a nun today, Master. What? You ask who I serve? That is obvious. Of course, it is you, Master.
1001407405.korean: 오늘은 수녀랍니다, 주인님.&n네? 누구를 섬기냐고요?&n무슨 당연한 말씀을.&n당연히 주인님이죠.

1001407406.english: You mean this outfit? You said you got it from Saraqael? When he gave it to you, it sounded like he was talking about the Executor and doctrine or something, but that wasn't important, right?
1001407406.korean: 이 옷 말인가요?&n사라카엘에게 얻었답니다?&n이 옷을 줄 때 대행자 어쩌고 교리 어쩌고&n하는 거 같았지만 중요한 말은 아니겠죠?

1001407407.english: I noticed a lot of squad members wearing this outfit. That must mean the Master likes it that much, right? And... I can't lose to those big-breasted guys either.
1001407407.korean: 이 옷을 입은 대원들이 많더군요.&n그만큼 주인님께서 좋아한다는 뜻이겠죠?&n그리고… 왕가슴에게 질 수도 없고요.

1001407408.english: Are you referring to Kohei's doctrine? It seems you can't quite grasp it from this alone. Hehe, I'll have to explain it to you more clearly.
1001407408.korean: 코헤이의 교리 말씀이신가요?&n지금 이걸로는 알아차리지 못하시나 보네요.&n후후, 더 확실하게 알려드려야겠네요.

1001407409.english: Maid duties? Of course, I finished them perfectly. Ah, no. The most important task, night service, remains.
1001407409.korean: 메이드 업무요?&n당연히 완벽하게 끝내고 왔죠.&n아, 아니다.&n밤시중이라는 가장 중요한 일이 남았네요.

1001407410.english: What? Where on earth do you see me overflowing with lust? The pattern on my lower abdomen? That is proof that I am overflowing with faith and love.
1001407410.korean: 네? 저의 어딜 봐서 음욕이 넘쳐보이시나요?&n아랫배의 문양이요?&n이건 신앙과 사랑이 넘친다는 증거랍니다?

1001407411.english: As one who serves the agent of light, naturally I should follow, shouldn't I?

1001407412.english: The representative of light has personally bestowed a blessing, so&nCould there be anything more enchanting than this?
1001407412.korean: 빛의 대리인께서 친히 축복을 내려주시니&n이보다 황홀한 일이 또 있을까요?

1001407413.english: As a maid, I serve my master.&nServing the Savior as a nun.&nBecause I love you, a man, as a woman.&nOh, how can I contain this feeling?
1001407413.korean: 메이드로서 주인님을 모시고.&n수녀로서 구원자를 섬기며.&n여자로서 남자인 당신을 사랑하니.&n아아, 이 마음을 어떻게 참을 수 있을까요?

1001407414.english: Surfing is nice, but skating is nice too. There used to be an ice rink in Malta, but since humans were there, the skating was done by bioroids, so after the apocalypse, it wasn't maintained and we couldn't skate.
1001407414.korean: 서핑도 좋지만 스케이팅도 좋네.&n몰타에도 빙상장이 있었지만 &n인간이 있을 때는 바이오로이드라서&n멸망 이후에는 관리가 안 되서 못 탔거든.

1001407415.english: It's easy to balance since I have a tail. Of course, if my tail touches the ice, it gets too cold, so I have to keep holding it, but...
1001407415.korean: 꼬리가 있으니까 균형 잡기 쉽네.&n물론 얼음에 꼬리가 닿으면 너무 차가워서&n계속 들고 있어야하지만…

1001407416.english: You ask if it's too heavy to jump? It's fine, I have that much muscle strength. What? You say the ice can't handle it? Hahaha! This master...
1001407416.korean: 점프하기엔 너무 무겁지 않냐고?&n그만큼 근력이 있으니까 괜찮아.&n뭐? 얼음이 못 버틴다고?&n하하하하! 이 주인님이…

1001407417.english: The Empress taught me all sorts of things about skating, but I listened halfway through and kept dozing off. Isn't having fun the most important thing?
1001407417.korean: 엠프리스가 스케이팅에 대해서&n이것저것 가르쳐 줬는데.&n중간까지 듣고 꾸벅꾸벅 졸았어.&n일단 즐거운 게 제일 중요한 거 아니겠어?

1001407418.english: Master, come up onto the ice quickly too. I’ve prepared your clothes and shoes. Don’t worry about the size. There’s no way a Guardian wouldn’t know your physical condition, right?
1001407418.korean: 주인님도 어서 빙상에 올라와.&n옷이랑 신발 모두 준비했어.&n사이즈는 걱정하지마.&n가디언이 주인님의 신체 조건을&n모를 리 없잖아?

1001407419.english: Master, how about we team up? We can skate in perfect harmony, show off various tricks, and receive applause. So let's practice our lifts hard!
1001407419.korean: 주인님. 나랑 페어 짜는 건 어때?&n함께 호흡을 맞춰서 스케이팅하며&n여러가지 기술을 보여주고&n갈채를 받는거지.&n그러니 리프트 연습 열심히 하자!

1001407420.english: This is a point deduction factor...

1001407421.english: I skated like that, but...&nYou're still so lively?&nGuess I have no choice... All the remaining energy...&nThere's no choice but to make me use it...
1001407421.korean: 그렇게 스케이트를 탔는데&n아직도 이렇게 팔팔하다고?&n어쩔 수 없네… 남은 기운 전부…&n나한테 쓰게 하는 수밖에...

1001407422.english: Master, your performance this time was truly perfect!&nHehe, of course it is, since I practiced so much.&nAnd... the master and I are perfectly...&nBecause it fits well. Body and... mind...
1001407422.korean: 주인님, 이번 연기 정말로 완벽했어!&n헤헤, 그렇게 연습했으니 당연하지.&n그리고… 주인님과 나는 완벽하게&n잘맞으니까. 몸도… 마음도…

1001407423.english: Although I didn't intend to, I've gained knowledge about concerts.&nI've saved up a little.&nThe moment the performance reached its peak, the goal...&nSo I can snipe them.
1001407423.korean: 의도치는 않았지만 음악회에 대한 지식을&n조금 쌓았습니다.&n연주가 최고조에 달한 순간에 목표를&n저격할 수 있게 말이죠.

1001407424.english: Sand Girl-nim is spontaneous.&nIt feels like I'm carrying out a mission.&nHowever, the spontaneous method is&nIt's often more effective.
1001407424.korean: 샌드걸 님은 즉흥적으로&n임무를 수행하는 느낌이 강합니다.&n하지만 즉흥적인 방법이&n더 유효할 때도 많더군요.

1001407425.english: In the snowy mountains, in white attire,&nAs if hiding their appearance&nIn the city, as a concert dress.&nThey hid their appearance.
1001407425.korean: 설산에선 하얀 복장으로&n모습을 숨기는 것처럼&n도시에선 음악회 드레스로&n모습을 숨겼습니다.

1001407426.english: Although the attire is unfamiliar,&nMy feelings don't matter.&nAt any moment, in any environment&nBecause achieving goals is a soldier's virtue.
1001407426.korean: 익숙하지 않은 복장이지만&n제 기분은 중요하지 않습니다.&n어떤 순간, 어떤 환경에서도&n목표를 달성하는 것이 군인의 소양이니까요.

1001407427.english: Grooming myself is just a disguise.&nI thot it was enough.&nYour Excellency... Before I met you, that is.
1001407427.korean: 제 자신을 꾸미는 것은 위장만으로&n충분하다고 생각했습니다.&n각하를... 뵙기 전에는 말입니다.

1001407428.english: Your Excellency... if you're feeling up to it, perhaps the concert...&nWould you accompany me?&nYes... it's to capture the goal.
1001407428.korean: 각하… 괜찮으시면 음악회에&n동행해주시겠습니까?&n네… 목표를… 사로잡기 위해서 입니다.

1001407429.english: As a thank you... would you like to be invited to a concert?

1001407430.english: Hey, are you pretending to be lovers?&nWell, then, I guess there's nothing we can do.&nSo... go ahead and...
1001407430.korean: 여, 연인으로 위장하기 위함입니까?&n그, 그러면 어쩔 수 없겠죠.&n그러니… 마음껏…

1001407431.english: Sniping is a decision between caution and boldness.&nYou can. And I'm a sniper.&nSo, I'm requesting...&nWould you... kiss me?
1001407431.korean: 저격은 신중함과 과감함 사이의 결단이라고&n할 수 있습니다. 그리고 저는 저격수지요.&n그래서 요청드리는데...&n키스… 해주시겠습니까?

1001407432.english: I have many secrets. But please don't worry. I have no intention of hiding a single one from you, Master. ...Ah, except for my weight...
1001407432.korean: 저는 비밀이 많아요.&n하지만, 걱정하지 마세요. 주인님께는…&n단 하나도 숨길 생각이 없으니까요.&n…아, 몸무게는… 빼고요…

1001407433.english: As long as Caracas Industries was subordinate to Omega, my being under Omega was… inevitable. So please, don't hate me too much…
1001407433.korean: 카라카스 산업이 오메가에게 종속된 이상,&n제가 오메가 밑에 있던 건…&n어쩔 수 없는 일이었어요.&n그러니, 절 너무 미워하진 말아주세요…

1001407434.english: The security system of Orca designed by Scathy is reliable, but... it [c][FC2424]highlights the things I hacked in red[-][/c]... so sometimes it is a bit troublesome.
1001407434.korean: 스카디 님이 설계하신&n오르카의 보안 시스템은 믿음직스럽지만...&n제가 해킹한 것들을 [c][FC2424]붉은 색으로 강조[-][/c]해서…&n조금 곤란할 때도 있어요.

1001407435.english: The black clothes I am wearing… I decided to wear them to atone for my past sins. In the past… I committed many things I should never have done…
1001407435.korean: 제가 입고 있는 검은 옷은…&n과거의 죄를 뉘우치고자 입기로 한 거예요.&n저는 옛날에… 해서는 안 될 일들을&n많이 저질렀거든요…

1001407436.english: I may not be as good as Alpha or the others, but I can still be of help to you, Master. So… please… let me be by your side.
1001407436.korean: 알파 님이나 다른 분들 만큼은 아니겠지만,&n저도 주인님께 도움을 드릴 수 있어요.&n그러니까… 제가… 곁에 있게 해주세요.

1001407437.english: You ask if I… don’t dislike having others by Master’s side? Of course not. Master is like the sun. It is only natural that everyone respects and loves him, isn’t it?
1001407437.korean: 주인님 곁에 다른 분들이 있는 게…&n싫지는 않냐고요?&n그럴 리가요. 주인님은 태양 같으신 분.&n다들 주인님을 존경하고 사랑하는 건&n너무나도 당연한 일이잖아요?

1001407438.english: M-Master, how could you treat someone like me like this...
1001407438.korean: 주, 주인님, 어찌 저 같은 것한테 이런...

1001407439.english: ... Are you sure you're okay with me?&nI'm very obsessive, and I'm also bad at self-care.&nUm... the desire is also... strong...&nBut if you're okay with it, Master, I'm happy to...
1001407439.korean: ...정말 저로 괜찮으세요?&n저, 집착도 심하고, 자기 관리도 부족하고,&n그… 욕망도… 강한데…&n하지만 주인님께서 괜찮으시다면 얼마든지…

1001407440.english: Everything I have belongs to my master.&nFrom a single strand of hair to a single fingernail. And...&nEvery tiny piece of my heart...
1001407440.korean: 제 모든 것은 주인님께서 소유하고 계세요.&n머리카락 한 올부터, 손톱 하나. 그리고…&n제 마음의 아주 작은 한 조각까지…

1001407441.english: Spending the holidays with the City Guard members. It’s a wish I’ve always dreamed of. This year… I hope you, Master, can enjoy the holidays with us too…
1001407441.korean: 시티가드 대원들과 함께 연휴를 보내는 것.&n제가 항상 꿈꾸던 소원이에요.&n올해에는… 주인님도 저희와 함께&n연휴를 즐길 수 있으면 좋겠어요…

1001407442.english: Shepherd is a nice person, but... I don't think she has a good eye for sports. The best baseball team is... the LA Cannoniers...
1001407442.korean: 셰퍼드 언니는 좋은 분이지만…&n스포츠를 보는 눈은 없는 것 같아요.&n최고의 야구 팀은… LA 캐노니어즈인데…

1001407443.english: I am not the lemonade of binge eating. I haven't gained weight; I just weigh as much as I have volume. … So please don't rub my belly.
1001407443.korean: 저는 폭식의 레모네이드가 아니에요.&n살이 찐 게 아니라, 그냥 볼륨이 있는 만큼&n무게가 나가는 것 뿐이라고요.&n…그러니까 배 주무르지 마세요.

1001407444.english: I told you I have a lot of secrets... didn't I? H-h-h-h... wouldn't you like to find out about the secret I'm hiding inside this outfit...?
1001407444.korean: 저는 비밀이 많다고… 말씀드렸었죠?&n호, 혹시… 제가 이 옷 안에 숨기고 있는&n비밀에 대해서 알아보고 싶지 않으세요…?

1001407445.english: Master, the field medical manual...&nCould you please review it?&nAs you know... in the olden days,&nTreat bio-roids as consumables only.&nBecause I hardly saw any of that.
1001407445.korean: 주인님, 야전 치료 매뉴얼을&n검토해 주시겠어요?&n아시다시피… 옛 시대에는&n바이오로이드를 소모품으로만&n봐서 그런 게 거의 없었거든요.

1001407446.english: Just like Lise-neechan is only obsessed with the Master,&nDon't worry if you see it.&nI don't neglect my nursing duties.&n...although sometimes I get a little too attached.
1001407446.korean: 리제 언니가 주인님께만 집착하는 것처럼&n보여도 걱정하지 마세요.&n간호 업무를 게을리하지는 않아요.&n…가끔은 너무 집착하기는 하지만요.

1001407447.english: With the Watchers of Nature,&nIt's a friendly rivalry.&nAlthough we compete, we do it for the patients.&nWe have the same priorities.
1001407447.korean: 와쳐 오브 네이쳐 분들과는&n선의의 라이벌 관계예요.&n경쟁을 하기는 하지만 환자분들을&n우선시하는 마음은 같죠.

1001407448.english: Sometimes, Mr. Circe, Ms. Annie, Ms. Yumi,&nMr. Werewolf and a group of others are in the infirmary.&nThere's a time when it comes. ...because of a hangover.
1001407448.korean: 가끔 키르케 씨, 애니 씨, 유미 씨,&n워울프 씨가 단체로 의무실에&n올 때가 있어요. ……숙취 때문에요.

1001407449.english: Even if the sisters work together in the infirmary,&nThe roles they play are different.&nThere are nurses, mascots, and doctors.&nThere are patients too.
1001407449.korean: 자매들이 같이 의무실에서 일을 해도&n하는 역할은 달라요.&n간호사도 있고, 마스코트도 있고, 의사도 있고&n환자도 있네요.

1001407450.english: I'm happy when I take care of plants too, but&nI'm also happy when I can help patients.&nThe people who created us&nThey must have been kind people.
1001407450.korean: 식물을 돌볼 때에도 기쁘지만,&n환자분들을 도와드릴 때에도 기쁘답니다.&n저희를 만들던 분들은&n상냥한 분들이었나 봐요.

1001407452.english: Did it help a lot in relieving your symptoms?&nThen... there's also a more advanced treatment process...&nHow is it?
1001407452.korean: 증상 완화에 큰 도움이 되셨나요?&n그러면… 좀 더 심화된 치료과정도 있는데…&n어떠신가요?

1001407453.english: The illness is love. The prescription for that is...&nIt's love, as expected.&nHmph. It's embarrassing, but... I'm still happy.&nI love you, Master.
1001407453.korean: 병명은 사랑. 그에 대한 처방은…&n역시나 사랑이네요.&n후후. 부끄럽지만… 그래도 행복해요.&n사랑해요, 주인님.

1001407454.english: Hello, Master. Are you feeling unwell today? What? You came to see me today? Oh, how delightful!
1001407454.korean: 안녕하세요, 주인님.&n오늘은 어디가 편찮으신가요?&n네? 오늘은 저를 만나러 오셨다고요?&n오~ 기뻐라.

1001407455.english: Between taking care of the farm and the patient, I am so busy that even having two bodies wouldn't be enough, but I am happy to be able to be of help to others.
1001407455.korean: 농장 돌보랴, 환자 돌보랴.&n몸이 두 개라도 부족할 정도로&n바쁘지만 그만큼 남에게 도움이&n될 수 있어서 기뻐요.

1001407456.english: There are no patients today. It's rare to have a day this quiet. Taking it easy today... but whenever I say I'm taking it easy, a patient appears...
1001407456.korean: 오늘은 환자가 없네요.&n이렇게 한가한 날은 거의 없는데.&n오늘은 느긋하게…&n느긋하다는 말만 하면 환자가 생기네요…

1001407457.english: Medical knowledge? Actually, I get a lot of help from artificial intelligence. Of course, that doesn't work if you don't study enough, though.
1001407457.korean: 의학지식요?&n사실 인공지능에게 도움을&n많이 받는 답니다. 물론 이것도&n공부가 부족하면 안 되지만요.

1001407458.english: Have you met the other sisters? They are all quietly doing their part in their respective places. Hehe, they are sisters to be proud of.
1001407458.korean: 다른 자매들은 만나보셨나요?&n모두 각자의 자리에서&n묵묵히 맡은 바를 다 하고 있답니다.&n후후, 자랑스러운 자매들이죠.

1001407459.english: Here is a medical questionnaire. Would you please fill it out? Every single word, without missing a single one. I cannot afford to be unaware of anything about you, Master.
1001407459.korean: 여기 문진표가 있는데 작성해주시겠어요?&n하나도 빠짐 없이 모두요.&n제가 주인님에 대해서 모르는 것이&n있어서는 안 되니까요.

1001407460.english: Are you going to give me an injection if I do this?

1001407461.english: Why is the master so interested in the female form?&nThere's nothing I can do about it.&nI'll tell you one by one.
1001407461.korean: 주인님은 왜 이리 여체에 관심이 많으실까&n어쩔 수 없네요. &n제가 하나하나 알려드릴게요.

1001407462.english: Master, do you know about family history?&nI thot it would be good to know in advance.&nFor the children we'll have in the future, hehe.
1001407462.korean: 주인님, 가족력이라는 걸 알고 계시나요?&n미리미리 알아두는 것이 좋을 거 같아서요.&n미래에 생길 아이들을 위해서요, 후후.

1001407463.english: My subordinates argued about whether I should call the commander "Senior" or "Oppa." In the end, they agreed on a character where I call him "Senior" because I want to call him "Oppa" but have to worry about what others think.
1001407463.korean: 내가 사령관을 선배라고 부를 지,&n오빠라고 부를 지 부하들이&n논쟁을 벌이더군. 결국엔 오빠라고 부르고&n싶지만 주위 시선 때문에 &n선배라고 부르는 캐릭터로… 합의하더군.

1001407464.english: Pure-hearted, childhood friend, tough on the outside, soft on the inside, ponytail, skilled in both martial arts and scholarship, delinquent, craving attention, unexpected charm... Talonfeather is a competent subordinate, but... sometimes I don't understand what he's talking about.
1001407464.korean: 지고지순, 소꿉친구, 외강내유, 포니테일,&n문무겸비, 불량학생, 관심갈구, 반전매력...&n탈론페더는 유능한 부관이지만… &n난 가끔 부관이 무슨 말을 하는지 모르겠다.

1001407465.english: I don't pick up abandoned cats or anything like that... but I have picked up guys who were about to be abandoned and made them do their job.
1001407465.korean: 버려진 고양이를 줍거나 그러지는 않지만…&n버려질 녀석들을 주워다가&n제구실하게 만든 일은 있지.

1001407466.english: I have never been to school. However, there are many of my subordinates who have been to 'school' in a different sense. Right now... Werewolf has gone, too.
1001407466.korean: 학교는 다녀본 적 없다.&n하지만 부하들 중에 다른 의미의 '학교'를&n다녀온 녀석들은 많다.&n지금... 워울프도 간 상태지.

1001407467.english: Senior… are you free after school today? If you have time, would you like to go to Cafe Horizon just the two of us… for a Colorful Heartful Berry Berry All Berry Lovely Parfait…? Thanks…
1001407467.korean: 선배… 오늘 방과 후에… 시간 괜찮나?&n시간이 되면 단 둘이 카페 호라이즌에…&n컬러풀 하트풀 베리베리 올베리 러블리&n파르페… 먹으러 가지 않겠나?&n고맙다…

1001407468.english: It would be a lie to say I'm not ashamed. But the sincerity of my subordinates... even though it's closer to a prank... I just couldn't ignore their genuine feelings. And... above all... because my brother... likes me.
1001407468.korean: 부끄럽지 않다고 말하면 거짓말이겠지.&n하지만 부하들의 성의… 장난질에 가깝기는&n하지만… 녀석들의 성의를 무시 못 하겠더군.&n그리고… 무엇보다… 오빠가… 좋아하니까.

1001407469.english: You're more impatient than me... Senior.

1001407470.english: When this happens, Talon Feather told me to say this.&nAll the characters appearing here are over 20 years old...&nBig Brother... so please, feel free to...
1001407470.korean: 이럴 때 탈론페더가 이 말을 하라고 하더군.&n여기 등장하는 모든 인물은 20세 이상이다…&n오빠… 그러니까 부디 마음껏…

1001407471.english: Commander, you, you, senior, yourself, older brother...&nI'm testing which title you prefer.&nDarling? Your Excellency? My lord? Brother? Honey? ...Dad?&nWhy are you reacting here?
1001407471.korean: 사령관, 당신, 그대, 선배, 자기, 오빠…&n그대가 무슨 호칭을 좋아할 지 검증 중이다.&n달링? 각하? 주군? 오라버니? 허니? ……아빠?&n왜 여기에 반응하나?

1001407472.english: The name of this humble servant who has become a magical girl is… not Kunoichi Enrai. Please call me the Kunoichi Magical Girl, Prism Sakura.
1001407472.korean: 마법소녀가 된 소첩의 이름은…&n쿠노이치 엔라이가 아니옵니다.&n쿠노이치 마법소녀, 프리즘 사쿠라라고&n불러 주시옵소서.

1001407473.english: The magical power of the Prisma Stick is meant to resolve everyone's worries. It is not to satisfy selfish desires. …Although there are occasional exceptions.
1001407473.korean: 프리즈마 스틱의 매지컬 파워는&n모든 이들의 고민을 해결하기 위한 것.&n사리사욕을 채우기 위한 것이 아니옵니다.&n…가끔 예외가 있긴 하지만요.
